options.text_en: Tonight might not work — another time?
options.feedback: Reasonable but a slight letdown.

options.text_zh: 我一个人看就行了。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ yī ge rén kàn jiù xíng le.
options.text_en: I can just watch alone.
options.feedback: Declines the social aspect of her invitation.

tree.cultural_note: Watching TV dramas together is a popular bonding activity in China. Slice-of-life dramas about family restaurants, small towns, and everyday warmth (生活剧) are beloved for their comfort and relatability. Sharing snacks while watching is a cozy tradition.

tree.setup: You're cooking dinner for friends but realize you don't have enough bowls. You decide to knock on your neighbor Auntie Chen's door to borrow a few.
tree.setup_zh: 你在为朋友们做晚饭，发现碗不够用了。你决定去敲邻居陈阿姨的门，借几个碗。

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Knock on the door and ask to borrow bowls.

options.text_zh: 陈阿姨，不好意思。我请朋友吃饭，碗不够，能借三个吗？马上还您。
options.text_pinyin: Chén āyí, bù hǎoyìsi. Wǒ qǐng péngyou chīfàn, wǎn bú gòu, néng jiè sān ge ma? Mǎshàng huán nín.
options.text_en: Auntie Chen, sorry. I'm having friends for dinner and don't have enough bowls — could I borrow three? I'll return them right away.
options.feedback: Polite, specific, and promises to return them — exactly right.

options.text_zh: 你家有碗吗？借我几个。
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ jiā yǒu wǎn ma? Jiè wǒ jǐ ge.
options.text_en: Do you have bowls? Lend me some.
options.feedback: Too blunt — no pleasantries or explanation.

options.text_zh: 陈阿姨，有件小事想麻烦您一下。
options.text_pinyin: Chén āyí, yǒu jiàn xiǎo shì xiǎng máfan nín yīxià.
options.text_en: Auntie Chen, I have a small favor to ask.
options.feedback: Polite opener — the indirect approach is culturally appropriate.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 当然可以！你等一下，我去拿。你今天做什么好吃的啊？请朋友来多热闹！
turns.text_pinyin: Dāngrán kěyǐ! Nǐ děng yīxià, wǒ qù ná. Nǐ jīntiān zuò shénme hǎochī de a? Qǐng péngyou lái duō rènao!
turns.text_en: Of course! Wait a moment, I'll go get them. What are you cooking today? Having friends over is so lively!

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Tell her about your dinner plans.

options.text_zh: 我做了红烧肉和两个素菜。陈阿姨，要不要也过来一起吃？菜很多。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ zuò le hóngshāoròu hé liǎng ge sùcài. Chén āyí, yào bú yào yě guòlái yīqǐ chī? Cài hěn duō.
options.text_en: I made braised pork and two vegetable dishes. Auntie Chen, would you like to join us? There's plenty of food.
options.feedback: Generous and warm — inviting her is a natural kindness after borrowing.

options.text_zh: 就是一些家常菜。
options.text_pinyin: Jiù shì yīxiē jiācháng cài.
options.text_en: Just some home-style dishes.
options.feedback: Modest but doesn't extend the warmth.

options.text_zh: 碗拿来就行了，不用问那么多。
options.text_pinyin: Wǎn ná lái jiù xíng le, bú yòng wèn nàme duō.
options.text_en: Just bring the bowls, no need to ask so many questions.
options.feedback: Rude — she's being friendly while helping you.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 真的可以吗？那太好了！我一个人在家也没什么事。我正好做了一个汤，我也带过去吧！
turns.text_pinyin: Zhēn de kěyǐ ma? Nà tài hǎo le! Wǒ yī ge rén zài jiā yě méi shénme shì. Wǒ zhènghǎo zuò le yī ge tāng, wǒ yě dài guòqù ba!
turns.text_en: Really? That's wonderful! I'm home alone with nothing to do. I just made some soup — I'll bring it over too!

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her bringing soup.

options.text_zh: 太好了！陈阿姨做的汤一定很好喝。那我们六点开始，您过来就行。
options.text_pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Chén āyí zuò de tāng yīdìng hěn hǎohē. Nà wǒmen liù diǎn kāishǐ, nín guòlái jiù xíng.
options.text_en: Wonderful! Auntie Chen's soup must be delicious. We'll start at six — just come over.
options.feedback: Inclusive and appreciative — a small favor turns into a community dinner.

options.text_zh: 好的，谢谢。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie.
options.text_en: Okay, thanks.
options.feedback: Fine but misses the warmth of the moment.

options.text_zh: 不用带了，菜已经够了。
options.text_pinyin: Bú yòng dài le, cài yǐjīng gòu le.
options.text_en: No need to bring anything, there's enough food.
options.feedback: Polite refusal but she wants to contribute — let her.

tree.cultural_note: Borrowing household items from neighbors is common in Chinese communities and often leads to deeper connections. The natural response to borrowing is often reciprocity — inviting the neighbor to join, and the neighbor contributing food in return. This cycle of give-and-take builds community bonds.

tree.setup: Your roommate Xiao Mei and you are standing in the kitchen after work, trying to figure out what to cook for dinner with whatever you have.
tree.setup_zh: 下班后，你和室友小美站在厨房里，想用家里有的东西商量做什么晚饭。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 冰箱里有鸡蛋、西红柿、还有一点面条。你觉得做什么好？
turns.text_pinyin: Bīngxiāng lǐ yǒu jīdàn, xīhóngshì, hái yǒu yīdiǎn miàntiáo. Nǐ juéde zuò shénme hǎo?
turns.text_en: There are eggs, tomatoes, and some noodles in the fridge. What do you think we should make?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Suggest what to cook.

options.text_zh: 我们可以做西红柿鸡蛋面！又简单又好吃。你切西红柿，我来煮面，好不好？
options.text_pinyin: Wǒmen kěyǐ zuò xīhóngshì jīdàn miàn! Yòu jiǎndān yòu hǎochī. Nǐ qiē xīhóngshì, wǒ lái zhǔ miàn, hǎo bù hǎo?
options.text_en: We could make tomato egg noodles! Simple and delicious. You cut the tomatoes, I'll cook the noodles — sound good?
options.feedback: Practical, cooperative, and uses all the ingredients — perfect teamwork.

options.text_zh: 随便吧，你做什么我都行。
options.text_pinyin: Suíbiàn ba, nǐ zuò shénme wǒ dōu xíng.
options.text_en: Whatever, I'm fine with anything you make.
options.feedback: Easy-going but puts all the work on her.

options.text_zh: 我们叫外卖吧，做饭太麻烦了。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒmen jiào wàimài ba, zuòfàn tài máfan le.
options.text_en: Let's order delivery — cooking is too much trouble.
options.feedback: Dismisses the idea of cooking together.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好主意！西红柿鸡蛋面是我小时候最喜欢吃的。我妈妈以前每次做都会放一点糖，特别好吃。我们也放一点吧？
turns.text_pinyin: Hǎo zhǔyi! Xīhóngshì jīdàn miàn shì wǒ xiǎo shíhou zuì xǐhuan chī de. Wǒ māma yǐqián měi cì zuò dōu huì fàng yīdiǎn táng, tèbié hǎochī. Wǒmen yě fàng yīdiǎn ba?
turns.text_en: Good idea! Tomato egg noodles were my favorite as a kid. My mom always added a bit of sugar — it made it extra delicious. Should we add some too?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her childhood memory and the sugar suggestion.

options.text_zh: 当然！你妈妈的做法一定很好。我家以前是放一点醋的，我们两个方法都试试？
options.text_pinyin: Dāngrán! Nǐ māma de zuòfǎ yīdìng hěn hǎo. Wǒ jiā yǐqián shì fàng yīdiǎn cù de, wǒmen liǎng ge fāngfǎ dōu shìshi?
options.text_en: Of course! Your mom's way must be great. My family used to add a bit of vinegar — should we try both methods?
options.feedback: Sharing family cooking traditions is a beautiful way to bond.

options.text_zh: 好，放糖。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo, fàng táng.
options.text_en: Sure, add sugar.
options.feedback: Agreeable but doesn't share anything back.

options.text_zh: 放糖？那不是太甜了吗？
options.text_pinyin: Fàng táng? Nà bú shì tài tián le ma?
options.text_en: Sugar? Wouldn't that be too sweet?
options.feedback: Questions her family recipe — could be sensitive.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 放醋也好吃！那一半放糖，一半放醋。哈哈，我们自己发明了新做法。对了，要不要再煎一个鸡蛋？
turns.text_pinyin: Fàng cù yě hǎochī! Nà yībàn fàng táng, yībàn fàng cù. Hāhā, wǒmen zìjǐ fāmíng le xīn zuòfǎ. Duìle, yào bú yào zài jiān yī ge jīdàn?
turns.text_en: Vinegar works too! Half with sugar, half with vinegar. Haha, we've invented a new recipe. By the way, should we fry an egg too?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond about adding a fried egg.

options.text_zh: 好啊！面上放一个煎蛋，看起来就很幸福。今天晚上我们吃得不错嘛。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo a! Miàn shàng fàng yī ge jiāndàn, kàn qǐlái jiù hěn xìngfú. Jīntiān wǎnshang wǒmen chī de búcuò ma.
options.text_en: Sure! A fried egg on top of noodles — that looks like happiness. We're eating well tonight.
options.feedback: Cheerful and appreciative of a simple meal — captures the warm moment.

options.text_zh: 可以。
options.text_pinyin: Kěyǐ.
options.text_en: Sure.
options.feedback: Fine but doesn't add to the fun.

options.text_zh: 不用了，够了。
options.text_pinyin: Bú yòng le, gòu le.
options.text_en: No need, it's enough.
options.feedback: Practical but dampens the fun energy.

tree.cultural_note: Tomato egg noodles (西红柿鸡蛋面) is one of the most beloved home-cooked meals in China — simple, cheap, and full of nostalgia. The debate about whether to add sugar or vinegar is a real north-south cultural divide. Cooking together as roommates or family is a daily act of connection.

tree.setup: You're walking through your neighborhood and notice that Uncle Sun's small garden is looking particularly beautiful today. He's outside watering his vegetables and flowers.
tree.setup_zh: 你在小区里散步，发现孙叔叔的小花园今天特别漂亮。他正在外面给蔬菜和花浇水。

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Compliment Uncle Sun's garden.

options.text_zh: 孙叔叔，您的花园真漂亮！那些花是什么时候种的？颜色好鲜艳。
options.text_pinyin: Sūn shūshu, nín de huāyuán zhēn piàoliang! Nàxiē huā shì shénme shíhou zhòng de? Yánsè hǎo xiānyàn.
options.text_en: Uncle Sun, your garden is so beautiful! When did you plant those flowers? The colors are so vibrant.
options.feedback: Specific and genuine — shows you're really looking at the garden.

options.text_zh: 花不错啊。
options.text_pinyin: Huā búcuò a.
options.text_en: Nice flowers.
options.feedback: Brief — could be more engaging.

options.text_zh: 孙叔叔，您每天都在这里浇水吗？不累吗？
options.text_pinyin: Sūn shūshu, nín měi tiān dōu zài zhèlǐ jiāo shuǐ ma? Bú lèi ma?
options.text_en: Uncle Sun, do you water every day? Doesn't it tire you out?
options.feedback: Focuses on effort rather than beauty — slightly negative framing.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 谢谢！这些花是去年秋天种的，今年春天才开。你看这个，是月季，一年能开好几次。那边还有我种的黄瓜和西红柿，快可以吃了。
turns.text_pinyin: Xièxie! Zhèxiē huā shì qùnián qiūtiān zhòng de, jīnnián chūntiān cái kāi. Nǐ kàn zhège, shì yuèjì, yī nián néng kāi hǎo jǐ cì. Nàbiān hái yǒu wǒ zhòng de huángguā hé xīhóngshì, kuài kěyǐ chī le.
turns.text_en: Thank you! These flowers were planted last autumn and just bloomed this spring. Look at this one — it's a Chinese rose, blooms several times a year. Over there I've got cucumbers and tomatoes I planted — they're almost ready to eat.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to his garden tour.

options.text_zh: 自己种的蔬菜一定特别新鲜！孙叔叔，您能教教我怎么种吗？我也想在阳台上种一点。
options.text_pinyin: Zìjǐ zhòng de shūcài yīdìng tèbié xīnxiān! Sūn shūshu, nín néng jiāojiao wǒ zěnme zhòng ma? Wǒ yě xiǎng zài yángtái shàng zhòng yīdiǎn.
options.text_en: Homegrown vegetables must be so fresh! Uncle Sun, could you teach me how? I'd like to grow some on my balcony too.
options.feedback: Respectful and eager to learn — elders love sharing their expertise.

options.text_zh: 不错不错。
options.text_pinyin: Búcuò búcuò.
options.text_en: Not bad, not bad.
options.feedback: Vague — doesn't engage deeply.

options.text_zh: 种菜很辛苦吧？
options.text_pinyin: Zhòng cài hěn xīnkǔ ba?
options.text_en: Growing vegetables must be hard work, right?
options.feedback: Focuses on difficulty rather than enjoyment.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你要学种菜？好啊！阳台上种西红柿最合适，又好看又好吃。我下次给你几颗种子。种菜最重要的是耐心，不能着急。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ yào xué zhòng cài? Hǎo a! Yángtái shàng zhòng xīhóngshì zuì héshì, yòu hǎokàn yòu hǎochī. Wǒ xià cì gěi nǐ jǐ kē zhǒngzi. Zhòng cài zuì zhòngyào de shì nàixīn, bù néng zháojí.
turns.text_en: You want to learn gardening? Great! Tomatoes are perfect for balconies — both pretty and tasty. I'll give you some seeds next time. The most important thing about growing vegetables is patience — you can't rush it.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to his offer and advice.

options.text_zh: 谢谢孙叔叔！我一定好好学。等我的西红柿长出来了，请您来尝尝。
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie Sūn shūshu! Wǒ yīdìng hǎohǎo xué. Děng wǒ de xīhóngshì zhǎng chūlái le, qǐng nín lái chángchang.
options.text_en: Thank you, Uncle Sun! I'll study hard. When my tomatoes grow, I'll invite you to try them.
options.feedback: Grateful and promises reciprocity — perfect neighborly spirit.

options.text_zh: 好的，谢谢。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie.
options.text_en: Okay, thanks.
options.feedback: Polite but brief.

options.text_zh: 我怕我没耐心。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ pà wǒ méi nàixīn.
options.text_en: I'm afraid I don't have the patience.
options.feedback: Self-defeating — he just offered encouragement.

tree.cultural_note: Small gardens and balcony vegetable patches are treasured in Chinese urban life. Retired neighbors like Uncle Sun often become informal gardening teachers. Sharing seeds and produce strengthens community bonds. The advice about patience (耐心) in gardening often carries deeper life wisdom.

tree.setup: Your neighborhood is holding a Mid-Autumn Festival celebration in the community park. Your friend Xiao Zhang invites you to go together.
tree.setup_zh: 你们小区在社区公园举办中秋节活动。你的朋友小张邀请你一起去。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 今天晚上社区有中秋节活动，听说有猜灯谜、吃月饼，还可以一起赏月。你想去吗？
turns.text_pinyin: Jīntiān wǎnshang shèqū yǒu Zhōngqiū Jié huódòng, tīngshuō yǒu cāi dēngmí, chī yuèbǐng, hái kěyǐ yīqǐ shǎng yuè. Nǐ xiǎng qù ma?
turns.text_en: There's a Mid-Autumn Festival event in the community tonight — I heard there'll be lantern riddles, mooncakes, and moon-watching. Want to go?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the festival invitation.

options.text_zh: 当然想去！我最喜欢猜灯谜了。你知道几点开始吗？
options.text_pinyin: Dāngrán xiǎng qù! Wǒ zuì xǐhuan cāi dēngmí le. Nǐ zhīdào jǐ diǎn kāishǐ ma?
options.text_en: Of course! I love lantern riddles. Do you know what time it starts?
options.feedback: Enthusiastic and asks a practical follow-up.

options.text_zh: 好吧，去看看。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo ba, qù kànkan.
options.text_en: Okay, let's check it out.
options.feedback: Lukewarm — she's excited; matching her energy would be better.

options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢人多的活动。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ bú tài xǐhuan rén duō de huódòng.
options.text_en: I don't really like crowded events.
options.feedback: Declines a cultural experience with a friend.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 七点开始！我们早点去吧，好的月饼很快就被拿完了。去年的豆沙月饼特别好吃。你喜欢什么口味的月饼？
turns.text_pinyin: Qī diǎn kāishǐ! Wǒmen zǎo diǎn qù ba, hǎo de yuèbǐng hěn kuài jiù bèi ná wán le. Qùnián de dòushā yuèbǐng tèbié hǎochī. Nǐ xǐhuan shénme kǒuwèi de yuèbǐng?
turns.text_en: It starts at seven! Let's go early — the good mooncakes get taken quickly. Last year's red bean paste ones were especially good. What flavor mooncakes do you like?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Share your mooncake preference.

options.text_zh: 我喜欢莲蓉蛋黄的，甜甜的，里面还有咸蛋黄，味道很特别。豆沙的也不错！
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuan liánróng dànhuáng de, tiántián de, lǐmiàn hái yǒu xián dànhuáng, wèidào hěn tèbié. Dòushā de yě búcuò!
options.text_en: I like lotus paste with egg yolk — sweet with a salty yolk inside, really unique flavor. Red bean paste is good too!
options.feedback: Descriptive and enthusiastic — shows genuine enjoyment.

options.text_zh: 都行，我不挑。
options.text_pinyin: Dōu xíng, wǒ bù tiāo.
options.text_en: Any flavor, I'm not picky.
options.feedback: Easy-going but doesn't share a preference.

options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢吃月饼，太甜了。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ bú tài xǐhuan chī yuèbǐng, tài tián le.
options.text_en: I don't really like mooncakes — too sweet.
options.feedback: Negative about a central part of the festival.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 莲蓉蛋黄是经典！好，我们六点半出发，先去拿月饼，然后找个好位置赏月。今天天气很好，月亮一定很圆很亮。
turns.text_pinyin: Liánróng dànhuáng shì jīngdiǎn! Hǎo, wǒmen liù diǎn bàn chūfā, xiān qù ná yuèbǐng, ránhòu zhǎo ge hǎo wèizhi shǎng yuè. Jīntiān tiānqì hěn hǎo, yuèliang yīdìng hěn yuán hěn liàng.
turns.text_en: Lotus paste with egg yolk is a classic! Okay, let's leave at six thirty — get mooncakes first, then find a good spot for moon-watching. The weather's nice today, so the moon should be full and bright.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Express excitement about the evening.

options.text_zh: 太好了！吃着月饼看月亮，这就是中秋节最美的部分。我们走吧！
options.text_pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Chī zhe yuèbǐng kàn yuèliang, zhè jiù shì Zhōngqiū Jié zuì měi de bùfen. Wǒmen zǒu ba!
options.text_en: Wonderful! Eating mooncakes while watching the moon — that's the most beautiful part of Mid-Autumn Festival. Let's go!
options.feedback: Captures the festive spirit beautifully.

options.text_zh: 好的，走吧。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, zǒu ba.
options.text_en: Okay, let's go.
options.feedback: Fine but doesn't match the festive mood.

options.text_zh: 希望人不要太多。
options.text_pinyin: Xīwàng rén bú yào tài duō.
options.text_en: Hope it's not too crowded.
options.feedback: Focuses on a negative before it happens.

tree.cultural_note: The Mid-Autumn Festival (中秋节) is one of China's most important holidays, centered on family reunion, mooncakes, and moon-watching. Community celebrations bring neighbors together. Lantern riddles (猜灯谜) are a traditional activity. The full moon symbolizes family togetherness.

tree.setup: You and your friend Xiao Lin are sitting on a bench by the lake in the park. Autumn leaves are falling around you. Xiao Lin looks up at the trees and starts talking about seasons.
tree.setup_zh: 你和朋友小林坐在公园湖边的长椅上。秋天的树叶正在飘落。小林抬头看着树，开始聊季节。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你看这些叶子，红的、黄的、橘的，真好看。我最喜欢秋天了。你呢？你最喜欢什么季节？
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ kàn zhèxiē yèzi, hóng de, huáng de, jú de, zhēn hǎokàn. Wǒ zuì xǐhuan qiūtiān le. Nǐ ne? Nǐ zuì xǐhuan shénme jìjié?
turns.text_en: Look at these leaves — red, yellow, orange — so pretty. I love autumn the most. What about you? What's your favorite season?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Share your favorite season.

options.text_zh: 我最喜欢春天。到处都是花，空气新鲜，每次春天来了都特别开心。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ zuì xǐhuan chūntiān. Dàochù dōu shì huā, kōngqì xīnxiān, měi cì chūntiān lái le dōu tèbié kāixīn.
options.text_en: I like spring the most. Flowers everywhere, the air is fresh — every time spring comes I'm really happy.
options.feedback: Expressive and personal — paints a vivid picture of why you love spring.

options.text_zh: 我也喜欢秋天。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ yě xǐhuan qiūtiān.
options.text_en: I like autumn too.
options.feedback: Agreement but doesn't add your own perspective.

options.text_zh: 我没有特别喜欢的季节。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ méiyǒu tèbié xǐhuan de jìjié.
options.text_en: I don't have a particular favorite season.
options.feedback: Misses a chance to share and connect.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 春天也很美！但是我觉得秋天有一种特别的感觉——不热也不冷，而且看着叶子变颜色，感觉时间过得很慢。你觉得每个季节都有什么特别的地方吗？
turns.text_pinyin: Chūntiān yě hěn měi! Dànshì wǒ juéde qiūtiān yǒu yī zhǒng tèbié de gǎnjué — bú rè yě bù lěng, érqiě kàn zhe yèzi biàn yánsè, gǎnjué shíjiān guò de hěn màn. Nǐ juéde měi ge jìjié dōu yǒu shénme tèbié de dìfang ma?
turns.text_en: Spring is beautiful too! But I feel autumn has a special quality — not hot, not cold, and watching the leaves change color makes time feel slow. Do you think every season has something special?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Share something special about each season.

options.text_zh: 对啊。春天看花，夏天吃西瓜，秋天看树叶，冬天喝热茶。每个季节都挺好的。
options.text_pinyin: Duì a. Chūntiān kàn huā, xiàtiān chī xīguā, qiūtiān kàn shùyè, dōngtiān hē rè chá. Měi ge jìjié dōu tǐng hǎo de.
options.text_en: Yeah. Spring you watch flowers, summer eat watermelon, autumn enjoy the leaves, winter drink hot tea. Every season's got something.
options.feedback: And balanced — finds joy in every season.

options.text_zh: 大概吧，我没想过这个问题。
options.text_pinyin: Dàgài ba, wǒ méi xiǎng guò zhège wèntí.
options.text_en: Probably, I've never thought about it.
options.feedback: Honest but doesn't engage with the reflection.

options.text_zh: 夏天太热了，冬天太冷了，我觉得只有春天和秋天好。
options.text_pinyin: Xiàtiān tài rè le, dōngtiān tài lěng le, wǒ juéde zhǐyǒu chūntiān hé qiūtiān hǎo.
options.text_en: Summer is too hot, winter is too cold — I think only spring and autumn are good.
options.feedback: Opinionated but a bit negative about half the year.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你说得真好！我以前不喜欢冬天，但是后来发现冬天在家里看书喝茶确实很舒服。谢谢你，今天这个下午真开心。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ shuō de zhēn hǎo! Wǒ yǐqián bù xǐhuan dōngtiān, dànshì hòulái fāxiàn dōngtiān zài jiālǐ kàn shū hē chá quèshí hěn shūfu. Xièxie nǐ, jīntiān zhège xiàwǔ zhēn kāixīn.
turns.text_en: That's so well put! I used to not like winter, but later I found that reading and drinking tea at home in winter is actually really comfortable. Thank you — this afternoon has been so nice.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond warmly to close the conversation.

options.text_zh: 我也很开心。下次春天，我们再来这里看花吧。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ yě hěn kāixīn. Xià cì chūntiān, wǒmen zài lái zhèlǐ kàn huā ba.
options.text_en: I'm happy too. Next spring, let's come back here to see the flowers.
options.feedback: Warm and forward-looking — makes a gentle plan for the future.

options.text_zh: 嗯，今天确实不错。
options.text_pinyin: En, jīntiān quèshí búcuò.
options.text_en: Yeah, today was nice.
options.feedback: Agreeable but doesn't extend the warmth.

options.text_zh: 好了，该回家了。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo le, gāi huí jiā le.
options.text_en: Alright, time to head home.
options.feedback: Abrupt end to a gentle moment.

tree.cultural_note: Appreciating the changing seasons is deeply embedded in Chinese culture. Each season has its associated activities, foods, and feelings. The practice of sitting with a friend and simply watching nature — without needing to do anything — reflects the Chinese value of being present in the moment.

title: Rainy Day at the Noodle Shop

tree.setup: You duck into a small noodle shop to escape the rain. The shop owner, Boss Huang, is a cheerful man who loves chatting with customers.
tree.setup_zh: 你为了躲雨走进了一家小面馆。老板黄师傅是个爱聊天的开朗人。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 快进来！外面雨好大。来，坐这里，先喝杯热水暖暖身子。你要吃什么面？
turns.text_pinyin: Kuài jìnlái! Wàimiàn yǔ hǎo dà. Lái, zuò zhèlǐ, xiān hē bēi rè shuǐ nuǎnnuan shēnzi. Nǐ yào chī shénme miàn?
turns.text_en: Come in quick! It's pouring outside. Here, sit down, have some hot water to warm up first. What noodles would you like?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Order noodles and respond to his warmth.

options.text_zh: 谢谢老板！一碗牛肉面吧。这家店我路过很多次了，今天终于有机会来尝尝。
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie lǎobǎn! Yī wǎn niúròu miàn ba. Zhè jiā diàn wǒ lùguò hěn duō cì le, jīntiān zhōngyú yǒu jīhuì lái chángchang.
options.text_en: Thanks, boss! A bowl of beef noodles, please. I've walked past this shop many times — finally have a chance to try it today.
options.feedback: Friendly and gives him a compliment — great way to start.

options.text_zh: 牛肉面，不要辣。
options.text_pinyin: Niúròu miàn, bú yào là.
options.text_en: Beef noodles, no spice.
options.feedback: Clear order but no warmth.

options.text_zh: 有菜单吗？
options.text_pinyin: Yǒu càidān ma?
options.text_en: Do you have a menu?
options.feedback: Practical but misses the personal touch.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好嘞！我们家的牛肉面是用老汤慢慢炖的，味道特别香。你等一下，十分钟就好。这个天气吃碗热面最舒服了。
turns.text_pinyin: Hǎo lei! Wǒmen jiā de niúròu miàn shì yòng lǎo tāng mànmàn dùn de, wèidào tèbié xiāng. Nǐ děng yīxià, shí fēnzhōng jiù hǎo. Zhège tiānqì chī wǎn rè miàn zuì shūfu le.
turns.text_en: Coming right up! Our beef noodles use an old-recipe broth simmered slowly — especially fragrant. Just ten minutes. Nothing better than hot noodles on a day like this.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Continue the conversation while waiting.

options.text_zh: 老汤啊？那一定很有味道。黄师傅，您开这家店多久了？
options.text_pinyin: Lǎo tāng a? Nà yīdìng hěn yǒu wèidào. Huáng shīfu, nín kāi zhè jiā diàn duōjiǔ le?
options.text_en: Old-recipe broth? Must be really flavorful. Boss Huang, how long have you had this shop?
options.feedback: Shows interest in his craft and story.

options.text_zh: 好的，谢谢。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie.
options.text_en: Okay, thanks.
options.feedback: Polite but doesn't engage.

options.text_zh: 有没有Wi-Fi？
options.text_pinyin: Yǒu méiyǒu Wi-Fi?
options.text_en: Do you have Wi-Fi?
options.feedback: Practical but ignores the personal moment.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 快二十年了！这条街变了很多，但是来吃面的老客人还是那些人。下雨天来的人最多，大家都喜欢躲进来吃碗热的。来，面好了！
turns.text_pinyin: Kuài èrshí nián le! Zhè tiáo jiē biàn le hěn duō, dànshì lái chī miàn de lǎo kèrén háishi nàxiē rén. Xià yǔ tiān lái de rén zuì duō, dàjiā dōu xǐhuan duǒ jìnlái chī wǎn rè de. Lái, miàn hǎo le!
turns.text_en: Almost twenty years! This street has changed a lot, but the regular customers are still the same people. Rainy days bring the most people — everyone likes to duck in for a hot bowl. Here, noodles are ready!

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond after tasting the noodles.

options.text_zh: 哇，真好吃！汤头特别鲜。难怪这么多年了客人还是那么多。我以后一定常来。
options.text_pinyin: Wā, zhēn hǎochī! Tāngtóu tèbié xiān. Nánguài zhème duō nián le kèrén háishi nàme duō. Wǒ yǐhòu yīdìng cháng lái.
options.text_en: Wow, it's delicious! The broth is so savory. No wonder you still have so many customers after all these years. I'll definitely come back often.
options.feedback: Genuine appreciation that connects taste to his dedication.

options.text_zh: 不错。
options.text_pinyin: Búcuò.
options.text_en: Not bad.
options.feedback: Understated — he'd appreciate more warmth.

options.text_zh: 能不能多加点肉？
options.text_pinyin: Néng bù néng duō jiā diǎn ròu?
options.text_en: Can you add more meat?
options.feedback: Requesting more before even finishing — seems ungrateful.

tree.cultural_note: Small neighborhood noodle shops are pillars of Chinese community life. Many have been run by the same family for decades. The phrase 「老汤」 refers to a broth recipe passed down and slowly developed over years — a source of pride for any noodle shop owner.

tree.setup: You go to the community package pickup station. The attendant, Xiao Wu, is sorting through a mountain of boxes. You see a familiar neighbor, Auntie Zhou, also picking up packages.
tree.setup_zh: 你去社区快递站取快递。工作人员小吴正在整理一堆箱子。你看到邻居周阿姨也在取快递。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 哎，你也来取快递啊？我买了一个新茶壶，等了三天终于到了。你买了什么？
turns.text_pinyin: Āi, nǐ yě lái qǔ kuàidì a? Wǒ mǎi le yī ge xīn cháhú, děng le sān tiān zhōngyú dào le. Nǐ mǎi le shénme?
turns.text_en: Oh, you're picking up a package too? I bought a new teapot — waited three days and it's finally here. What did you buy?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Tell Auntie Zhou about your package.

options.text_zh: 我买了几本书，都是学中文用的。周阿姨，您喜欢喝茶啊？新茶壶是什么样的？
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ mǎi le jǐ běn shū, dōu shì xué Zhōngwén yòng de. Zhōu āyí, nín xǐhuan hē chá a? Xīn cháhú shì shénme yàng de?
options.text_en: I bought some books, all for studying Chinese. Auntie Zhou, you like tea? What does the new teapot look like?
options.feedback: Shares your purchase and asks about hers — balanced conversation.

options.text_zh: 就是一些东西。
options.text_pinyin: Jiù shì yīxiē dōngxi.
options.text_en: Just some stuff.
options.feedback: Vague and doesn't reciprocate her openness.

options.text_zh: 几本书。
options.text_pinyin: Jǐ běn shū.
options.text_en: Some books.
options.feedback: Brief — could say more.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 学中文的书？你真用功！新茶壶是紫砂的，泡功夫茶特别好。以后你来我家，我泡好茶给你喝，我们可以一边喝茶一边练习中文。
turns.text_pinyin: Xué Zhōngwén de shū? Nǐ zhēn yònggōng! Xīn cháhú shì zǐshā de, pào gōngfu chá tèbié hǎo. Yǐhòu nǐ lái wǒ jiā, wǒ pào hǎo chá gěi nǐ hē, wǒmen kěyǐ yībiān hē chá yībiān liànxí Zhōngwén.
turns.text_en: Chinese study books? How diligent! The new teapot is Yixing purple clay — perfect for gongfu tea. Come to my place sometime, I'll brew good tea for you, and we can practice Chinese over tea.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her offer.

options.text_zh: 那太好了！我一直想学怎么泡功夫茶。谢谢周阿姨，我周末有空就过来。
options.text_pinyin: Nà tài hǎo le! Wǒ yīzhí xiǎng xué zěnme pào gōngfu chá. Xièxie Zhōu āyí, wǒ zhōumò yǒu kòng jiù guòlái.
options.text_en: That would be wonderful! I've always wanted to learn how to brew gongfu tea. Thank you, Auntie Zhou — I'll come over this weekend if I'm free.
options.feedback: Eager and grateful — combines learning tea with language practice.

options.text_zh: 好的，有时间再说吧。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, yǒu shíjiān zài shuō ba.
options.text_en: Sure, let's talk about it when I have time.
options.feedback: Non-committal — she's being generous.

options.text_zh: 我不太会喝茶。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ bú tài huì hē chá.
options.text_en: I'm not really into tea.
options.feedback: Declines a warm cultural exchange.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 太好了！我还有一些好的铁观音，泡出来特别香。那周六下午三点吧？我准备一些小点心。
turns.text_pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Wǒ hái yǒu yīxiē hǎo de Tiěguānyīn, pào chūlái tèbié xiāng. Nà zhōuliù xiàwǔ sān diǎn ba? Wǒ zhǔnbèi yīxiē xiǎo diǎnxīn.
turns.text_en: Wonderful! I also have some good Tieguanyin — brews with a lovely aroma. How about Saturday afternoon at three? I'll prepare some little snacks.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Confirm the plan.

options.text_zh: 三点没问题！我带一些水果过来。谢谢周阿姨，周六见！
options.text_pinyin: Sān diǎn méi wèntí! Wǒ dài yīxiē shuǐguǒ guòlái. Xièxie Zhōu āyí, zhōuliù jiàn!
options.text_en: Three works! I'll bring some fruit. Thank you, Auntie Zhou — see you Saturday!
options.feedback: Offers to bring something — good reciprocity.

options.text_zh: 好的，周六见。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, zhōuliù jiàn.
options.text_en: Okay, see you Saturday.
options.feedback: Confirms but doesn't offer to bring anything.

options.text_zh: 不用准备点心，我不吃零食。
options.text_pinyin: Bú yòng zhǔnbèi diǎnxīn, wǒ bù chī língshí.
options.text_en: No need for snacks, I don't eat them.
options.feedback: Declines her hospitality — culturally insensitive.

tree.cultural_note: Package pickup stations are social hubs in Chinese neighborhoods — neighbors run into each other and chat. Yixing purple clay (紫砂) teapots are prized for gongfu tea. Offering to share tea is a classic gesture of friendship, and bringing fruit when visiting is good etiquette.

tree.setup: You're walking in the park early in the morning and see a group of elderly people doing tai chi. One of them, Grandpa Wu, notices you watching and waves you over.
tree.setup_zh: 清晨你在公园散步，看到一群老人在打太极拳。其中一位吴爷爷看到你在看，向你招手。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 年轻人，早上好！你是不是对太极拳感兴趣？过来一起练吧！
turns.text_pinyin: Niánqīng rén, zǎoshang hǎo! Nǐ shì bú shì duì tàijí quán gǎn xìngqù? Guòlái yīqǐ liàn ba!
turns.text_en: Young person, good morning! Are you interested in tai chi? Come practice with us!

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to his invitation.

options.text_zh: 早上好！我看你们打得很好看，动作很慢很优美。我没学过，可以跟着学吗？
options.text_pinyin: Zǎoshang hǎo! Wǒ kàn nǐmen dǎ de hěn hǎokàn, dòngzuò hěn màn hěn yōuměi. Wǒ méi xué guò, kěyǐ gēn zhe xué ma?
options.text_en: Good morning! You all look wonderful — the movements are so slow and graceful. I've never learned — can I follow along?
options.feedback: Complimentary and humble — ideal approach.

options.text_zh: 我只是路过。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ zhǐ shì lùguò.
options.text_en: I'm just passing by.
options.feedback: Declines but not rudely.

options.text_zh: 太极拳不是很慢吗？能锻炼身体吗？
options.text_pinyin: Tàijí quán bú shì hěn màn ma? Néng duànliàn shēntǐ ma?
options.text_en: Isn't tai chi really slow? Does it actually exercise the body?
options.feedback: Skeptical tone is disrespectful to practitioners.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 当然可以！太极拳看起来慢，但是每个动作都在锻炼身体。你跟着我做——先站好，两只脚分开，慢慢举起手……对，就是这样。
turns.text_pinyin: Dāngrán kěyǐ! Tàijí quán kàn qǐlái màn, dànshì měi ge dòngzuò dōu zài duànliàn shēntǐ. Nǐ gēn zhe wǒ zuò — xiān zhàn hǎo, liǎng zhī jiǎo fēnkāi, mànmàn jǔ qǐ shǒu…… duì, jiù shì zhèyàng.
turns.text_en: Of course! Tai chi looks slow, but every movement exercises the body. Follow me — first stand properly, feet apart, slowly raise your hands... yes, just like that.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond while learning the movements.

options.text_zh: 看起来简单，做起来不容易啊！吴爷爷，您练了多久了？
options.text_pinyin: Kàn qǐlái jiǎndān, zuò qǐlái bù róngyì a! Wú yéye, nín liàn le duōjiǔ le?
options.text_en: It looks simple but it's not easy to do! Grandpa Wu, how long have you been practicing?
options.feedback: Honest about the difficulty and shows respect for his experience.

options.text_zh: 我做得对吗？
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ zuò de duì ma?
options.text_en: Am I doing it right?
options.feedback: Asks for feedback but doesn't engage further.

options.text_zh: 这个太难了，我做不了。
options.text_pinyin: Zhège tài nán le, wǒ zuò bù liǎo.
options.text_en: This is too hard, I can't do it.
options.feedback: Gives up too quickly.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 我练了三十多年了！一开始谁都觉得难，慢慢来就好了。我们每天早上六点半在这里练，你要是想学，随时过来。来得多了，自然就会了。
turns.text_pinyin: Wǒ liàn le sānshí duō nián le! Yī kāishǐ shuí dōu juéde nán, mànmàn lái jiù hǎo le. Wǒmen měi tiān zǎoshang liù diǎn bàn zài zhèlǐ liàn, nǐ yàoshi xiǎng xué, suíshí guòlái. Lái de duō le, zìrán jiù huì le.
turns.text_en: Over thirty years! At first everyone finds it hard — take it slowly and it'll come. We practice here every morning at six thirty. If you want to learn, come anytime. Come often enough and you'll naturally get it.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Thank him and respond.

options.text_zh: 谢谢吴爷爷！三十年，真了不起。那我明天早上也来，可以吗？
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie Wú yéye! Sānshí nián, zhēn liǎobuqǐ. Nà wǒ míngtiān zǎoshang yě lái, kěyǐ ma?
options.text_en: Thank you, Grandpa Wu! Thirty years — that's amazing. I'll come tomorrow morning too, okay?
options.feedback: Expresses admiration and commits to returning — shows sincerity.

options.text_zh: 谢谢，我考虑考虑。
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie, wǒ kǎolǜ kǎolǜ.
options.text_en: Thanks, I'll think about it.
options.feedback: Non-committal.

options.text_zh: 六点半太早了。
options.text_pinyin: Liù diǎn bàn tài zǎo le.
options.text_en: Six thirty is too early.
options.feedback: Focuses on the difficulty rather than the opportunity.

tree.cultural_note: Early morning tai chi in parks is a beloved tradition across China. Groups welcome newcomers warmly. The phrase 「来得多了，自然就会了」 (come often enough and you'll get it) reflects the Chinese learning philosophy of patient repetition over time.

tree.setup: You stop at the neighborhood fruit stand. The vendor, Sister Liu, is arranging fresh strawberries. The fruit looks beautiful in the afternoon sun.
tree.setup_zh: 你在小区门口的水果摊前停下。摊主刘姐正在摆放新鲜的草莓。下午的阳光下水果看起来很美。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 来看看！今天的草莓特别新鲜，早上刚从农场运过来的。你要不要尝一个？
turns.text_pinyin: Lái kànkan! Jīntiān de cǎoméi tèbié xīnxiān, zǎoshang gāng cóng nóngchǎng yùn guòlái de. Nǐ yào bú yào cháng yī ge?
turns.text_en: Come have a look! Today's strawberries are really fresh — just delivered from the farm this morning. Want to try one?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the offer to try a strawberry.

options.text_zh: 好啊！哇，真甜。这个季节的草莓最好吃了。多少钱一斤？
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo a! Wā, zhēn tián. Zhège jìjié de cǎoméi zuì hǎochī le. Duōshǎo qián yī jīn?
options.text_en: Sure! Wow, so sweet. Strawberries are the best this time of year. How much per jin?
options.feedback: Natural — tries, compliments, then asks the price.

options.text_zh: 多少钱？
options.text_pinyin: Duōshǎo qián?
options.text_en: How much?
options.feedback: Skips the tasting and goes straight to business.

options.text_zh: 不用了，我不吃草莓。
options.text_pinyin: Bú yòng le, wǒ bù chī cǎoméi.
options.text_en: No thanks, I don't eat strawberries.
options.feedback: Flat refusal at a fruit stand.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 十五块一斤。你要是买两斤，我给你便宜一点，二十五就行。你还想要别的水果吗？芒果也很好。
turns.text_pinyin: Shíwǔ kuài yī jīn. Nǐ yàoshi mǎi liǎng jīn, wǒ gěi nǐ piányi yīdiǎn, èrshíwǔ jiù xíng. Nǐ hái xiǎng yào bié de shuǐguǒ ma? Mángguǒ yě hěn hǎo.
turns.text_en: Fifteen yuan per jin. If you buy two jin, I'll give you a discount — just twenty-five. Want any other fruit? The mangoes are good too.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Decide what to buy.

options.text_zh: 那就买两斤草莓吧。再来一个芒果，今天给自己做一个水果沙拉。
options.text_pinyin: Nà jiù mǎi liǎng jīn cǎoméi ba. Zài lái yī ge mángguǒ, jīntiān gěi zìjǐ zuò yī ge shuǐguǒ shālā.
options.text_en: I'll take two jin of strawberries then. And one mango — I'll make myself a fruit salad today.
options.feedback: Takes the deal and shares a fun plan.

options.text_zh: 就一斤草莓吧。
options.text_pinyin: Jiù yī jīn cǎoméi ba.
options.text_en: Just one jin of strawberries.
options.feedback: Simple but doesn't take the deal.

options.text_zh: 太贵了，十块行不行？
options.text_pinyin: Tài guì le, shí kuài xíng bù xíng?
options.text_en: Too expensive — how about ten?
options.feedback: Haggling too aggressively for a neighborhood stand.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 水果沙拉！好主意！那我再送你几颗蓝莓吧，放在沙拉里好看又好吃。你是住这个小区的吧？以后常来啊！
turns.text_pinyin: Shuǐguǒ shālā! Hǎo zhǔyi! Nà wǒ zài sòng nǐ jǐ kē lánméi ba, fàng zài shālā lǐ hǎokàn yòu hǎochī. Nǐ shì zhù zhège xiǎoqū de ba? Yǐhòu cháng lái a!
turns.text_en: Fruit salad! Good idea! Let me throw in a few blueberries — they'll look pretty and taste great in the salad. You live in this neighborhood, right? Come by often!

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Thank her for the extra blueberries.

options.text_zh: 谢谢刘姐！你人太好了。以后买水果一定来你这里。
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie Liú jiě! Nǐ rén tài hǎo le. Yǐhòu mǎi shuǐguǒ yīdìng lái nǐ zhèlǐ.
options.text_en: Thank you, Sister Liu! You're so kind. I'll always come here for fruit from now on.
options.feedback: Warm and loyal — builds a lasting neighborhood relationship.

options.text_zh: 谢谢。
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie.
options.text_en: Thanks.
options.feedback: Polite but minimal.

options.text_zh: 不用了，够了。
options.text_pinyin: Bú yòng le, gòu le.
options.text_en: No need, that's enough.
options.feedback: Refuses a free gift — culturally awkward.

tree.cultural_note: Neighborhood fruit vendors often build relationships with regular customers by offering small extras (送你几个). Buying fruit is a daily ritual in China, and the friendly banter at fruit stands is a cornerstone of community life.

title: Inviting a Friend for Hot Pot

tree.setup: It's getting cold outside. You call your friend Xiao He to suggest having hot pot together this weekend.
tree.setup_zh: 天气越来越冷了。你打电话给朋友小何，想约他周末一起吃火锅。

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Invite Xiao He for hot pot.

options.text_zh: 小何，天冷了，我们周末一起去吃火锅吧！好久没吃了，特别想吃。
options.text_pinyin: Xiǎo Hé, tiān lěng le, wǒmen zhōumò yīqǐ qù chī huǒguō ba! Hǎojiǔ méi chī le, tèbié xiǎng chī.
options.text_en: Xiao He, it's getting cold — let's go have hot pot together this weekend! Haven't had it in ages, really craving it.
options.feedback: Natural and enthusiastic — connects the weather to the food perfectly.

options.text_zh: 周末有空吗？想吃火锅。
options.text_pinyin: Zhōumò yǒu kòng ma? Xiǎng chī huǒguō.
options.text_en: Free this weekend? Want to eat hot pot.
options.feedback: Gets to the point but not very warm.

options.text_zh: 我们应该出去吃饭。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒmen yīnggāi chūqù chīfàn.
options.text_en: We should go out to eat.
options.feedback: Vague — no specific plan.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 火锅！太好了！我也好久没吃了。你想吃辣的还是不辣的？上次那家四川火锅很好吃，要不要再去那里？
turns.text_pinyin: Huǒguō! Tài hǎo le! Wǒ yě hǎojiǔ méi chī le. Nǐ xiǎng chī là de háishi bú là de? Shàng cì nà jiā Sìchuān huǒguō hěn hǎochī, yào bú yào zài qù nàlǐ?
turns.text_en: Hot pot! Awesome! I haven't had it in ages either. Do you want spicy or non-spicy? That Sichuan hot pot place from last time was great — should we go back there?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Discuss the hot pot plan.

options.text_zh: 好啊，就去那家！我们点鸳鸯锅吧，一半辣一半不辣，这样两种都能吃到。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo a, jiù qù nà jiā! Wǒmen diǎn yuānyāng guō ba, yībàn là yībàn bú là, zhèyàng liǎng zhǒng dōu néng chī dào.
options.text_en: Sure, let's go there! We could get the split pot — half spicy, half mild — so we get both.
options.feedback: Practical and considerate — the split pot is a classic compromise.

options.text_zh: 我不能吃辣，你选吧。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ bù néng chī là, nǐ xuǎn ba.
options.text_en: I can't eat spicy — you choose.
options.feedback: States preference but defers entirely to him.

options.text_zh: 随便吧。
options.text_pinyin: Suíbiàn ba.
options.text_en: Whatever.
options.feedback: You invited him — you should participate in planning.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 鸳鸯锅好主意！那我们还叫小李和小张吧？人多吃火锅更开心。我来订位子，你约人，好不好？
turns.text_pinyin: Yuānyāng guō hǎo zhǔyi! Nà wǒmen hái jiào Xiǎo Lǐ hé Xiǎo Zhāng ba? Rén duō chī huǒguō gèng kāixīn. Wǒ lái dìng wèizi, nǐ yuē rén, hǎo bù hǎo?
turns.text_en: Split pot, good idea! Should we invite Xiao Li and Xiao Zhang too? More people makes hot pot more fun. I'll book the table, you invite the others — sound good?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the group plan.

options.text_zh: 没问题！我现在就给他们发消息。我们周六晚上六点怎么样？
options.text_pinyin: Méi wèntí! Wǒ xiànzài jiù gěi tāmen fā xiāoxi. Wǒmen zhōuliù wǎnshang liù diǎn zěnmeyàng?
options.text_en: No problem! I'll message them now. How about Saturday evening at six?
options.feedback: Takes action immediately and proposes a specific time — good organizer.

options.text_zh: 好的，你安排吧。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, nǐ ānpái ba.
options.text_en: Okay, you arrange it.
options.feedback: Leaves all the work to him when you should share.

options.text_zh: 人太多了吧？
options.text_pinyin: Rén tài duō le ba?
options.text_en: Isn't that too many people?
options.feedback: Hot pot is better with more people — this seems reluctant.

tree.cultural_note: Hot pot (火锅) is one of China's most social dining experiences — it's meant to be shared with friends and family around a communal pot. The 鸳鸯锅 (split pot) with half spicy and half mild is a popular compromise. Making plans for hot pot is a common way to gather friends during cold weather.

tree.setup: You find a small wallet on a bench in the park. An older woman comes hurrying back, looking frantic.
tree.setup_zh: 你在公园长椅上捡到一个小钱包。一位老太太急匆匆地跑回来，看起来很着急。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 哎呀，我的钱包！我刚才坐在这里，走的时候忘了。你看到一个红色的小钱包了吗？
turns.text_pinyin: Āiyā, wǒ de qiánbāo! Wǒ gāngcái zuò zài zhèlǐ, zǒu de shíhou wàng le. Nǐ kàndào yī ge hóngsè de xiǎo qiánbāo le ma?
turns.text_en: Oh no, my wallet! I was sitting here earlier and forgot it when I left. Did you see a small red wallet?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Return the wallet.

options.text_zh: 是这个吗？我刚在长椅上看到的。您看看里面的东西都在不在。
options.text_pinyin: Shì zhège ma? Wǒ gāng zài chángyǐ shàng kàndào de. Nín kànkan lǐmiàn de dōngxi dōu zài bú zài.
options.text_en: Is this it? I just found it on the bench. Please check if everything inside is still there.
options.feedback: Helpful and careful — asking her to check shows integrity.

options.text_zh: 给你。
options.text_pinyin: Gěi nǐ.
options.text_en: Here you go.
options.feedback: Returns it but too abruptly.

options.text_zh: 你先证明这是你的。
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ xiān zhèngmíng zhè shì nǐ de.
options.text_en: First prove it's yours.
options.feedback: She described it accurately and is clearly distressed — too suspicious.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 就是这个！谢天谢地！里面有我的身份证和医保卡，丢了可就麻烦了。谢谢你啊，你真是好人！
turns.text_pinyin: Jiù shì zhège! Xiètiān xièdì! Lǐmiàn yǒu wǒ de shēnfènzhèng hé yī bǎo kǎ, diū le kě jiù máfan le. Xièxie nǐ a, nǐ zhēn shì hǎo rén!
turns.text_en: That's it! Thank goodness! It has my ID card and medical insurance card — losing those would have been so much trouble. Thank you, you're truly a good person!

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her gratitude.

options.text_zh: 不客气，谁看到都会这样做的。您以后出门要小心一点，把钱包放在包里比较安全。
options.text_pinyin: Bú kèqi, shuí kàndào dōu huì zhèyàng zuò de. Nín yǐhòu chūmén yào xiǎoxīn yīdiǎn, bǎ qiánbāo fàng zài bāo lǐ bǐjiào ānquán.
options.text_en: You're welcome — anyone would do the same. Please be a bit more careful when you go out — keeping your wallet in your bag is safer.
options.feedback: Humble and gently caring — offers practical advice without being preachy.

options.text_zh: 没事，再见。
options.text_pinyin: Méi shì, zàijiàn.
options.text_en: It's nothing, bye.
options.feedback: Kind but rushed.

options.text_zh: 下次要小心啊！
options.text_pinyin: Xià cì yào xiǎoxīn a!
options.text_en: Be careful next time!
options.feedback: Slightly lecturing tone.

tree.cultural_note: Returning lost items is considered a basic virtue in Chinese culture. The humble response 「谁看到都会这样做的」 (anyone would do the same) reflects the value of modesty. ID cards and medical insurance cards are essential documents in daily Chinese life.

title: A Quiet Morning at the Lake

tree.setup: You're sitting by a small lake in the park, watching ducks swim. An older man with a fishing rod sits down nearby. He seems content just watching the water.
tree.setup_zh: 你坐在公园的小湖边，看鸭子游泳。一个拿着鱼竿的老人在附近坐下。他看起来很满足，只是在看着水面。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 今天早上真安静，连鸟叫声都比平时好听。你也喜欢来这里坐坐吗？
turns.text_pinyin: Jīntiān zǎoshang zhēn ānjìng, lián niǎo jiào shēng dōu bǐ píngshí hǎotīng. Nǐ yě xǐhuan lái zhèlǐ zuòzuo ma?
turns.text_en: It's so quiet this morning — even the birdsong sounds better than usual. Do you like coming here to sit too?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond about your connection to this spot.

options.text_zh: 嗯，我经常来。工作忙的时候，来这里坐一会儿，心情就好多了。这里的水和树让人放松。
options.text_pinyin: En, wǒ jīngcháng lái. Gōngzuò máng de shíhou, lái zhèlǐ zuò yīhuìr, xīnqíng jiù hǎo duō le. Zhèlǐ de shuǐ hé shù ràng rén fàngsōng.
options.text_en: Yeah, I come often. When work gets busy, sitting here for a while really improves my mood. The water and trees are so relaxing.
options.feedback: Personal and reflective — matches the peaceful atmosphere.

options.text_zh: 是的，这里不错。
options.text_pinyin: Shì de, zhèlǐ búcuò.
options.text_en: Yes, it's nice here.
options.feedback: Agreeable but brief.

options.text_zh: 我今天第一次来。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ jīntiān dì yī cì lái.
options.text_en: It's my first time here.
options.feedback: Honest but doesn't add to the mood.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 是啊，现在的年轻人太忙了。我退休以后，每天早上都来这里钓鱼。其实鱼钓不钓得到不重要，重要的是这段安静的时间。
turns.text_pinyin: Shì a, xiànzài de niánqīng rén tài máng le. Wǒ tuìxiū yǐhòu, měi tiān zǎoshang dōu lái zhèlǐ diào yú. Qíshí yú diào bù diào de dào bú zhòngyào, zhòngyào de shì zhè duàn ānjìng de shíjiān.
turns.text_en: Yeah, young people nowadays are too busy. Since I retired, I come fishing here every morning. Actually, whether I catch any fish doesn't matter — what matters is this quiet time.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to his philosophy about fishing.

options.text_zh: 我很喜欢您说的——重要的不是结果，是这个过程和这份安静。我们平时太在意结果了。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ hěn xǐhuan nín shuō de — zhòngyào de bú shì jiéguǒ, shì zhège guòchéng hé zhè fèn ānjìng. Wǒmen píngshí tài zàiyì jiéguǒ le.
options.text_en: I really like what you said — what matters isn't the result, but the process and the quiet. We usually care too much about results.
options.feedback: He nods slowly, as if you've put into words something he's felt for years.

options.text_zh: 你今天钓到鱼了吗？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ jīntiān diào dào yú le ma?
options.text_en: Did you catch any fish today?
options.feedback: He chuckles softly and shakes his head — you heard the words but not what he was saying.

options.text_zh: 退休以后一定很自由。
options.text_pinyin: Tuìxiū yǐhòu yīdìng hěn zìyóu.
options.text_en: Retirement must be very freeing.
options.feedback: Related but redirects from his insight.

tree.cultural_note: Fishing in Chinese culture is often associated with contemplation and patience, not just catching fish. The saying 「醉翁之意不在酒」 (the drunkard's intention is not in the wine) captures this — the activity is a vehicle for peace, not the goal itself.

tree.setup: Your neighbor, Grandma Zhao, is making tea eggs in the shared kitchen area. The fragrant smell draws you over.
tree.setup_zh: 你的邻居赵奶奶在公共厨房做茶叶蛋。香气吸引了你走过去。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 闻到香味了吧？我在煮茶叶蛋。你吃过茶叶蛋吗？
turns.text_pinyin: Wén dào xiāngwèi le ba? Wǒ zài zhǔ cháyè dàn. Nǐ chī guò cháyè dàn ma?
turns.text_en: You smelled it, didn't you? I'm making tea eggs. Have you ever had tea eggs?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond about tea eggs.

options.text_zh: 闻起来好香啊！我吃过，但是从来没自己做过。赵奶奶，您能教教我吗？
options.text_pinyin: Wén qǐlái hǎo xiāng a! Wǒ chī guò, dànshì cónglái méi zìjǐ zuò guò. Zhào nǎinai, nín néng jiāojiao wǒ ma?
options.text_en: It smells amazing! I've had them, but never made them myself. Grandma Zhao, could you teach me?
options.feedback: Eager to learn — elders love sharing their cooking knowledge.

options.text_zh: 吃过。
options.text_pinyin: Chī guò.
options.text_en: I have.
options.feedback: Brief — doesn't engage.

options.text_zh: 没吃过，看起来颜色很奇怪。
options.text_pinyin: Méi chī guò, kàn qǐlái yánsè hěn qíguài.
options.text_en: Never had them — they look a strange color.
options.feedback: Critical about something she's proud of.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 当然！很简单的。先把鸡蛋煮熟，然后轻轻敲一敲，让蛋壳有裂纹。再放进去跟茶叶、酱油、八角一起慢慢煮。煮得越久越入味。
turns.text_pinyin: Dāngrán! Hěn jiǎndān de. Xiān bǎ jīdàn zhǔ shú, ránhòu qīngqīng qiāo yī qiāo, ràng dànké yǒu lièwén. Zài fàng jìnqù gēn cháyè, jiàngyóu, bājiǎo yīqǐ mànmàn zhǔ. Zhǔ de yuè jiǔ yuè rù wèi.
turns.text_en: Of course! It's very simple. First boil the eggs, then gently tap them to crack the shells. Then put them back to simmer slowly with tea leaves, soy sauce, and star anise. The longer they cook, the more flavorful.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the cooking lesson.

options.text_zh: 原来这么简单！那个裂纹是不是就是让味道进去的？我以为很复杂呢。
options.text_pinyin: Yuánlái zhème jiǎndān! Nàge lièwén shì bú shì jiù shì ràng wèidào jìnqù de? Wǒ yǐwéi hěn fùzá ne.
options.text_en: So that's how it works! The cracks let the flavor in, right? I thought it was much more complicated.
options.feedback: Shows understanding and genuine learning.

options.text_zh: 要煮多久？
options.text_pinyin: Yào zhǔ duōjiǔ?
options.text_en: How long should they cook?
options.feedback: Practical question but misses the appreciation.

options.text_zh: 超市也有卖的吧？
options.text_pinyin: Chāoshì yě yǒu mài de ba?
options.text_en: They sell them at the supermarket, right?
options.feedback: Suggests buying instead of learning — dismisses her teaching.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 对！你很聪明。来，这几个煮好了，你先尝一个。下次我煮的时候叫你，我们一起做。
turns.text_pinyin: Duì! Nǐ hěn cōngming. Lái, zhè jǐ ge zhǔ hǎo le, nǐ xiān cháng yī ge. Xià cì wǒ zhǔ de shíhou jiào nǐ, wǒmen yīqǐ zuò.
turns.text_en: Exactly! You're clever. Here, these are done — try one first. Next time I make them, I'll call you and we'll do it together.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond after tasting.

options.text_zh: 哇，好好吃！又香又入味。赵奶奶，谢谢您！我期待下次一起做。
options.text_pinyin: Wā, hǎo hǎochī! Yòu xiāng yòu rù wèi. Zhào nǎinai, xièxie nín! Wǒ qīdài xià cì yīqǐ zuò.
options.text_en: Wow, so delicious! Fragrant and full of flavor. Thank you, Grandma Zhao! I look forward to making them together next time.
options.feedback: Genuine appreciation and excitement about next time.

options.text_zh: 味道不错。
options.text_pinyin: Wèidào búcuò.
options.text_en: Tastes good.
options.feedback: Understated for such a kind gesture.

options.text_zh: 有点咸了。
options.text_pinyin: Yǒudiǎn xián le.
options.text_en: A bit salty.
options.feedback: Critical of her cooking — rude.

tree.cultural_note: Tea eggs (茶叶蛋) are a beloved Chinese snack found everywhere from home kitchens to convenience stores. The marbled pattern from the cracked shells is both beautiful and functional. Learning to make them from an elder is a small but meaningful cultural exchange.

tree.setup: You borrowed a book from your friend Xiao Gao last month. You're meeting to return it at a café.
tree.setup_zh: 你上个月从朋友小高那里借了一本书。你们约在一家咖啡馆见面还书。

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Return the book and share your thoughts.

options.text_zh: 小高，书我看完了，还给你。写得真好！特别是中间那一段，让我感动了很久。
options.text_pinyin: Xiǎo Gāo, shū wǒ kàn wán le, huán gěi nǐ. Xiě de zhēn hǎo! Tèbié shì zhōngjiān nà yī duàn, ràng wǒ gǎndòng le hěn jiǔ.
options.text_en: Xiao Gao, I finished the book — here it is. It was really well-written! Especially that part in the middle — it moved me for a long time.
options.feedback: Returns the book with genuine feedback — shows you actually read and cared.

options.text_zh: 书还给你。
options.text_pinyin: Shū huán gěi nǐ.
options.text_en: Here's your book back.
options.feedback: Returns it but offers nothing about the reading experience.

options.text_zh: 我还没看完呢，但是先还给你吧。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ hái méi kàn wán ne, dànshì xiān huán gěi nǐ ba.
options.text_en: I haven't finished it yet, but I'll give it back.
options.feedback: Borrowed it a month ago and didn't finish — not ideal.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你也喜欢那一段啊？我看到那里的时候也哭了。这本书是我朋友推荐给我的，没想到这么好。你最近还想看什么书？
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ yě xǐhuan nà yī duàn a? Wǒ kàndào nàlǐ de shíhou yě kū le. Zhè běn shū shì wǒ péngyou tuījiàn gěi wǒ de, méi xiǎng dào zhème hǎo. Nǐ zuìjìn hái xiǎng kàn shénme shū?
turns.text_en: You liked that part too? I cried when I read it. A friend recommended this book to me — didn't expect it to be so good. What else do you want to read lately?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Talk about what you want to read next.

options.text_zh: 最近想看轻松的，有好笑的小说吗？这本太感动了，想换换心情。
options.text_pinyin: Zuìjìn xiǎng kàn qīngsōng de, yǒu hǎoxiào de xiǎoshuō ma? Zhè běn tài gǎndòng le, xiǎng huàn huàn xīnqíng.
options.text_en: I want something lighter — any funny novels? This one was so emotional, I need a change of mood.
options.feedback: Honest and fun — shows self-awareness about reading moods.

options.text_zh: 不知道，你有什么推荐吗？
options.text_pinyin: Bù zhīdào, nǐ yǒu shénme tuījiàn ma?
options.text_en: Not sure, do you have recommendations?
options.feedback: Relies on them entirely.

options.text_zh: 我可能不看书了，最近太忙了。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ kěnéng bú kàn shū le, zuìjìn tài máng le.
options.text_en: I might not read for a while — too busy.
options.feedback: Shuts down the book-sharing bond.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 我有一本！是一个日本作家写的，讲一只猫和它主人的故事，特别温馨也很好笑。我下次带给你。
turns.text_pinyin: Wǒ yǒu yī běn! Shì yī ge Rìběn zuòjiā xiě de, jiǎng yī zhī māo hé tā zhǔrén de gùshi, tèbié wēnxīn yě hěn hǎoxiào. Wǒ xià cì dài gěi nǐ.
turns.text_en: I have one! It's by a Japanese author — about a cat and its owner, very heartwarming and funny. I'll bring it next time.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the recommendation.

options.text_zh: 关于猫的故事我一定喜欢！谢谢小高，我们总是互相推荐好书，这种感觉真好。
options.text_pinyin: Guānyú māo de gùshi wǒ yīdìng xǐhuan! Xièxie Xiǎo Gāo, wǒmen zǒng shì hùxiāng tuījiàn hǎo shū, zhè zhǒng gǎnjué zhēn hǎo.
options.text_en: A cat story? I'll definitely love it! Thanks, Xiao Gao — I love how we always recommend good books to each other. It's a great feeling.
options.feedback: Appreciates both the book and the friendship built through reading.

options.text_zh: 好的，谢谢。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie.
options.text_en: Okay, thanks.
options.feedback: Polite but flat.

options.text_zh: 日本的书翻译得好不好？
options.text_pinyin: Rìběn de shū fānyì de hǎo bù hǎo?
options.text_en: Are Japanese books well-translated?
options.feedback: Skeptical instead of receptive.

tree.cultural_note: Borrowing and lending books is a meaningful form of friendship in China. Returning a book with thoughtful comments shows respect for the lender's taste. Book recommendations create ongoing connections between friends.

tree.setup: You're standing on a street corner looking at your phone map, trying to find a post office. A middle-aged man, Uncle Zhang, stops and insists on helping you with directions. He is very confident. He is also very wrong.
tree.setup_zh: 你站在路口看手机地图，想找邮局。一个中年大叔——张叔——停下来非要帮你指路。他很自信。他也完全错了。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 小伙子，找什么呢？邮局？我知道我知道！往前走，到红绿灯右转，再走五分钟就到了。我在这儿住了二十年了，闭着眼睛都能找到。
turns.text_pinyin: Xiǎohuǒzi, zhǎo shénme ne? Yóujú? Wǒ zhīdào wǒ zhīdào! Wǎng qián zǒu, dào hónglǜdēng yòu zhuǎn, zài zǒu wǔ fēnzhōng jiù dào le. Wǒ zài zhèr zhù le èrshí nián le, bì zhe yǎnjīng dōu néng zhǎodào.
turns.text_en: Hey kid, what are you looking for? Post office? I know, I know! Walk straight, turn right at the traffic light, five more minutes and you're there. I've lived here twenty years, I could find it with my eyes closed.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Your map says the post office is to the LEFT. But he's very sure of himself.

options.text_zh: 谢谢张叔！但是我的地图说邮局在左边……会不会是搬了？
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie Zhāng shū! Dànshì wǒ de dìtú shuō yóujú zài zuǒbiān ... huì bú huì shì bān le?
options.text_en: Thanks Uncle Zhang! But my map says the post office is to the left... could it have moved?
options.feedback: Gives him an exit by suggesting the post office moved, rather than saying he's wrong. He can save face.

options.text_zh: 不对，你说错了，地图上是往左走。
options.text_pinyin: Bú duì, nǐ shuō cuò le, dìtú shàng shì wǎng zuǒ zǒu.
options.text_en: That's wrong, you're mistaken, the map says go left.
options.feedback: He stopped to help you. Telling him he's flat-out wrong makes the kindness feel punished.

options.text_zh: 好的好的，右转，走五分钟。我记住了，谢谢！
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de hǎo de, yòu zhuǎn, zǒu wǔ fēnzhōng. Wǒ jì zhù le, xièxie!
options.text_en: Okay okay, turn right, five minutes. Got it, thanks!
options.feedback: You know it's wrong but you're accepting it anyway. You'll walk ten minutes in the wrong direction to avoid a two-second awkwardness.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 搬了？不可能！那个邮局一直在那儿的。你那个地图不准的，手机地图经常出错。你听我的，右转，走到一个卖水果的店，旁边就是。
turns.text_pinyin: Bān le? Bù kěnéng! Nàge yóujú yīzhí zài nàr de. Nǐ nàge dìtú bù zhǔn de, shǒujī dìtú jīngcháng chū cuò. Nǐ tīng wǒ de, yòu zhuǎn, zǒu dào yīge mài shuǐguǒ de diàn, pángbiān jiù shì.
turns.text_en: Moved? Impossible! That post office has always been there. Your map is wrong, phone maps make mistakes all the time. Listen to me — turn right, walk until you see a fruit shop, it's right next to it.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: He's adding specific details now, which makes him sound even more confident. But the details might be from a different place entirely.

options.text_zh: 水果店旁边的……张叔，那个会不会是快递站？我找的是邮局，绿色牌子的那种。
options.text_pinyin: Shuǐguǒ diàn pángbiān de ... Zhāng shū, nàge huì bú huì shì kuàidì zhàn? Wǒ zhǎo de shì yóujú, lǜsè páizi de nà zhǒng.
options.text_en: The one next to the fruit shop... Uncle Zhang, could that be a courier pickup point? I'm looking for the post office, the kind with the green sign.
options.feedback: You've found the source of the confusion without calling him wrong. He might be thinking of a completely different place.

options.text_zh: 张叔，我还是看地图吧，不麻烦你了。
options.text_pinyin: Zhāng shū, wǒ háishì kàn dìtú ba, bù máfan nǐ le.
options.text_en: Uncle Zhang, I'll just use the map, don't want to trouble you.
options.feedback: He's invested now. Dismissing his help this directly feels like 'thanks but I don't trust you,' which is exactly what you mean but probably shouldn't say.

options.text_zh: 好，那我先去右边看看，如果找不到再回来。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo, nà wǒ xiān qù yòubiān kànkan, rúguǒ zhǎo bú dào zài huílái.
options.text_en: Okay, I'll try going right first, if I can't find it I'll come back.
options.feedback: You're committing to a wrong direction as a compromise. Being polite is costing you twenty minutes of walking.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 快递站？……嗯……也许吧。哎呀，可能我记的是以前的。对对对，邮局好像去年搬到左边那条街了！你看，我就说我知道吧？左转，五分钟就到了。
turns.text_pinyin: Kuàidì zhàn? ... Ēn ... yěxǔ ba. Āiyā, kěnéng wǒ jì de shì yǐqián de. Duì duì duì, yóujú hǎoxiàng qùnián bān dào zuǒbiān nà tiáo jiē le! Nǐ kàn, wǒ jiù shuō wǒ zhīdào ba? Zuǒ zhuǎn, wǔ fēnzhōng jiù dào le.
turns.text_en: Courier station? ... Hmm... maybe. Oh, I might be thinking of the old one. Right right right, the post office moved to the street on the left last year! See, I told you I know? Turn left, five minutes and you're there.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: He's just done a full reversal and still claims he was right all along.

options.text_zh: 张叔，你太厉害了，连搬家以后的地址都知道。谢谢你！
options.text_pinyin: Zhāng shū, nǐ tài lìhai le, lián bānjiā yǐhòu de dìzhǐ dōu zhīdào. Xièxie nǐ!
options.text_en: Uncle Zhang, you're amazing, you even know the address after it moved. Thank you!
options.feedback: You let him land the plane with dignity intact. He walks away feeling helpful, you walk left. Everyone wins.

options.text_zh: 张叔，你刚才不是说右转吗？怎么变成左转了？
options.text_pinyin: Zhāng shū, nǐ gāngcái bú shì shuō yòu zhuǎn ma? Zěnme biàn chéng zuǒ zhuǎn le?
options.text_en: Uncle Zhang, didn't you just say turn right? How did it become turn left?
options.feedback: You're right about the contradiction, but pointing it out corners him. He was trying to help. Now he has to defend the inconsistency.

options.text_zh: 没关系，我自己用地图找吧，不用麻烦你了。
options.text_pinyin: Méi guānxi, wǒ zìjǐ yòng dìtú zhǎo ba, bú yòng máfan nǐ le.
options.text_en: It's fine, I'll find it myself with the map, no need to trouble you.
options.feedback: He just corrected himself to the right answer. Brushing him off now, after he finally got it right, misses the comic landing.

tree.cultural_note: Giving directions to strangers is a common social reflex in China, especially among older generations. The desire to help often outweighs the accuracy of the information. Admitting 'I don't know' can feel like losing face, so confident wrong answers are surprisingly common. The polite way to navigate this is to let the helper arrive at the right answer on their own terms, preserving their sense of being useful.

tree.setup: You go to the morning market to buy fresh vegetables. The vegetable vendor, Auntie Ma, greets you warmly. She always remembers her regular customers.
tree.setup_zh: 你去早市买新鲜蔬菜。卖菜的马阿姨热情地跟你打招呼。她总是记得老顾客。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 又来了！今天想买什么？青菜特别新鲜，豆腐也是今天早上刚做的。
turns.text_pinyin: Yòu lái le! Jīntiān xiǎng mǎi shénme? Qīngcài tèbié xīnxiān, dòufu yě shì jīntiān zǎoshang gāng zuò de.
turns.text_en: You're back! What would you like today? The greens are super fresh, and the tofu was just made this morning.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Tell her what you need.

options.text_zh: 马阿姨好！给我一把青菜和一块豆腐吧。今天晚上想做一个简单的青菜豆腐汤。
options.text_pinyin: Mǎ āyí hǎo! Gěi wǒ yī bǎ qīngcài hé yī kuài dòufu ba. Jīntiān wǎnshang xiǎng zuò yī ge jiǎndān de qīngcài dòufu tāng.
options.text_en: Hi Auntie Ma! I'll have some greens and a piece of tofu. Tonight I want to make a simple greens and tofu soup.
options.feedback: Friendly and shares your cooking plan — builds the relationship.

options.text_zh: 青菜和豆腐。
options.text_pinyin: Qīngcài hé dòufu.
options.text_en: Greens and tofu.
options.feedback: Gets the job done but no warmth.

options.text_zh: 有没有便宜一点的？
options.text_pinyin: Yǒu méiyǒu piányi yīdiǎn de?
options.text_en: Anything cheaper?
options.feedback: Focuses only on price in a relationship-building context.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 青菜豆腐汤，好喝又健康！你要是再加一点虾皮，味道会更鲜。我这里有，要不要一小包？
turns.text_pinyin: Qīngcài dòufu tāng, hǎohē yòu jiànkāng! Nǐ yàoshi zài jiā yīdiǎn xiāpí, wèidào huì gèng xiān. Wǒ zhèlǐ yǒu, yào bú yào yī xiǎo bāo?
turns.text_en: Greens and tofu soup — delicious and healthy! If you add some dried shrimp, it'll taste even richer. I have some here — want a small bag?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her cooking tip.

options.text_zh: 好主意！加虾皮我没想到。那来一小包吧。马阿姨，你比菜谱还有用！
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo zhǔyi! Jiā xiāpí wǒ méi xiǎng dào. Nà lái yī xiǎo bāo ba. Mǎ āyí, nǐ bǐ càipǔ hái yǒuyòng!
options.text_en: Good idea! I never thought of adding dried shrimp. I'll take a small bag. Auntie Ma, you're more useful than a recipe book!
options.feedback: Appreciative and playful — strengthens the bond.

options.text_zh: 好的，加一包。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, jiā yī bāo.
options.text_en: Okay, add a bag.
options.feedback: Takes the suggestion but no personal touch.

options.text_zh: 不用了，就这些。
options.text_pinyin: Bú yòng le, jiù zhèxiē.
options.text_en: No need, just these.
options.feedback: Practical but declines her helpful suggestion.

tree.cultural_note: Morning markets (早市) are the heart of daily food culture in China. Vendors build personal relationships with regular customers and often share cooking tips. The phrase 「老顾客」 (regular customer) carries warmth and mutual recognition.

tree.setup: A new small coffee shop has opened in your neighborhood. Your friend Xiao Qian wants to check it out with you on a lazy Sunday afternoon.
tree.setup_zh: 你们小区新开了一家小咖啡店。朋友小钱想在一个悠闲的周日下午和你一起去看看。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 这家店的装修好有意思！都是木头的桌子和椅子，墙上还有很多老照片。你觉得怎么样？
turns.text_pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn de zhuāngxiū hǎo yǒu yìsi! Dōu shì mùtou de zhuōzi hé yǐzi, qiáng shàng hái yǒu hěn duō lǎo zhàopiàn. Nǐ juéde zěnmeyàng?
turns.text_en: This shop's decor is so interesting! All wooden tables and chairs, and lots of old photos on the walls. What do you think?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Share your impression of the shop.

options.text_zh: 我很喜欢！感觉很温暖，像在朋友家一样。那些老照片拍的是这个街区以前的样子吧？
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ hěn xǐhuan! Gǎnjué hěn wēnnuǎn, xiàng zài péngyou jiā yīyàng. Nàxiē lǎo zhàopiàn pāi de shì zhège jiēqū yǐqián de yàngzi ba?
options.text_en: I really like it! It feels warm, like being at a friend's home. Those old photos must be of this neighborhood from before, right?
options.feedback: Observant and engaging — connects the decor to a deeper story.

options.text_zh: 还行吧。
options.text_pinyin: Hái xíng ba.
options.text_en: It's okay.
options.feedback: Lukewarm when she's excited.

options.text_zh: 有点小。
options.text_pinyin: Yǒudiǎn xiǎo.
options.text_en: It's a bit small.
options.feedback: Critical first impression.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好像是的！你看这张，是以前的菜市场，现在变成了停车场。真是太不一样了。你想喝什么？我请客。
turns.text_pinyin: Hǎoxiàng shì de! Nǐ kàn zhè zhāng, shì yǐqián de càishìchǎng, xiànzài biàn chéng le tíngchē chǎng. Zhēn shì tài bù yīyàng le. Nǐ xiǎng hē shénme? Wǒ qǐngkè.
turns.text_en: I think so! Look at this one — it used to be a vegetable market, now it's a parking lot. So different. What would you like to drink? My treat.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Order a drink.

options.text_zh: 谢谢你请客！我要一杯拿铁。下次我请你，我们可以试试他们的甜点。
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie nǐ qǐngkè! Wǒ yào yī bēi ná tiě. Xià cì wǒ qǐng nǐ, wǒmen kěyǐ shìshi tāmen de tiándiǎn.
options.text_en: Thanks for treating! I'll have a latte. Next time it's my treat — we can try their desserts.
options.feedback: Grateful and reciprocal — good friend dynamics.

options.text_zh: 拿铁。
options.text_pinyin: Ná tiě.
options.text_en: Latte.
options.feedback: Doesn't acknowledge her treating.

options.text_zh: 我自己付吧。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ zìjǐ fù ba.
options.text_en: I'll pay for myself.
options.feedback: Polite but refusing a friend's treat can seem stiff.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好！拿铁配甜点，下次一定来。这家店离我们这么近，以后周末又多了一个好地方了。
turns.text_pinyin: Hǎo! Ná tiě pèi tiándiǎn, xià cì yīdìng lái. Zhè jiā diàn lí wǒmen zhème jìn, yǐhòu zhōumò yòu duō le yī ge hǎo dìfang le.
turns.text_en: Great! Latte with dessert — definitely next time. This shop is so close to us — now we have another great spot for weekends.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond about the new spot.

options.text_zh: 对啊！以后我们可以每个周末来这里坐坐，聊聊天，看看书。太好了。
options.text_pinyin: Duì a! Yǐhòu wǒmen kěyǐ měi ge zhōumò lái zhèlǐ zuòzuo, liáoliao tiān, kànkan shū. Tài hǎo le.
options.text_en: Right! From now on we can come here every weekend to hang out, chat, read. How lovely.
options.feedback: Paints a gentle picture of a new weekend ritual.

options.text_zh: 希望他们能开得久一点。
options.text_pinyin: Xīwàng tāmen néng kāi de jiǔ yīdiǎn.
options.text_en: Hope they stay open for a while.
options.feedback: Slightly pessimistic but understandable concern.

options.text_zh: 嗯。
options.text_pinyin: En.
options.text_en: Mm.
options.feedback: Barely responds.

tree.cultural_note: New neighborhood cafés often become important social spaces in Chinese urban life. The tradition of 「我请客」 (I'll treat) followed by the expected reciprocal 「下次我请」 (next time my treat) is a natural rhythm of Chinese friendship.

tree.setup: You and your friend Xiao Fang are lying on the grass in the park on a warm afternoon, looking up at the clouds. The conversation turns to dreams and wishes.
tree.setup_zh: 温暖的下午，你和朋友小方躺在公园的草地上看云。聊天的话题转向了梦想和愿望。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你小时候有没有什么特别的梦想？我小时候想当画家，画很多很多美丽的风景。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ xiǎo shíhou yǒu méiyǒu shénme tèbié de mèngxiǎng? Wǒ xiǎo shíhou xiǎng dāng huàjiā, huà hěn duō hěn duō měilì de fēngjǐng.
turns.text_en: Did you have a special dream when you were little? I wanted to be a painter as a kid — painting lots and lots of beautiful scenery.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Share your childhood dream.

options.text_zh: 我小时候想开书店，每天被书包围着。现在做了别的工作，但还是爱看书。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ xiǎo shíhou xiǎng kāi shūdiàn, měi tiān bèi shū bāowéi zhe. Xiànzài zuò le bié de gōngzuò, dàn háishi ài kàn shū.
options.text_en: I wanted to open a bookstore as a kid, surrounded by books every day. Ended up doing something else, but I still love reading.
options.feedback: Shares openly and asks about her dream — a beautiful mutual exchange.

options.text_zh: 我没什么特别的梦想。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ méi shénme tèbié de mèngxiǎng.
options.text_en: I didn't have any particular dream.
options.feedback: Misses a chance to share something personal.

options.text_zh: 小时候的梦想都不现实。
options.text_pinyin: Xiǎo shíhou de mèngxiǎng dōu bú xiànshí.
options.text_en: Childhood dreams are all unrealistic.
options.feedback: Cynical — kills the warm mood.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 开书店多好啊！有时候还画一画，不过只是自己开心画的，不是专业的。我觉得梦想不一定要实现，保留着那份喜欢就很好了。
turns.text_pinyin: Kāi shūdiàn duō hǎo a! Yǒu shíhou hái huà yī huà, búguò zhǐ shì zìjǐ kāixīn huà de, bú shì zhuānyè de. Wǒ juéde mèngxiǎng bù yīdìng yào shíxiàn, bǎoliú zhe nà fèn xǐhuan jiù hěn hǎo le.
turns.text_en: A bookstore, how lovely! I still paint sometimes, just for fun — nothing professional. I think dreams don't have to come true; keeping that love alive is good enough.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her philosophy about dreams.

options.text_zh: 对。你还在画画，我还在看书，那份喜欢还在，就够了。
options.text_pinyin: Duì. Nǐ hái zài huàhuà, wǒ hái zài kàn shū, nà fèn xǐhuan hái zài, jiù gòu le.
options.text_en: Right. You're still painting, I'm still reading — that love's still there. That's enough.
options.feedback: And poetic — perfectly matches the gentle mood.

options.text_zh: 是啊，你说得对。
options.text_pinyin: Shì a, nǐ shuō de duì.
options.text_en: Yeah, you're right.
options.feedback: Agrees but doesn't add depth.

options.text_zh: 我觉得还是应该努力实现梦想。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ juéde háishi yīnggāi nǔlì shíxiàn mèngxiǎng.
options.text_en: I think you should still try to achieve your dreams.
options.feedback: Misses the nuance of her point about keeping the love alive.

tree.cultural_note: In Chinese culture, lying on grass and talking about dreams is a rare moment of openness among friends. The idea that 「保留着那份喜欢就很好了」 (keeping that love alive is enough) reflects a gentle, non-pressured approach to aspirations that is increasingly valued.

tree.setup: You see Grandma Sun struggling to carry heavy bags of groceries up the stairs to your apartment building. She lives on the third floor.
tree.setup_zh: 你看到孙奶奶提着很重的菜袋子，正在吃力地上楼。她住在三楼。

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Offer to help.

options.text_zh: 孙奶奶，我来帮您拎吧！这么重，您一个人不方便。
options.text_pinyin: Sūn nǎinai, wǒ lái bāng nín līn ba! Zhème zhòng, nín yī ge rén bù fāngbiàn.
options.text_en: Grandma Sun, let me help carry those! They're so heavy — it's hard for you alone.
options.feedback: Proactive and caring — exactly the right response.

options.text_zh: 您需要帮忙吗？
options.text_pinyin: Nín xūyào bāngmáng ma?
options.text_en: Do you need help?
options.feedback: Polite but gives her room to refuse out of politeness.

options.text_zh: （走过去，没说什么）
options.text_pinyin: (Zǒu guòqù, méi shuō shénme)
options.text_en: (Walk past without saying anything)
options.feedback: Missing an obvious chance to help.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 哎，太谢谢你了！今天买多了，一个人真提不动。你刚下班吧？累不累？
turns.text_pinyin: Āi, tài xièxie nǐ le! Jīntiān mǎi duō le, yī ge rén zhēn tí bù dòng. Nǐ gāng xiàbān ba? Lèi bú lèi?
turns.text_en: Oh, thank you so much! I bought too much today — really can't carry it all alone. Did you just get off work? Are you tired?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond while carrying the bags upstairs.

options.text_zh: 不累不累！这点东西很轻的。孙奶奶，您今天买了这么多，是要做什么好吃的吗？
options.text_pinyin: Bú lèi bú lèi! Zhè diǎn dōngxi hěn qīng de. Sūn nǎinai, nín jīntiān mǎi le zhème duō, shì yào zuò shénme hǎochī de ma?
options.text_en: Not tired at all! These are light. Grandma Sun, you bought so much — are you making something special?
options.feedback: Downplays the effort and shows interest — very warm.

options.text_zh: 没事，举手之劳。
options.text_pinyin: Méi shì, jǔshǒu zhī láo.
options.text_en: It's nothing, just a small favor.
options.feedback: Humble but doesn't extend the conversation.

options.text_zh: 是挺重的。
options.text_pinyin: Shì tǐng zhòng de.
options.text_en: They are pretty heavy.
options.feedback: Makes her feel guilty for accepting help.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 我孙子明天从北京回来，我给他做红烧排骨！他最爱吃奶奶做的菜了。你等一下，我给你拿几个苹果。
turns.text_pinyin: Wǒ sūnzi míngtiān cóng Běijīng huílái, wǒ gěi tā zuò hóngshāo páigǔ! Tā zuì ài chī nǎinai zuò de cài le. Nǐ děng yīxià, wǒ gěi nǐ ná jǐ ge píngguǒ.
turns.text_en: My grandson is coming back from Beijing tomorrow — I'm making braised ribs for him! He loves grandma's cooking. Wait a moment, let me get you some apples.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her wanting to give you apples.

options.text_zh: 谢谢孙奶奶！您孙子回来一定很开心。红烧排骨闻到味道就知道好吃了。
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie Sūn nǎinai! Nín sūnzi huílái yīdìng hěn kāixīn. Hóngshāo páigǔ wén dào wèidào jiù zhīdào hǎochī le.
options.text_en: Thank you, Grandma Sun! Your grandson must be so happy to come back. The braised ribs will smell delicious — you just know they'll be great.
options.feedback: Accepts gracefully and shares in her excitement about family.

options.text_zh: 不用了，太客气了。
options.text_pinyin: Bú yòng le, tài kèqi le.
options.text_en: No need, you're too kind.
options.feedback: Polite refusal — but in this context, accepting is more gracious.

options.text_zh: 好的，谢谢。再见。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie. Zàijiàn.
options.text_en: Okay, thanks. Bye.
options.feedback: Accepts but rushes off.

tree.cultural_note: Helping elderly neighbors with heavy items is a natural expectation in Chinese communities. The exchange — help carrying groceries, receive apples in return — represents the reciprocal kindness that holds neighborhoods together. Grandparents cooking for returning grandchildren is a deeply emotional family tradition.

tree.setup: After work, you walk to a small hill near your neighborhood. Your neighbor, Xiao Xu, is already sitting there, watching the sunset. She waves you over.
tree.setup_zh: 下班后，你走到小区附近的小山坡上。你的邻居小许已经坐在那里看日落了。她向你招手。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 来，坐这里！今天的日落特别漂亮，你看那边的云变成橘色了。
turns.text_pinyin: Lái, zuò zhèlǐ! Jīntiān de rìluò tèbié piàoliang, nǐ kàn nàbiān de yún biàn chéng jú sè le.
turns.text_en: Come, sit here! Today's sunset is especially beautiful — look, those clouds have turned orange.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the sunset.

options.text_zh: 哇，真美！我平时工作太忙，很少停下来看日落。谢谢你叫我过来。
options.text_pinyin: Wā, zhēn měi! Wǒ píngshí gōngzuò tài máng, hěn shǎo tíng xiàlái kàn rìluò. Xièxie nǐ jiào wǒ guòlái.
options.text_en: Wow, it's beautiful! I'm usually so busy with work, I rarely stop to watch sunsets. Thanks for calling me over.
options.feedback: Honest and appreciative — connects busyness with the need to pause.

options.text_zh: 嗯，不错。
options.text_pinyin: En, búcuò.
options.text_en: Mm, nice.
options.feedback: Brief for such a beautiful moment.

options.text_zh: 我只是路过。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ zhǐ shì lùguò.
options.text_en: I was just passing by.
options.feedback: Dismissive of her kind invitation.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 我也是最近才开始来这里的。之前压力很大，朋友建议我每天花十分钟看看天空。没想到真的有效果，心情好多了。
turns.text_pinyin: Wǒ yě shì zuìjìn cái kāishǐ lái zhèlǐ de. Zhīqián yālì hěn dà, péngyou jiànyì wǒ měi tiān huā shí fēnzhōng kànkan tiānkōng. Méi xiǎng dào zhēn de yǒu xiàoguǒ, xīnqíng hǎo duō le.
turns.text_en: I only started coming here recently too. I was under a lot of stress, and a friend suggested I spend ten minutes every day just looking at the sky. Didn't expect it to actually work — my mood improved a lot.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her experience.

options.text_zh: 十分钟看天空，这个方法好简单但是好有用。有时候我们只需要安静地看一看，就够了。
options.text_pinyin: Shí fēnzhōng kàn tiānkōng, zhège fāngfǎ hǎo jiǎndān dànshì hǎo yǒuyòng. Yǒu shíhou wǒmen zhǐ xūyào ānjìng de kàn yi kàn, jiù gòu le.
options.text_en: Ten minutes of sky-watching — such a simple method but so effective. Sometimes we just need to quietly look around, and that's enough.
options.feedback: Reflective and affirming — validates her experience.

options.text_zh: 压力大的话可以去运动。
options.text_pinyin: Yālì dà dehuà kěyǐ qù yùndòng.
options.text_en: If you're stressed, you could exercise.
options.feedback: Unsolicited advice when she's sharing something personal.

options.text_zh: 你现在还有压力吗？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ xiànzài hái yǒu yālì ma?
options.text_en: Are you still stressed?
options.feedback: Concerned but prying.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 就是！不需要做什么特别的事情。好了，太阳下去了，天开始暗了。明天同一个时间，你要不要再来？
turns.text_pinyin: Jiù shì! Bù xūyào zuò shénme tèbié de shìqing. Hǎo le, tàiyáng xià qù le, tiān kāishǐ àn le. Míngtiān tóng yī ge shíjiān, nǐ yào bú yào zài lái?
turns.text_en: Exactly! You don't need to do anything special. Well, the sun's gone down, it's getting dark. Same time tomorrow — want to come again?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her invitation for tomorrow.

options.text_zh: 好啊！那就做个约定——每天下班以后，一起来看十分钟的日落。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo a! Nà jiù zuò ge yuēdìng — měi tiān xiàbān yǐhòu, yīqǐ lái kàn shí fēnzhōng de rìluò.
options.text_en: Sure! Let's make it a deal — after work every day, we come watch the sunset for ten minutes together.
options.feedback: Turns a moment into a beautiful daily ritual.

options.text_zh: 看情况吧。
options.text_pinyin: Kàn qíngkuàng ba.
options.text_en: Depends on the situation.
options.feedback: Non-committal.

options.text_zh: 明天可能没时间。
options.text_pinyin: Míngtiān kěnéng méi shíjiān.
options.text_en: Might not have time tomorrow.
options.feedback: Breaks the gentle connection.

tree.cultural_note: Taking time to watch the sky is becoming an intentional wellness practice in Chinese cities, where the pace of life can be overwhelming. Small neighborhood hills and rooftops serve as quiet retreats. Making a daily appointment with nature reflects a growing cultural shift toward mindfulness.

tree.setup: It starts raining as your classmate Xiao Bai is about to leave school. She forgot her umbrella.
tree.setup_zh: 放学时突然下雨了，你的同学小白忘带伞了。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 糟糕，又下雨了！我今天忘带伞了。你有伞吗？
turns.text_pinyin: Zāogāo, yòu xià yǔ le! Wǒ jīntiān wàng dài sǎn le. Nǐ yǒu sǎn ma?
turns.text_en: Oh no, it's raining again! I forgot my umbrella today. Do you have one?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her predicament.

options.text_zh: 我有！你拿去用吧，我家很近，跑几步就到了。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ yǒu! Nǐ ná qù yòng ba, wǒ jiā hěn jìn, pǎo jǐ bù jiù dào le.
options.text_en: I have one! Take it — my home is close, I can just run.
options.feedback: Selfless and warm — prioritizes her need.

options.text_zh: 我有，但是只有一把，我们一起撑吧。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ yǒu, dànshì zhǐ yǒu yī bǎ, wǒmen yīqǐ chēng ba.
options.text_en: I have one, but just one — let's share it.
options.feedback: Practical and friendly.

options.text_zh: 我也没带。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ yě méi dài.
options.text_en: I didn't bring one either.
options.feedback: Doesn't help at all.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你家真的近吗？别淋雨感冒了。要不我们一起撑你的伞，我送你到家再走？
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ jiā zhēn de jìn ma? Bié lín yǔ gǎnmào le. Yào bù wǒmen yīqǐ chēng nǐ de sǎn, wǒ sòng nǐ dào jiā zài zǒu?
turns.text_en: Is your home really close? Don't get wet and catch a cold. How about we share your umbrella — I'll walk you home first?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her suggestion.

options.text_zh: 好啊！那就一起走吧。路上我们还能聊聊天。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo a! Nà jiù yīqǐ zǒu ba. Lùshang wǒmen hái néng liáoliao tiān.
options.text_en: Sure! Let's walk together then. We can chat on the way.
options.feedback: Turns a rainy inconvenience into quality time.

options.text_zh: 不用了，我真的没关系。
options.text_pinyin: Bú yòng le, wǒ zhēn de méi guānxi.
options.text_en: No need, I'm really fine.
options.feedback: Stubbornly independent.

options.text_zh: 好吧。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo ba.
options.text_en: Okay.
