options.feedback: Accepts but without warmth.

tree.cultural_note: Sharing an umbrella (同撑一把伞) is a classic image of friendship and care in Chinese culture. Offering your umbrella to someone else, even at the cost of getting wet yourself, is considered a natural and admirable act of kindness.

tree.setup: Your friend Xiao Sun is sick with a cold. You decide to bring her some homemade congee.
tree.setup_zh: 你的朋友小孙感冒了。你决定给她送一些自己做的粥。

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Arrive at her door with the congee.

options.text_zh: 小孙，我给你熬了一碗皮蛋瘦肉粥。生病了要好好吃东西，喝点热的会舒服一些。
options.text_pinyin: Xiǎo Sūn, wǒ gěi nǐ áo le yī wǎn pídàn shòuròu zhōu. Shēngbìng le yào hǎohǎo chī dōngxi, hē diǎn rè de huì shūfu yīxiē.
options.text_en: Xiao Sun, I made you a bowl of century egg and pork congee. You need to eat well when you're sick — something hot will make you feel better.
options.feedback: Caring and practical — brings food and gentle advice.

options.text_zh: 这是给你的粥。
options.text_pinyin: Zhè shì gěi nǐ de zhōu.
options.text_en: This is congee for you.
options.feedback: Gives the food but with little warmth.

options.text_zh: 你好点了吗？我路过就来看看。
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ hǎo diǎn le ma? Wǒ lùguò jiù lái kànkan.
options.text_en: Are you feeling better? I was just passing by.
options.feedback: Downplays the effort of cooking and coming.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你专门给我做的？太感动了！这两天我什么都不想吃，但是闻到粥的味道突然饿了。你真好。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ zhuānmén gěi wǒ zuò de? Tài gǎndòng le! Zhè liǎng tiān wǒ shénme dōu bù xiǎng chī, dànshì wén dào zhōu de wèidào tūrán è le. Nǐ zhēn hǎo.
turns.text_en: You made this specially for me? I'm so touched! I haven't wanted to eat anything these past two days, but smelling the congee made me suddenly hungry. You're so kind.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond warmly.

options.text_zh: 快趁热喝！你好好休息，有什么需要的随时告诉我。别着急上班，身体最重要。
options.text_pinyin: Kuài chèn rè hē! Nǐ hǎohǎo xiūxi, yǒu shénme xūyào de suíshí gàosu wǒ. Bié zháojí shàngbān, shēntǐ zuì zhòngyào.
options.text_en: Drink it while it's hot! Rest well — let me know if you need anything. Don't rush back to work; your health is most important.
options.feedback: Attentive and genuinely caring.

options.text_zh: 不客气，小事。
options.text_pinyin: Bú kèqi, xiǎo shì.
options.text_en: You're welcome, it's nothing.
options.feedback: Modest but doesn't express ongoing care.

options.text_zh: 你去看医生了吗？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ qù kàn yīshēng le ma?
options.text_en: Have you seen a doctor?
options.feedback: Practical but a bit clinical for the moment.

tree.cultural_note: Bringing congee (粥) to a sick friend is one of the most quintessential acts of caring in Chinese culture. 皮蛋瘦肉粥 (century egg and lean pork congee) is considered both nourishing and comforting. The phrase 「身体最重要」 is a common expression of genuine concern.

tree.setup: You and your friend Xiao Wei are in a small shop, looking for a birthday gift for your mutual friend Xiao Ting.
tree.setup_zh: 你和朋友小伟在一家小店里，给你们的好朋友小婷挑生日礼物。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 小婷的生日就是下周了！你觉得送什么好？她好像最近喜欢画画。
turns.text_pinyin: Xiǎo Tíng de shēngrì jiù shì xià zhōu le! Nǐ juéde sòng shénme hǎo? Tā hǎoxiàng zuìjìn xǐhuan huàhuà.
turns.text_en: Xiao Ting's birthday is next week! What do you think we should get her? She's been into painting lately.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Suggest a gift.

options.text_zh: 那我们送她一套水彩画笔吧？既实用又能让她开心。
options.text_pinyin: Nà wǒmen sòng tā yī tào shuǐcǎi huàbǐ ba? Jì shíyòng yòu néng ràng tā kāixīn.
options.text_en: How about a set of watercolor brushes? Both practical and something she'd enjoy.
options.feedback: — connects the gift to her interests.

options.text_zh: 送个红包最简单了。
options.text_pinyin: Sòng ge hóngbāo zuì jiǎndān le.
options.text_en: A red envelope is the simplest.
options.feedback: Easy but lacks personal thought.

options.text_zh: 你决定吧，我不太会选礼物。
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ juédìng ba, wǒ bú tài huì xuǎn lǐwù.
options.text_en: You decide, I'm not good at choosing gifts.
options.feedback: Defers entirely.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 水彩画笔好主意！你看这套怎么样？颜色好多，而且质量看起来不错。我们再买一个漂亮的笔记本配着送？
turns.text_pinyin: Shuǐcǎi huàbǐ hǎo zhǔyi! Nǐ kàn zhè tào zěnmeyàng? Yánsè hǎo duō, érqiě zhìliàng kàn qǐlái búcuò. Wǒmen zài mǎi yī ge piàoliang de bǐjìběn pèi zhe sòng?
turns.text_en: Watercolor brushes, great idea! How about this set? Lots of colors, and the quality looks good. Should we also get a nice notebook to go with it?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the combination idea.

options.text_zh: 完美！画笔加笔记本，她可以边画边写日记。我们再写一张卡片吧。
options.text_pinyin: Wánměi! Huàbǐ jiā bǐjìběn, tā kěyǐ biān huà biān xiě rìjì. Wǒmen zài xiě yī zhāng kǎpiàn ba.
options.text_en: Perfect! Brushes plus notebook — she can paint and journal at the same time. Let's also write a card.
options.feedback: Adds personal touch with a handwritten card — thoughtful.

options.text_zh: 好，就这些吧。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo, jiù zhèxiē ba.
options.text_en: Okay, just these.
options.feedback: Wraps up but skips the personal element.

options.text_zh: 会不会太多了？
options.text_pinyin: Huì bú huì tài duō le?
options.text_en: Isn't that too much?
options.feedback: Worries about cost for a friend's birthday.

tree.cultural_note: Choosing gifts that match a friend's hobbies shows genuine attention and care. In Chinese friendship culture, handwritten cards (贺卡) add a personal touch that money can't buy. Group gifting among friends is common and strengthens bonds.

title: Finding a Quiet Spot to Study

tree.setup: You're looking for a quiet place to study. Your classmate Xiao Jiang suggests the community library.
tree.setup_zh: 你在找一个安静的学习地方。同学小蒋建议去社区图书馆。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你要是想找安静的地方，社区图书馆很不错。人少、空调也好、还有免费的Wi-Fi。我昨天刚去过。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ yàoshi xiǎng zhǎo ānjìng de dìfang, shèqū túshūguǎn hěn búcuò. Rén shǎo, kōngtiáo yě hǎo, hái yǒu miǎnfèi de Wi-Fi. Wǒ zuótiān gāng qù guò.
turns.text_en: If you want somewhere quiet, the community library is great. Not many people, good air conditioning, and free Wi-Fi. I just went yesterday.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the suggestion.

options.text_zh: 听起来很好！在哪里啊？我怎么不知道我们社区有图书馆。你要不要一起去？
options.text_pinyin: Tīng qǐlái hěn hǎo! Zài nǎlǐ a? Wǒ zěnme bù zhīdào wǒmen shèqū yǒu túshūguǎn. Nǐ yào bú yào yīqǐ qù?
options.text_en: Sounds great! Where is it? I didn't even know our community had a library. Want to go together?
options.feedback: Enthusiastic and invites her to join — study partner energy.

options.text_zh: 好的，我去看看。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ qù kànkan.
options.text_en: Okay, I'll check it out.
options.feedback: Accepts but doesn't invite company.

options.text_zh: 我还是去咖啡馆吧。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ háishi qù kāfēi guǎn ba.
options.text_en: I'll just go to a café instead.
options.feedback: Dismisses her helpful suggestion.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好啊！我也正想去写论文。就在小区东门旁边，走路五分钟。我们下午两点出发怎么样？
turns.text_pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒ yě zhèng xiǎng qù xiě lùnwén. Jiù zài xiǎoqū dōngmén pángbiān, zǒulù wǔ fēnzhōng. Wǒmen xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn chūfā zěnmeyàng?
turns.text_en: Sure! I also need to work on my thesis. It's right next to the east gate of our complex — five minutes' walk. How about we leave at two this afternoon?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Confirm the study plan.

options.text_zh: 两点没问题！我带一些零食和水，学累了我们可以休息一下。
options.text_pinyin: Liǎng diǎn méi wèntí! Wǒ dài yīxiē língshí hé shuǐ, xué lèi le wǒmen kěyǐ xiūxi yīxià.
options.text_en: Two works! I'll bring snacks and water — when we get tired, we can take a break.
options.feedback: Preparation — good study buddy.

options.text_zh: 好的，两点见。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, liǎng diǎn jiàn.
options.text_en: Okay, see you at two.
options.feedback: Confirms but no extras.

options.text_zh: 我可能会迟到。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ kěnéng huì chídào.
options.text_en: I might be late.
options.feedback: Already signaling unreliability.

tree.cultural_note: Community libraries (社区图书馆) are quiet, free havens for students and self-learners in Chinese neighborhoods. Studying together with friends — bringing snacks, taking breaks — is a valued form of companionship. The mutual accountability helps both people stay focused.

tree.setup: The neighborhood committee organizes a community clean-up day. You meet your neighbor, Uncle Deng, while picking up trash in the park.
tree.setup_zh: 社区居委会组织大扫除。你在公园捡垃圾时遇到了邻居邓叔叔。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你也来参加大扫除啦！真好，年轻人能参加，我们都很高兴。这边的垃圾有点多，我们一起捡吧。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ yě lái cānjiā dà sǎochú la! Zhēn hǎo, niánqīng rén néng cānjiā, wǒmen dōu hěn gāoxìng. Zhè biān de lājī yǒudiǎn duō, wǒmen yīqǐ jiǎn ba.
turns.text_en: You came for the clean-up too! Great — we're all happy when young people join. There's quite a bit of trash over here, let's pick it up together.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond positively.

options.text_zh: 当然来了！大家一起动手，公园很快就干净了。邓叔叔，您每次都参加吗？
options.text_pinyin: Dāngrán lái le! Dàjiā yīqǐ dòngshǒu, gōngyuán hěn kuài jiù gānjìng le. Dèng shūshu, nín měi cì dōu cānjiā ma?
options.text_en: Of course! With everyone working together, the park will be clean in no time. Uncle Deng, do you come every time?
options.feedback: Enthusiastic and shows respect for his regular participation.

options.text_zh: 嗯，我来帮忙。
options.text_pinyin: En, wǒ lái bāngmáng.
options.text_en: Yeah, I'm here to help.
options.feedback: Good but brief.

options.text_zh: 居委会让我来的。
options.text_pinyin: Jūwěihuì ràng wǒ lái de.
options.text_en: The neighborhood committee told me to come.
options.feedback: Makes it sound forced rather than voluntary.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 每次都来！这个公园我天天在这里散步，当然要维护好。你看，捡完以后是不是漂亮多了？
turns.text_pinyin: Měi cì dōu lái! Zhège gōngyuán wǒ tiāntiān zài zhèlǐ sànbù, dāngrán yào wéihù hǎo. Nǐ kàn, jiǎn wán yǐhòu shì bú shì piàoliang duō le?
turns.text_en: Every time! I walk in this park every day, so of course I want to keep it nice. Look — isn't it much prettier after cleaning up?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the results of the clean-up.

options.text_zh: 确实！干净的公园让人心情都变好了。邓叔叔，您对这个社区真用心。我以后也常来帮忙。
options.text_pinyin: Quèshí! Gānjìng de gōngyuán ràng rén xīnqíng dōu biàn hǎo le. Dèng shūshu, nín duì zhège shèqū zhēn yòngxīn. Wǒ yǐhòu yě cháng lái bāngmáng.
options.text_en: Definitely! A clean park lifts everyone's spirits. Uncle Deng, you really care about this community. I'll come help more often too.
options.feedback: Appreciative and commits to future involvement.

options.text_zh: 是好看多了。
options.text_pinyin: Shì hǎokàn duō le.
options.text_en: It does look better.
options.feedback: Agrees but doesn't commit.

options.text_zh: 人们不应该乱扔垃圾。
options.text_pinyin: Rénmen bù yīnggāi luàn rēng lājī.
options.text_en: People shouldn't litter.
options.feedback: Complains rather than appreciates the effort.

tree.cultural_note: Community clean-up days (大扫除) are organized regularly in Chinese neighborhoods. Active participation shows community spirit. Elders who regularly volunteer earn deep respect. The phrase 「用心」 (to put one's heart into something) is a meaningful compliment.

tree.setup: It's late at night and you and your roommate Xiao Peng are both still awake, feeling hungry. You decide to go find a late-night snack.
tree.setup_zh: 深夜了，你和室友小鹏都还没睡，觉得饿了。你们决定去找点宵夜吃。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好饿啊！都十一点了，附近还有什么吃的？我想吃烧烤！
turns.text_pinyin: Hǎo è a! Dōu shíyī diǎn le, fùjìn hái yǒu shénme chī de? Wǒ xiǎng chī shāokǎo!
turns.text_en: So hungry! It's already eleven — is there anything to eat nearby? I want barbecue!

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Suggest a place or alternative.

options.text_zh: 巷子口那家烧烤摊应该还开着，走路十分钟。我也想吃烤串和啤酒！走吧！
options.text_pinyin: Xiàngzi kǒu nà jiā shāokǎo tān yīnggāi hái kāi zhe, zǒulù shí fēnzhōng. Wǒ yě xiǎng chī kǎochuàn hé píjiǔ! Zǒu ba!
options.text_en: That barbecue stall at the alley entrance should still be open — ten minutes' walk. I'm craving skewers and beer too! Let's go!
options.feedback: Matches his energy and has a plan.

options.text_zh: 我们煮方便面吧，不想出去。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒmen zhǔ fāngbiànmiàn ba, bù xiǎng chūqù.
options.text_en: Let's just make instant noodles — I don't want to go out.
options.feedback: Practical but less adventurous.

options.text_zh: 太晚了，明天再吃吧。
options.text_pinyin: Tài wǎn le, míngtiān zài chī ba.
options.text_en: It's too late — eat tomorrow.
options.feedback: Kills the spontaneous fun.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 太好了！烤串加啤酒，完美的组合。晚上坐在路边吃烧烤，这才是生活啊。你要吃什么？我要羊肉串和鸡翅。
turns.text_pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Kǎochuàn jiā píjiǔ, wánměi de zǔhé. Wǎnshang zuò zài lùbiān chī shāokǎo, zhè cái shì shēnghuó a. Nǐ yào chī shénme? Wǒ yào yángròu chuàn hé jīchì.
turns.text_en: Awesome! Skewers and beer — perfect combo. Sitting roadside eating barbecue at night — that's living. What do you want? I'm getting lamb skewers and chicken wings.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Order your food.

options.text_zh: 我要牛肉串、烤茄子，再来两瓶啤酒。今天辛苦了一天，值得犒劳一下自己。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ yào niúròu chuàn, kǎo qiézi, zài lái liǎng píng píjiǔ. Jīntiān xīnkǔ le yī tiān, zhíde kàoláo yīxià zìjǐ.
options.text_en: Beef skewers, grilled eggplant, and two beers. Worked hard all day — deserve to treat ourselves.
options.feedback: Embraces the moment and acknowledges the day's effort.

options.text_zh: 随便吧，你帮我点。
options.text_pinyin: Suíbiàn ba, nǐ bāng wǒ diǎn.
options.text_en: Whatever, you order for me.
options.feedback: Disengaged.

options.text_zh: 少点一些，太晚吃东西不好。
options.text_pinyin: Shǎo diǎn yīxiē, tài wǎn chī dōngxi bù hǎo.
options.text_en: Order less — eating this late isn't healthy.
options.feedback: Preachy during a fun outing.

tree.cultural_note: Late-night barbecue (宵夜烧烤) is a beloved social ritual in Chinese cities. Sitting at small plastic tables on the sidewalk, eating skewers and drinking beer, is considered one of life's simple pleasures. The phrase 「这才是生活」 (this is really living) captures the carefree spirit.

tree.setup: Your friend Xiao Tang just moved into a new apartment and invites you over to see it.
tree.setup_zh: 你的朋友小唐刚搬了新家，邀请你去看看。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 欢迎欢迎！来，进来看看！虽然不大，但我觉得很温馨。你觉得怎么样？
turns.text_pinyin: Huānyíng huānyíng! Lái, jìnlái kànkan! Suīrán bú dà, dàn wǒ juéde hěn wēnxīn. Nǐ juéde zěnmeyàng?
turns.text_en: Welcome, welcome! Come in, have a look! It's not big, but I think it's cozy. What do you think?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Compliment the new apartment.

options.text_zh: 虽然小，但布置得很好看！窗边的植物让房间很有生活气息。
options.text_pinyin: Suīrán xiǎo, dàn bùzhì de hěn hǎokàn! Chuāng biān de zhíwù ràng fángjiān hěn yǒu shēnghuó qìxi.
options.text_en: It's small but beautifully arranged! The plants by the window give the room such a lively feeling.
options.feedback: Specific compliment that shows genuine attention.

options.text_zh: 不错啊。
options.text_pinyin: Búcuò a.
options.text_en: Not bad.
options.feedback: Brief for someone excited to show you their home.

options.text_zh: 有点小吧？
options.text_pinyin: Yǒudiǎn xiǎo ba?
options.text_en: A bit small, isn't it?
options.feedback: She already acknowledged it's small — no need to repeat.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 谢谢！那些植物我搬家的时候特意从旧家带过来的。对了，你坐！我给你倒杯茶。搬过来以后你是第一个来的朋友。
turns.text_pinyin: Xièxie! Nàxiē zhíwù wǒ bānjiā de shíhou tèyì cóng jiù jiā dài guòlái de. Duìle, nǐ zuò! Wǒ gěi nǐ dào bēi chá. Bān guòlái yǐhòu nǐ shì dì yī ge lái de péngyou.
turns.text_en: Thanks! I specially brought those plants from my old place when I moved. Come, sit! I'll pour you some tea. You're the first friend to visit since I moved in.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to being her first visitor.

options.text_zh: 那我很荣幸！我带了个小花盆，配你窗边的植物。祝你在新家开心！
options.text_pinyin: Nà wǒ hěn róngxìng! Wǒ dài le ge xiǎo huāpén, pèi nǐ chuāng biān de zhíwù. Zhù nǐ zài xīn jiā kāixīn!
options.text_en: I'm honored! I brought a little flower pot to go with your window plants. Wishing you happiness in your new home!
options.feedback: Gift and warm wishes — perfect housewarming.

options.text_zh: 谢谢你请我来。
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie nǐ qǐng wǒ lái.
options.text_en: Thanks for inviting me.
options.feedback: Polite but misses the gifting opportunity.

options.text_zh: 你什么时候请大家来吃饭啊？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ shénme shíhou qǐng dàjiā lái chīfàn a?
options.text_en: When are you going to have everyone over for dinner?
options.feedback: Asks for more instead of appreciating the moment.

tree.cultural_note: Visiting a friend's new home (暖房 or 搬家做客) is an important social event. Bringing a small gift — especially something for the home — is expected and appreciated. Being the first visitor holds special significance in building the home's new social identity.

tree.setup: You and your friend Xiao Rong are walking through a night market, surrounded by the smells and sounds of street food vendors.
tree.setup_zh: 你和朋友小容在夜市里走着，到处都是小吃摊的香味和叫卖声。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 哇，好香！你看那边有臭豆腐、烤红薯、还有糖葫芦。你想先吃什么？
turns.text_pinyin: Wā, hǎo xiāng! Nǐ kàn nàbiān yǒu chòu dòufu, kǎo hóngshǔ, hái yǒu táng húlu. Nǐ xiǎng xiān chī shénme?
turns.text_en: Wow, it smells amazing! Look — they have stinky tofu, roasted sweet potato, and candied hawthorn. What do you want to try first?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Choose something to eat.

options.text_zh: 先来一份臭豆腐吧！闻起来臭，吃起来香。你敢不敢吃？
options.text_pinyin: Xiān lái yī fèn chòu dòufu ba! Wén qǐlái chòu, chī qǐlái xiāng. Nǐ gǎn bù gǎn chī?
options.text_en: Let's start with stinky tofu! Smells bad, tastes great. Dare to try?
options.feedback: Adventurous and playful — perfect night market energy.

options.text_zh: 烤红薯吧，安全一点。
options.text_pinyin: Kǎo hóngshǔ ba, ānquán yīdiǎn.
options.text_en: Sweet potato — safer choice.
options.feedback: Safe but less adventurous.

options.text_zh: 我不太想吃路边摊。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ bú tài xiǎng chī lùbiān tān.
options.text_en: I don't really want to eat at street stalls.
options.feedback: Kills the night market vibe.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 我当然敢！臭豆腐是我的最爱！老板，来两份臭豆腐，多放辣酱！然后我们再去买糖葫芦，边走边吃。
turns.text_pinyin: Wǒ dāngrán gǎn! Chòu dòufu shì wǒ de zuì ài! Lǎobǎn, lái liǎng fèn chòu dòufu, duō fàng làjiàng! Ránhòu wǒmen zài qù mǎi tánghúlu, biān zǒu biān chī.
turns.text_en: Of course I dare! Stinky tofu is my favorite! Boss, two servings of stinky tofu, extra spicy sauce! Then let's get candied hawthorn and eat as we walk.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the night market experience.

options.text_zh: 边走边吃，这就是逛夜市的乐趣！我好久没这么开心了。下次我们试那边的煎饼果子。
options.text_pinyin: Biān zǒu biān chī, zhè jiù shì guàng yèshì de lèqù! Wǒ hǎojiǔ méi zhème kāixīn le. Xià cì wǒmen shì nàbiān de jiānbing guǒzi.
options.text_en: Eating while walking — that's the joy of night markets! I haven't been this happy in a long time. Next time let's try the jianbing guozi over there.
options.feedback: Embraces the experience fully and plans ahead.

options.text_zh: 味道不错。
options.text_pinyin: Wèidào búcuò.
options.text_en: Tastes good.
options.feedback: Understated for a vibrant scene.

options.text_zh: 太油了。
options.text_pinyin: Tài yóu le.
options.text_en: Too oily.
options.feedback: Complaining during a fun outing.

tree.cultural_note: Night markets (夜市) are vibrant social spaces where friends bond over adventurous eating. Stinky tofu (臭豆腐) is the quintessential dare food — its paradox of smelling terrible but tasting wonderful is a source of endless conversation. 「边走边吃」 (eating while walking) captures the casual, carefree spirit of night market culture.

tree.setup: On a warm summer evening, you and your neighbor Xiao Yu discover fireflies in the community garden.
tree.setup_zh: 温暖的夏天晚上，你和邻居小雨在小区花园里发现了萤火虫。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 快看！那边有萤火虫！好久没看到了，城市里越来越少了。
turns.text_pinyin: Kuài kàn! Nàbiān yǒu yínghuǒchóng! Hǎojiǔ méi kàndào le, chéngshì lǐ yuè lái yuè shǎo le.
turns.text_en: Quick, look! Fireflies over there! It's been so long — you see fewer and fewer in the city.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to seeing the fireflies.

options.text_zh: 真的！好漂亮，像会飞的小星星。我小时候在乡下见过很多。
options.text_pinyin: Zhēn de! Hǎo piàoliang, xiàng huì fēi de xiǎo xīngxing. Wǒ xiǎo shíhou zài xiāngxià jiàn guò hěn duō.
options.text_en: Really! So pretty, like little flying stars. I saw tons in the countryside as a kid.
options.feedback: And nostalgic — connects the moment to childhood memories.

options.text_zh: 嗯，看到了。
options.text_pinyin: En, kàndào le.
options.text_en: Yeah, I see them.
options.feedback: Flat response to a magical moment.

options.text_zh: 别碰，萤火虫可能有毒。
options.text_pinyin: Bié pèng, yínghuǒchóng kěnéng yǒu dú.
options.text_en: Don't touch them, fireflies might be poisonous.
options.feedback: Kills the wonder.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 会飞的小星星，说得真好！我们小声一点，别吓到它们。坐在这里看一会儿吧？
turns.text_pinyin: Huì fēi de xiǎo xīngxing, shuō de zhēn hǎo! Wǒmen xiǎo shēng yīdiǎn, bié xià dào tāmen. Zuò zài zhèlǐ kàn yīhuìr ba?
turns.text_en: Tiny flying stars — what a lovely way to put it! Let's be quiet so we don't scare them. Sit here and watch for a while?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the quiet watching.

options.text_zh: 好，就在这里安静地坐一会儿。这种时刻不需要说话，看着就够了。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo, jiù zài zhèlǐ ānjìng de zuò yīhuìr. Zhè zhǒng shíkè bù xūyào shuōhuà, kàn zhe jiù gòu le.
options.text_en: Yes, let's just sit here quietly. Moments like these don't need words — just watching is enough.
options.feedback: Understands the value of shared silence in a beautiful moment.

options.text_zh: 好。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo.
options.text_en: Okay.
options.feedback: Brief but appropriate.

options.text_zh: 我们拍个照片吧！
options.text_pinyin: Wǒmen pāi ge zhàopiàn ba!
options.text_en: Let's take a photo!
options.feedback: Natural reaction but disrupts the quiet moment.

tree.cultural_note: Fireflies (萤火虫) are a powerful symbol of summer nostalgia in East Asian culture. Their decline in cities is often seen as a metaphor for lost innocence and nature. Sharing a quiet moment watching them reflects the Chinese aesthetic of 「静美」 — beauty in stillness.

tree.setup: You bump into your colleague Xiao Duan jogging in the park early in the morning. Neither of you knew the other exercised here.
tree.setup_zh: 清晨你在公园里跑步，碰到了同事小段也在慢跑。你们都不知道对方在这里锻炼。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 哎？你也在这里跑步啊！太巧了。你每天都来吗？
turns.text_pinyin: Āi? Nǐ yě zài zhèlǐ pǎobù a! Tài qiǎo le. Nǐ měi tiān dōu lái ma?
turns.text_en: Hey? You jog here too? What a coincidence! Do you come every day?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond about your exercise routine.

options.text_zh: 差不多每天都来！没想到你也在这里跑步。以后我们可以一起跑，有伴的话更有动力。
options.text_pinyin: Chàbuduō měi tiān dōu lái! Méi xiǎng dào nǐ yě zài zhèlǐ pǎobù. Yǐhòu wǒmen kěyǐ yīqǐ pǎo, yǒu bàn dehuà gèng yǒu dònglì.
options.text_en: Almost every day! Didn't expect you here. We could run together from now on — having company is more motivating.
options.feedback: Enthusiastic and suggests partnership.

options.text_zh: 偶尔来。
options.text_pinyin: Ǒu'ěr lái.
options.text_en: Occasionally.
options.feedback: Brief.

options.text_zh: 今天是第一次。
options.text_pinyin: Jīntiān shì dì yī cì.
options.text_en: First time today.
options.feedback: Honest but doesn't build.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好啊！一个人跑有时候真的很无聊。那我们每天早上七点在这个入口见？跑完还可以一起去旁边买早餐。
turns.text_pinyin: Hǎo a! Yī ge rén pǎo yǒu shíhou zhēn de hěn wúliáo. Nà wǒmen měi tiān zǎoshang qī diǎn zài zhège rùkǒu jiàn? Pǎo wán hái kěyǐ yīqǐ qù pángbiān mǎi zǎocān.
turns.text_en: Great! Running alone can get boring. So every morning at seven at this entrance? After running we can buy breakfast together nearby.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Confirm the morning routine.

options.text_zh: 太好了！跑步加早餐，完美的早晨。明天七点见！
options.text_pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Pǎobù jiā zǎocān, wánměi de zǎochén. Míngtiān qī diǎn jiàn!
options.text_en: Perfect! Jogging plus breakfast — the perfect morning. See you at seven tomorrow!
options.feedback: Enthusiastic about the new routine.

options.text_zh: 好的，七点见。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, qī diǎn jiàn.
options.text_en: Okay, seven o'clock.
options.feedback: Confirms without much energy.

options.text_zh: 七点有点早，七点半行吗？
options.text_pinyin: Qī diǎn yǒudiǎn zǎo, qī diǎn bàn xíng ma?
options.text_en: Seven is a bit early — how about seven thirty?
options.feedback: Negotiating is fine but less enthusiastic.

tree.cultural_note: Morning exercise in parks is deeply embedded in Chinese urban life. Running with a partner (跑友) is popular for mutual motivation. The combination of exercise followed by a shared breakfast creates a daily ritual that strengthens both health and friendship.

tree.setup: You're sitting on a park bench eating bread when pigeons gather around. A little girl with her grandmother watches excitedly.
tree.setup_zh: 你坐在公园长椅上吃面包，鸽子们围了过来。一个小女孩和她的奶奶在旁边兴奋地看着。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 哥哥，你在喂鸽子吗？我也想喂！可是我没有面包……
turns.text_pinyin: Gēge, nǐ zài wèi gēzi ma? Wǒ yě xiǎng wèi! Kěshì wǒ méiyǒu miànbāo……
turns.text_en: Big brother, are you feeding the pigeons? I want to feed them too! But I don't have any bread...

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the little girl.

options.text_zh: 来，给你一些面包。你慢慢地撕成小块，放在地上，鸽子就会过来了。
options.text_pinyin: Lái, gěi nǐ yīxiē miànbāo. Nǐ mànmàn de sī chéng xiǎo kuài, fàng zài dìshang, gēzi jiù huì guòlái le.
options.text_en: Here, have some bread. Tear it into small pieces slowly and put them on the ground — the pigeons will come.
options.feedback: Kind and patient — teaches her how to do it.

options.text_zh: 好啊。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo a.
options.text_en: Sure.
options.feedback: Shares but doesn't engage.

options.text_zh: 我的面包不多了。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ de miànbāo bù duō le.
options.text_en: I don't have much bread left.
options.feedback: Refuses a small child — harsh.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 谢谢你！你真是好心人。我孙女最喜欢小动物了。你经常来这里喂鸽子吗？
turns.text_pinyin: Xièxie nǐ! Nǐ zhēn shì hǎoxīn rén. Wǒ sūnnǚ zuì xǐhuan xiǎo dòngwù le. Nǐ jīngcháng lái zhèlǐ wèi gēzi ma?
turns.text_en: Thank you! You're such a kind person. My granddaughter loves little animals. Do you come here often to feed the pigeons?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Chat with the grandmother.

options.text_zh: 偶尔来。看到鸽子和小朋友在一起，心情就变得很好。您孙女好可爱！
options.text_pinyin: Ǒu'ěr lái. Kàndào gēzi hé xiǎo péngyou zài yīqǐ, xīnqíng jiù biàn de hěn hǎo. Nín sūnnǚ hǎo kě'ài!
options.text_en: Occasionally. Seeing pigeons and children together always brightens my mood. Your granddaughter is so cute!
options.feedback: Warm and connects the simple joys of the moment.

options.text_zh: 是的，有空就来。
options.text_pinyin: Shì de, yǒu kòng jiù lái.
options.text_en: Yes, whenever I'm free.
options.feedback: Answers but doesn't engage further.

options.text_zh: 偶尔。
options.text_pinyin: Ǒu'ěr.
options.text_en: Occasionally.
options.feedback: Minimal.

tree.cultural_note: Feeding pigeons in parks is a gentle intergenerational activity in China. Children calling young adults 「哥哥」 or 「姐姐」 is endearing and expected. Grandparents watching their grandchildren discover nature is one of the sweetest everyday scenes in Chinese life.

tree.setup: Your bike gets a flat tire near the community gate. The security guard, Uncle Guo, notices and comes to help.
tree.setup_zh: 你的自行车在小区门口爆胎了。保安郭叔叔看到了，走过来帮忙。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 车胎爆了啊？别着急，巷子口有一个修车的师傅，很便宜也很快。我先帮你把车推过去。
turns.text_pinyin: Chē tāi bào le a? Bié zháojí, xiàngzi kǒu yǒu yī ge xiū chē de shīfu, hěn piányi yě hěn kuài. Wǒ xiān bāng nǐ bǎ chē tuī guòqù.
turns.text_en: Flat tire? Don't worry — there's a bike repairman at the alley entrance, cheap and fast. Let me help you push the bike over.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to his help.

options.text_zh: 谢谢郭叔叔！还好有你在，不然我都不知道附近有修车的。太感谢了！
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie Guō shūshu! Háihǎo yǒu nǐ zài, bùrán wǒ dōu bù zhīdào fùjìn yǒu xiū chē de. Tài gǎnxiè le!
options.text_en: Thank you, Uncle Guo! Lucky you're here — otherwise I wouldn't even know there's a repairman nearby. Really grateful!
options.feedback: Genuinely grateful and acknowledges his local knowledge.

options.text_zh: 谢谢，我自己能推过去。
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie, wǒ zìjǐ néng tuī guòqù.
options.text_en: Thanks, I can push it there myself.
options.feedback: Refuses help when he's already offering.

options.text_zh: 唉，真倒霉。
options.text_pinyin: Āi, zhēn dǎoméi.
options.text_en: Sigh, so unlucky.
options.feedback: Focuses on bad luck instead of the help offered.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 客气什么！我天天在这里，这种事见多了。以后有什么事尽管来找我。这个小区的事我都清楚。
turns.text_pinyin: Kèqi shénme! Wǒ tiāntiān zài zhèlǐ, zhè zhǒng shì jiàn duō le. Yǐhòu yǒu shénme shì jǐnguǎn lái zhǎo wǒ. Zhège xiǎoqū de shì wǒ dōu qīngchǔ.
turns.text_en: No need for formality! I'm here every day — I've seen it all. If you ever need anything, just come find me. I know everything about this neighborhood.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond warmly.

options.text_zh: 郭叔叔，您是我们小区的宝藏！改天我给您带点茶叶，感谢您一直照顾大家。
options.text_pinyin: Guō shūshu, nín shì wǒmen xiǎoqū de bǎozàng! Gǎi tiān wǒ gěi nín dài diǎn cháyè, gǎnxiè nín yīzhí zhàogù dàjiā.
options.text_en: Uncle Guo, you're a treasure of our neighborhood! I'll bring you some tea leaves another day — thank you for always taking care of everyone.
options.feedback: Warm and plans a reciprocal gesture — perfect.

options.text_zh: 好的，谢谢。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie.
options.text_en: Okay, thanks.
options.feedback: Polite but brief.

options.text_zh: 好吧。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo ba.
options.text_en: Alright.
options.feedback: Barely acknowledges his kindness.

tree.cultural_note: Security guards (保安) are unsung heroes of Chinese community life. They know every resident, every repair shop, and every hidden shortcut. Calling someone a 「宝藏」 (treasure) is a warm modern compliment. Offering tea leaves as thanks is a classic gesture of gratitude.

tree.setup: Your neighborhood is holding a tree-planting event for Arbor Day. You're paired with a friendly retiree, Auntie Luo.
tree.setup_zh: 小区在植树节举办种树活动。你和一位友好的退休阿姨——罗阿姨分到了一组。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 我们一起种这棵桂花树吧！你先挖坑，我来扶着树苗，好不好？
turns.text_pinyin: Wǒmen yīqǐ zhòng zhè kē guìhuā shù ba! Nǐ xiān wā kēng, wǒ lái fú zhe shùmiáo, hǎo bù hǎo?
turns.text_en: Let's plant this osmanthus tree together! You dig the hole, I'll hold the sapling — okay?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond and start working.

options.text_zh: 好的！桂花树秋天开花一定很香。几年以后这里就变成小树林了。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de! Guìhuā shù qiūtiān kāihuā yīdìng hěn xiāng. Jǐ nián yǐhòu zhèlǐ jiù biàn chéng xiǎo shùlín le.
options.text_en: Okay! The osmanthus blooming in autumn will smell wonderful. In a few years this will be a little grove.
options.feedback: Enthusiastic and forward-looking — sees the future beauty.

options.text_zh: 好，我来挖。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ lái wā.
options.text_en: Okay, I'll dig.
options.feedback: Helpful but no conversation.

options.text_zh: 坑要挖多深？
options.text_pinyin: Kēng yào wā duō shēn?
options.text_en: How deep should the hole be?
options.feedback: Practical question but misses the heart of the moment.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 对！到时候秋天来这里散步，闻着桂花香，多美啊。我年轻的时候也种过很多树，现在那些树都长大了。种树就是这样——你种下去的时候是小苗，等你老了它就变成大树了。
turns.text_pinyin: Duì! Dào shíhou qiūtiān lái zhèlǐ sànbù, wén zhe guìhuā xiāng, duō měi a. Wǒ niánqīng de shíhou yě zhòng guò hěn duō shù, xiànzài nàxiē shù dōu zhǎng dà le. Zhòng shù jiù shì zhèyàng — nǐ zhòng xiàqù de shíhou shì xiǎo miáo, děng nǐ lǎo le tā jiù biàn chéng dà shù le.
turns.text_en: Right! Walking here in autumn, the osmanthus fragrance — how beautiful. When I was young I planted many trees too — they've all grown big now. That's how tree-planting works — you plant a seedling, and by the time you're old, it's become a big tree.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her reflection on time and trees.

options.text_zh: 种树就是给未来的礼物。罗阿姨，您以前种的树，我们都在享受呢。
options.text_pinyin: Zhòng shù jiù shì gěi wèilái de lǐwù. Luó āyí, nín yǐqián zhòng de shù, wǒmen dōu zài xiǎngshòu ne.
options.text_en: Planting trees is a gift for the future. Auntie Luo, the trees you planted — we're all enjoying them now.
options.feedback: Connects her past effort to present benefit — deeply respectful.

options.text_zh: 是啊，时间过得真快。
options.text_pinyin: Shì a, shíjiān guò de zhēn kuài.
options.text_en: Yeah, time really flies.
options.feedback: Generic response.

options.text_zh: 种好了！下一棵吧。
options.text_pinyin: Zhòng hǎo le! Xià yī kē ba.
options.text_en: Done! On to the next one.
options.feedback: Task-focused but misses the reflection.

tree.cultural_note: Arbor Day (植树节, March 12th) is widely celebrated in China with community planting events. Osmanthus (桂花) is cherished for its sweet autumn fragrance. The metaphor of trees growing with time reflects Chinese values of long-term thinking and leaving something for future generations.

tree.setup: You're at a small stationery shop, choosing a postcard to send to a friend who moved to another city.
tree.setup_zh: 你在一家小文具店里，挑一张明信片寄给搬去另一个城市的朋友。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你在找明信片啊？这些是我们最新的，有城市风景的、也有手绘的猫咪的。你要寄给谁？
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ zài zhǎo míngxìnpiàn a? Zhèxiē shì wǒmen zuì xīn de, yǒu chéngshì fēngjǐng de, yě yǒu shǒuhuì de māomī de. Nǐ yào jì gěi shuí?
turns.text_en: Looking for postcards? These are our newest — we have city scenery and hand-drawn cat ones. Who are you sending it to?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Tell her about your friend.

options.text_zh: 寄给好朋友，她搬到上海了，想让她知道我想她。那张猫的好可爱，她喜欢猫。
options.text_pinyin: Jì gěi hǎo péngyou, tā bān dào Shànghǎi le, xiǎng ràng tā zhīdào wǒ xiǎng tā. Nà zhāng māo de hǎo kě'ài, tā xǐhuan māo.
options.text_en: For a good friend — she moved to Shanghai, I want her to know I miss her. That cat one is so cute, she loves cats.
options.feedback: — chooses based on the friend's preferences.

options.text_zh: 给朋友。那张城市风景的吧。
options.text_pinyin: Gěi péngyou. Nà zhāng chéngshì fēngjǐng de ba.
options.text_en: For a friend. I'll take the city scenery one.
options.feedback: Quick choice without personal thought.

options.text_zh: 随便哪张都行。
options.text_pinyin: Suíbiàn nǎ zhāng dōu xíng.
options.text_en: Any one will do.
options.feedback: Careless when choosing for a friend.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 给搬走的朋友寄明信片，你真有心。现在大家都发微信了，很少有人手写东西了。收到明信片的人一定特别感动。
turns.text_pinyin: Gěi bān zǒu de péngyou jì míngxìnpiàn, nǐ zhēn yǒuxīn. Xiànzài dàjiā dōu fā Wēixìn le, hěn shǎo yǒu rén shǒuxiě dōngxi le. Shōu dào míngxìnpiàn de rén yīdìng tèbié gǎndòng.
turns.text_en: Sending a postcard to a friend who moved away — you're really thoughtful. Everyone uses WeChat now, few people handwrite anything anymore. The person who receives it will be so touched.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond about handwriting vs. digital messages.

options.text_zh: 手写的东西有温度，微信给不了。写明信片的时候，也在安静地想朋友。
options.text_pinyin: Shǒuxiě de dōngxi yǒu wēndù, Wēixìn gěi bù liǎo. Xiě míngxìnpiàn de shíhou, yě zài ānjìng de xiǎng péngyou.
options.text_en: Handwriting has a warmth WeChat can't give. Writing a postcard is its own quiet way of thinking of a friend.
options.feedback: Reflection on the value of analog connection.

options.text_zh: 是啊，手写比较有意义。
options.text_pinyin: Shì a, shǒuxiě bǐjiào yǒu yìyì.
options.text_en: Yeah, handwriting is more meaningful.
options.feedback: Agrees but doesn't develop the thought.

options.text_zh: 微信也挺方便的。
options.text_pinyin: Wēixìn yě tǐng fāngbiàn de.
options.text_en: WeChat is pretty convenient too.
options.feedback: Contradicts the whole reason for being there.

tree.cultural_note: In an era of instant digital messaging, sending handwritten postcards has become a meaningful act of care in China. The shop owner's observation about the rarity of handwriting reflects a wider cultural nostalgia for slower, more intentional forms of communication.

tree.setup: You're at the train station waiting for a delayed train. A fellow passenger, an elderly teacher named Mr. Wen, strikes up a conversation.
tree.setup_zh: 你在火车站等一班晚点的火车。一位同行的旅客——一位叫温老师的退休老师和你聊了起来。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 火车又晚点了。不过没关系，等一等也挺好的。现在大家都太急了。你要去哪里？
turns.text_pinyin: Huǒchē yòu wǎndiǎn le. Búguò méi guānxi, děng yi děng yě tǐng hǎo de. Xiànzài dàjiā dōu tài jí le. Nǐ yào qù nǎlǐ?
turns.text_en: Train's delayed again. But that's okay — waiting a bit isn't bad. Everyone's in too much of a rush nowadays. Where are you headed?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond about your destination.

options.text_zh: 去看我父母，好几个月没回家了。您呢，温老师？您也是回家吗？
options.text_pinyin: Qù kàn wǒ fùmǔ, hǎo jǐ ge yuè méi huí jiā le. Nín ne, Wēn lǎoshī? Nín yě shì huí jiā ma?
options.text_en: Going to see my parents — haven't been home in months. What about you, Mr. Wen? Are you heading home too?
options.feedback: Shares personal context and returns the question — warm conversation.

options.text_zh: 回家。
options.text_pinyin: Huí jiā.
options.text_en: Going home.
options.feedback: Brief.

options.text_zh: 火车总是晚点，真烦。
options.text_pinyin: Huǒchē zǒng shì wǎndiǎn, zhēn fán.
options.text_en: Trains are always late, so annoying.
options.feedback: Focuses on complaint when he's offering calm perspective.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好几个月了！父母一定很想你。我是去杭州看我的学生，教了他们三十年，退休以后还保持联系。你说得对，有些东西不能等太久——比如看父母。
turns.text_pinyin: Hǎo jǐ ge yuè le! Fùmǔ yīdìng hěn xiǎng nǐ. Wǒ shì qù Hángzhōu kàn wǒ de xuésheng, jiāo le tāmen sānshí nián, tuìxiū yǐhòu hái bǎochí liánxì. Nǐ shuō de duì, yǒu xiē dōngxi bù néng děng tài jiǔ — bǐrú kàn fùmǔ.
turns.text_en: Months! Your parents must miss you. I'm going to Hangzhou to visit my students — taught them for thirty years, still keep in touch after retiring. You're right — some things shouldn't wait too long, like seeing your parents.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to his beautiful teacher-student bond.

options.text_zh: 三十年还保持联系，您和学生的感情一定很深。能遇到这样的好老师，他们很幸运。
options.text_pinyin: Sānshí nián hái bǎochí liánxì, nín hé xuésheng de gǎnqíng yīdìng hěn shēn. Néng yù dào zhèyàng de hǎo lǎoshī, tāmen hěn xìngyùn.
options.text_en: Staying in touch for thirty years — your bond with your students must be really deep. They're lucky to have had such a good teacher.
options.feedback: Acknowledges the beauty of lifelong connections.

options.text_zh: 当老师真好。
options.text_pinyin: Dāng lǎoshī zhēn hǎo.
options.text_en: Being a teacher must be nice.
options.feedback: Generic.

options.text_zh: 火车好像快来了。
options.text_pinyin: Huǒchē hǎoxiàng kuài lái le.
options.text_en: I think the train is almost here.
options.feedback: Changes the subject abruptly.

tree.cultural_note: Waiting at Chinese train stations is a shared cultural experience — delays are common and create unexpected moments of connection between strangers. The teacher-student bond (师生情) in China often lasts a lifetime, well beyond formal education. 「有些东西不能等太久」 is wisdom commonly shared between strangers during journeys.

title: Sharing an Umbrella in the Rain

tree.setup: You're caught in the rain without an umbrella. A kind stranger offers to share theirs as you both walk toward the subway station.
tree.setup_zh: 你被雨淋到了，没有伞。一个好心的陌生人让你和他一起撑伞走向地铁站。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你没带伞吧？来，一起走吧，地铁站就在前面。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ méi dài sǎn ba? Lái, yīqǐ zǒu ba, dìtiě zhàn jiù zài qiánmiàn.
turns.text_en: You don't have an umbrella, right? Come, let's walk together — the subway station is just ahead.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Accept the kind offer.

options.text_zh: 太谢谢了！今天出门的时候还是晴天呢。你真好心。
options.text_pinyin: Tài xièxie le! Jīntiān chūmén de shíhou háishi qíngtiān ne. Nǐ zhēn hǎoxīn.
options.text_en: Thank you so much! It was sunny when I left home. You're very kind.
options.feedback: Grateful and opens a conversation naturally.

options.text_zh: 谢谢。
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie.
options.text_en: Thanks.
options.feedback: Brief.

options.text_zh: 没关系，我不怕雨。
options.text_pinyin: Méi guānxi, wǒ bú pà yǔ.
options.text_en: It's fine, I don't mind rain.
options.feedback: Refuses kindness.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 天气预报说今天下午会下雨，所以我出门就带了伞。你在这边工作吗？
turns.text_pinyin: Tiānqì yùbào shuō jīntiān xiàwǔ huì xià yǔ, suǒyǐ wǒ chūmén jiù dài le sǎn. Nǐ zài zhè biān gōngzuò ma?
turns.text_en: The forecast said rain this afternoon, so I brought my umbrella. Do you work around here?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Chat while walking together.

options.text_zh: 嗯，在前面那栋楼上班。以后我要多看天气预报了！你也在这附近上班吗？
options.text_pinyin: En, zài qiánmiàn nà dòng lóu shàngbān. Yǐhòu wǒ yào duō kàn tiānqì yùbào le! Nǐ yě zài zhè fùjìn shàngbān ma?
options.text_en: Yeah, in that building up ahead. I should check the forecast more! Do you work nearby too?
options.feedback: Conversational and self-deprecating — builds rapport.

options.text_zh: 嗯。
options.text_pinyin: En.
options.text_en: Yeah.
options.feedback: Barely engaging with a kind stranger.

options.text_zh: 到了，谢谢！
options.text_pinyin: Dào le, xièxie!
options.text_en: We're here, thanks!
options.feedback: Ends early.

tree.cultural_note: Sharing an umbrella with a stranger is a beautiful everyday act of kindness in China. Brief conversations with strangers during these moments often feel unexpectedly warm and human.

tree.setup: You and your friend Xiao Hua are at the cinema, trying to decide which movie to watch.
tree.setup_zh: 你和朋友小华在电影院，正在纠结看哪部电影。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 有一部新的动画片，听说很好看。还有一部爱情片。你想看哪个？
turns.text_pinyin: Yǒu yī bù xīn de dònghuà piàn, tīngshuō hěn hǎokàn. Hái yǒu yī bù àiqíng piàn. Nǐ xiǎng kàn nǎge?
turns.text_en: There's a new animated film that's supposed to be great. And a romance. Which one do you want?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Choose a movie.

options.text_zh: 我投动画片！好的动画片大人看也很感动。而且我们可以放松一下，不用想太多。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ tóu dònghuà piàn! Hǎo de dònghuà piàn dàrén kàn yě hěn gǎndòng. Érqiě wǒmen kěyǐ fàngsōng yīxià, bú yòng xiǎng tài duō.
options.text_en: I vote animated! Good animation is moving even for adults. Plus we can relax without thinking too much.
options.feedback: Enthusiastic choice with good reasoning.

options.text_zh: 都行，你选吧。
options.text_pinyin: Dōu xíng, nǐ xuǎn ba.
options.text_en: Either is fine, you choose.
options.feedback: Deferring.

options.text_zh: 我其实不太想看电影。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ qíshí bú tài xiǎng kàn diànyǐng.
options.text_en: I don't really want to watch a movie.
options.feedback: Why are you at the cinema then?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好！动画片就动画片。我去买爆米花和饮料，你去占座位。要甜的还是咸的爆米花？
turns.text_pinyin: Hǎo! Dònghuà piàn jiù dònghuà piàn. Wǒ qù mǎi bàomǐhuā hé yǐnliào, nǐ qù zhàn zuòwèi. Yào tián de háishi xián de bàomǐhuā?
turns.text_en: Okay! Animated it is. I'll get popcorn and drinks, you grab seats. Sweet or salty popcorn?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Choose popcorn and respond.

options.text_zh: 甜的！然后再来一杯可乐。我先去找好座位，中间的位子看电影最舒服。
options.text_pinyin: Tián de! Ránhòu zài lái yī bēi kělè. Wǒ xiān qù zhǎo hǎo zuòwèi, zhōngjiān de wèizi kàn diànyǐng zuì shūfu.
options.text_en: Sweet! And a cola. I'll find good seats — the middle ones are best for watching.
options.feedback: Practical and fun — good teamwork.

options.text_zh: 随便。
options.text_pinyin: Suíbiàn.
options.text_en: Whatever.
options.feedback: Disengaged.

options.text_zh: 我不吃爆米花。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ bù chī bàomǐhuā.
options.text_en: I don't eat popcorn.
options.feedback: Fine but doesn't add to the fun.

tree.cultural_note: Going to the cinema is one of the most popular friend activities in Chinese cities. The sweet vs. salty popcorn debate is a universal conversation starter. Animated films are increasingly appreciated by adult audiences in China.

tree.setup: Your friend Xiao Yan notices you listening to music on your headphones and asks what you're listening to.
tree.setup_zh: 你的朋友小燕看到你戴着耳机听音乐，问你在听什么。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你在听什么歌啊？看你听得很开心的样子。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ zài tīng shénme gē a? Kàn nǐ tīng de hěn kāixīn de yàngzi.
turns.text_en: What song are you listening to? You look like you're really enjoying it.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Share the song with her.

options.text_zh: 一首很安静的中文歌，叫《晴天》。旋律特别好听，你要不要听听？
options.text_pinyin: Yī shǒu hěn ānjìng de Zhōngwén gē, jiào "Qíngtiān". Xuánlǜ tèbié hǎotīng, nǐ yào bú yào tīngtīng?
options.text_en: A quiet Chinese song called 'Sunny Day.' The melody is really beautiful — want to listen?
options.feedback: Shares enthusiastically and offers to let her listen.

options.text_zh: 一首歌。
options.text_pinyin: Yī shǒu gē.
options.text_en: A song.
options.feedback: Not helpful.

options.text_zh: 你不会喜欢的。
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ bú huì xǐhuan de.
options.text_en: You wouldn't like it.
options.feedback: Dismissive and assumes her taste.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 哇，真好听！歌词也很美。我最近一直在听一个新的歌手，她的声音很特别。我们交换歌单吧？
turns.text_pinyin: Wā, zhēn hǎotīng! Gēcí yě hěn měi. Wǒ zuìjìn yīzhí zài tīng yī ge xīn de gēshǒu, tā de shēngyīn hěn tèbié. Wǒmen jiāohuàn gēdān ba?
turns.text_en: Wow, it's lovely! The lyrics are beautiful too. I've been listening to a new singer lately — her voice is really unique. Want to swap playlists?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the playlist swap idea.

options.text_zh: 好啊！我最喜欢发现新的好歌了。你发给我，我也把我的歌单分享给你。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒ zuì xǐhuan fāxiàn xīn de hǎo gē le. Nǐ fā gěi wǒ, wǒ yě bǎ wǒ de gēdān fēnxiǎng gěi nǐ.
options.text_en: Sure! I love discovering new music. Send me yours and I'll share mine too.
options.feedback: Enthusiastic mutual sharing.

options.text_zh: 好。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo.
options.text_en: Okay.
options.feedback: Agrees but no energy.

options.text_zh: 我不太用歌单。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ bú tài yòng gēdān.
options.text_en: I don't really use playlists.
options.feedback: Misses the connection.

tree.cultural_note: Sharing music and playlists (歌单) is a popular form of friendship bonding among young Chinese. Songs are often shared through WeChat or music apps. Discovering new music through friends is valued as a form of cultural exchange.

tree.setup: In the park, you see an elderly man flying a beautiful handmade kite. His granddaughter is clapping excitedly beside him.
tree.setup_zh: 在公园里，你看到一位老人在放一只漂亮的手工风筝。他的孙女在旁边高兴地拍手。

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Approach and compliment the kite.

options.text_zh: 您好！您的风筝真漂亮，是自己做的吗？飞得好高啊！
options.text_pinyin: Nín hǎo! Nín de fēngzheng zhēn piàoliang, shì zìjǐ zuò de ma? Fēi de hǎo gāo a!
options.text_en: Hello! Your kite is beautiful — did you make it yourself? It's flying so high!
options.feedback: Genuine admiration and curiosity.

options.text_zh: 风筝不错。
options.text_pinyin: Fēngzheng búcuò.
options.text_en: Nice kite.
options.feedback: Brief.

options.text_zh: 今天风很大。
options.text_pinyin: Jīntiān fēng hěn dà.
options.text_en: It's windy today.
options.feedback: Doesn't engage with the kite.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 是我自己做的！我做了四十多年风筝了。这只是燕子形的，用竹子和纸做的。以前这个公园每到春天都有很多人放风筝，现在少了。你要不要试试？
turns.text_pinyin: Shì wǒ zìjǐ zuò de! Wǒ zuò le sìshí duō nián fēngzheng le. Zhè zhī shì yànzi xíng de, yòng zhúzi hé zhǐ zuò de. Yǐqián zhège gōngyuán měi dào chūntiān dōu yǒu hěn duō rén fàng fēngzheng, xiànzài shǎo le. Nǐ yào bú yào shìshi?
turns.text_en: I made it myself! I've been making kites for over forty years. This one is swallow-shaped, made of bamboo and paper. This park used to be full of kite-flyers every spring — fewer now. Want to give it a try?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to his offer to try.

options.text_zh: 我很想试！四十年的手艺，真了不起。这种传统技术应该让更多年轻人知道。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ hěn xiǎng shì! Sìshí nián de shǒuyì, zhēn liǎobuqǐ. Zhè zhǒng chuántǒng jìshù yīnggāi ràng gèng duō niánqīng rén zhīdào.
options.text_en: I'd love to try! Forty years of craft — that's amazing. This kind of traditional skill should be known by more young people.
options.feedback: Respects tradition and acknowledges the craft.

options.text_zh: 好啊，让我试试。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo a, ràng wǒ shìshi.
options.text_en: Sure, let me try.
options.feedback: Willing but doesn't acknowledge his skill.

options.text_zh: 我不会放风筝。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ bú huì fàng fēngzheng.
options.text_en: I don't know how to fly a kite.
options.feedback: Self-limiting — that's why he's offering to teach.

tree.cultural_note: Kite-making (风筝) is an ancient Chinese folk art. Handmade kites using bamboo and paper represent a tradition that is fading in the modern era. Spring kite-flying in parks remains a cherished activity, and elderly craftsmen who keep the tradition alive are treasured.

title: A Warm Bowl of Wonton Soup

tree.setup: On a cold evening, you stop at a small wonton shop. The grandmother behind the counter has been making wontons here for decades.
tree.setup_zh: 寒冷的傍晚，你走进一家小馄饨店。柜台后面的老奶奶已经在这里做了几十年馄饨了。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 外面冷吧？快坐下，一碗热馄饨暖暖肚子。要大碗还是小碗？
turns.text_pinyin: Wàimiàn lěng ba? Kuài zuò xià, yī wǎn rè húntun nuǎnnuan dùzi. Yào dà wǎn háishi xiǎo wǎn?
turns.text_en: Cold outside, isn't it? Sit down quick — a bowl of hot wontons will warm your belly. Large or small bowl?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Order and chat.

options.text_zh: 大碗！闻到味道就觉得暖了。奶奶，这家店开了多久了？
options.text_pinyin: Dà wǎn! Wén dào wèidào jiù juéde nuǎn le. Nǎinai, zhè jiā diàn kāi le duōjiǔ le?
options.text_en: Large! Just the smell makes me feel warm. Grandma, how long has this shop been open?
options.feedback: Warm and curious about her story.

options.text_zh: 小碗。
options.text_pinyin: Xiǎo wǎn.
options.text_en: Small bowl.
options.feedback: Simple order.

options.text_zh: 多少钱？
options.text_pinyin: Duōshǎo qián?
options.text_en: How much?
options.feedback: Price first in a cozy scene.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 三十五年了！我从二十多岁就开始包馄饨了。现在手艺都在手上了，闭着眼睛都能包。你尝尝看好不好吃。
turns.text_pinyin: Sānshíwǔ nián le! Wǒ cóng èrshí duō suì jiù kāishǐ bāo húntun le. Xiànzài shǒuyì dōu zài shǒu shàng le, bì zhe yǎnjing dōu néng bāo. Nǐ chángchang kàn hǎo bù hǎochī.
turns.text_en: Thirty-five years! I started making wontons in my twenties. Now the skill is in my hands — I could wrap them with my eyes closed. Try them and see if they're good.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond after tasting.

options.text_zh: 太好吃了！皮薄馅多，汤也特别鲜。三十五年的味道，难怪这么好吃。我以后一定常来。
options.text_pinyin: Tài hǎochī le! Pí báo xiàn duō, tāng yě tèbié xiān. Sānshíwǔ nián de wèidào, nánguài zhème hǎochī. Wǒ yǐhòu yīdìng cháng lái.
options.text_en: Delicious! Thin skin, generous filling, and the broth is so savory. Thirty-five years of flavor — no wonder it's so good. I'll definitely be back.
options.feedback: Specific praise that connects her dedication to the taste.

options.text_zh: 不错。
options.text_pinyin: Búcuò.
options.text_en: Not bad.
options.feedback: Understated for such dedication.

options.text_zh: 能不能加点醋？
options.text_pinyin: Néng bù néng jiā diǎn cù?
options.text_en: Can I add some vinegar?
options.feedback: Practical but misses acknowledging her craft.

tree.cultural_note: Small family-run wonton shops are treasures of Chinese neighborhood culture. The phrase 「手艺都在手上了」 (the skill is in the hands) speaks to muscle memory built over decades. These shops often become gathering places for regular customers seeking warmth and comfort.

tree.setup: It's a rainy Sunday afternoon. You and your roommate Xiao Lan are at home, listening to the rain against the window.
tree.setup_zh: 下雨的周日下午，你和室友小兰在家，听着窗外的雨声。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你听，雨声好好听。我觉得下雨天待在家里是最幸福的事。你想做什么？
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ tīng, yǔ shēng hǎo hǎotīng. Wǒ juéde xià yǔ tiān dāi zài jiālǐ shì zuì xìngfú de shì. Nǐ xiǎng zuò shénme?
turns.text_en: Listen — the rain sounds so nice. I think staying home on a rainy day is the happiest thing. What do you want to do?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Suggest a cozy activity.

options.text_zh: 我们泡一壶茶，看一部老电影吧。这种天气最适合慢慢享受。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒmen pào yī hú chá, kàn yī bù lǎo diànyǐng ba. Zhè zhǒng tiānqì zuì shìhé mànmàn xiǎngshòu.
options.text_en: Let's brew a pot of tea and watch an old movie. This kind of weather is perfect for taking it slow.
options.feedback: Matches the cozy mood perfectly.

options.text_zh: 看手机吧。
options.text_pinyin: Kàn shǒujī ba.
options.text_en: Let's just look at our phones.
options.feedback: Misses the special atmosphere.

options.text_zh: 我想睡觉。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng shuìjiào.
options.text_en: I want to sleep.
options.feedback: Understandable but doesn't engage.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好主意！我来泡茶，你选电影。下雨天、热茶、老电影——完美的周末。
turns.text_pinyin: Hǎo zhǔyi! Wǒ lái pào chá, nǐ xuǎn diànyǐng. Xià yǔ tiān, rè chá, lǎo diànyǐng — wánměi de zhōumò.
turns.text_en: Good idea! I'll brew the tea, you pick the movie. Rainy day, hot tea, old movie — the perfect weekend.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond about the perfect moment.

options.text_zh: 生活不需要多复杂，这样简单的下午就很好了。谢谢你，小兰。
options.text_pinyin: Shēnghuó bù xūyào duō fùzá, zhèyàng jiǎndān de xiàwǔ jiù hěn hǎo le. Xièxie nǐ, Xiǎo Lán.
options.text_en: Life doesn't need to be complicated — a simple afternoon like this is enough. Thanks, Xiao Lan.
options.feedback: Reflective and grateful — captures the spirit of the moment.

options.text_zh: 嗯，不错。
options.text_pinyin: En, búcuò.
options.text_en: Mm, nice.
options.feedback: Flat.

options.text_zh: 明天又要上班了。
options.text_pinyin: Míngtiān yòu yào shàngbān le.
options.text_en: Back to work tomorrow.
options.feedback: Breaks the peaceful mood.

tree.cultural_note: Listening to rain (听雨) has a long poetic tradition in Chinese culture. Rainy days at home with tea and quiet activities represent an ideal of 「小确幸」 (small but certain happiness). Appreciating simple moments is a valued life skill.

tree.setup: A delivery person arrives at your door in heavy rain, bringing your package. He's soaked despite his raincoat.
tree.setup_zh: 大雨中，快递员送包裹到你家门口。虽然穿了雨衣，但他全身都湿透了。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 您的快递，麻烦签收一下。不好意思，淋湿了一点，但是里面的东西没有问题。
turns.text_pinyin: Nín de kuàidì, máfan qiān shōu yīxià. Bù hǎoyìsi, lín shī le yīdiǎn, dànshì lǐmiàn de dōngxi méiyǒu wèntí.
turns.text_en: Your package — please sign for it. Sorry, it got a bit wet on the outside, but the contents are fine.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the delivery person.

options.text_zh: 谢谢你！下这么大的雨还送过来，辛苦了。你要不要进来喝杯热水？
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie nǐ! Xià zhème dà de yǔ hái sòng guòlái, xīnkǔ le. Nǐ yào bú yào jìnlái hē bēi rè shuǐ?
options.text_en: Thank you! Delivering in such heavy rain — you've worked hard. Want to come in for a cup of hot water?
options.feedback: Warm and acknowledges his effort beyond just the transaction.

options.text_zh: 好的，谢谢。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie.
options.text_en: Okay, thanks.
options.feedback: Polite but doesn't acknowledge the weather.

options.text_zh: 怎么湿了？你应该保护好包裹。
options.text_pinyin: Zěnme shī le? Nǐ yīnggāi bǎohù hǎo bāoguǒ.
options.text_en: Why is it wet? You should protect packages better.
options.feedback: Critical of someone working in pouring rain.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 不用了，谢谢！还有好几个包裹要送呢。您能理解就好，有些客人看到湿了就不高兴。谢谢您这么好。
turns.text_pinyin: Bú yòng le, xièxie! Hái yǒu hǎo jǐ ge bāoguǒ yào sòng ne. Nín néng lǐjiě jiù hǎo, yǒu xiē kèrén kàndào shī le jiù bù gāoxìng. Xièxie nín zhème hǎo.
turns.text_en: No need, thanks! Still have several more to deliver. I'm glad you understand — some customers get upset about wet packages. Thank you for being so kind.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Send him off warmly.

options.text_zh: 路上小心！雨太大了注意安全。你真的辛苦了。
options.text_pinyin: Lù shàng xiǎoxīn! Yǔ tài dà le zhùyì ānquán. Nǐ zhēn de xīnkǔ le.
options.text_en: Be careful on the road! It's raining so hard — stay safe. You really work hard.
options.feedback: Genuine care for a worker's wellbeing.

options.text_zh: 好的，再见。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, zàijiàn.
options.text_en: Okay, bye.
options.feedback: Standard.

options.text_zh: 下次别下雨天送了。
options.text_pinyin: Xià cì bié xià yǔ tiān sòng le.
options.text_en: Don't deliver in rain next time.
options.feedback: They don't get to choose when to deliver.

tree.cultural_note: Delivery workers (快递员) form the backbone of urban convenience in China. The phrase 「辛苦了」 (you've worked hard) is an important expression of respect for people in service roles. Small acts of kindness — offering water, showing understanding — go a long way.

tree.setup: You're reading a Chinese menu at a restaurant and encounter a word you don't know. The waiter notices your confusion and kindly helps.
tree.setup_zh: 你在饭馆看中文菜单，遇到一个不认识的词。服务员注意到你的困惑，友好地帮忙。

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Ask the waiter about the word.

options.text_zh: 不好意思，请问这个菜是什么？「干锅」是什么意思？
options.text_pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, qǐngwèn zhège cài shì shénme? 'Gānguō' shì shénme yìsi?
options.text_en: Excuse me, what is this dish? What does 'dry pot' mean?
options.feedback: Polite and direct — the best way to learn.

options.text_zh: 这个菜多少钱？
options.text_pinyin: Zhège cài duōshǎo qián?
options.text_en: How much is this dish?
options.feedback: Asks price without understanding the dish.

options.text_zh: 算了，我点别的。
options.text_pinyin: Suàn le, wǒ diǎn bié de.
options.text_en: Never mind, I'll order something else.
options.feedback: Gives up learning.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 干锅就是没有汤的炒菜，用高温炒出来的。我们的干锅土豆片特别受欢迎，又香又脆。你要不要试试？
turns.text_pinyin: Gānguō jiù shì méiyǒu tāng de chǎocài, yòng gāowēn chǎo chūlái de. Wǒmen de gānguō tǔdòu piàn tèbié shòu huānyíng, yòu xiāng yòu cuì. Nǐ yào bú yào shìshi?
turns.text_en: Dry pot is a stir-fry without broth — cooked at high heat. Our dry pot potato slices are very popular — fragrant and crispy. Want to try?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the explanation.

options.text_zh: 原来是这样！来一份干锅土豆片吧。谢谢你，我又学了一个新词。
options.text_pinyin: Yuánlái shì zhèyàng! Lái yī fèn gānguō tǔdòu piàn ba. Xièxie nǐ, wǒ yòu xué le yī ge xīn cí.
options.text_en: Oh I see! I'll have the dry pot potato slices. Thanks — learned a new word.
options.feedback: Appreciative and celebrates learning in daily life.

options.text_zh: 好的，来一份。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de, lái yī fèn.
options.text_en: Okay, I'll have one.
options.feedback: Orders but doesn't acknowledge the learning.

options.text_zh: 不辣吧？我不吃辣。
options.text_pinyin: Bú là ba? Wǒ bù chī là.
options.text_en: It's not spicy, right? I don't eat spicy food.
options.feedback: Practical but ignores the vocabulary moment.

tree.cultural_note: Learning Chinese vocabulary through real-life situations — like reading menus — is one of the most natural and effective methods. Restaurant staff in China are usually patient and happy to explain dishes. 干锅 (dry pot) is a popular Hunan-Sichuan cooking style.

tree.setup: After a summer thunderstorm, the neighborhood is covered with fallen branches and puddles. Neighbors come out to help clean up. You join them.
tree.setup_zh: 夏天的暴风雨过后，小区里到处都是落下的树枝和水坑。邻居们出来帮忙清理，你也加入了。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 哎，昨晚那场暴风雨真大！你看院子里都是树枝。来，帮忙一起清理吧。
turns.text_pinyin: Āi, zuówǎn nà chǎng bàofēngyǔ zhēn dà! Nǐ kàn yuànzi lǐ dōu shì shùzhī. Lái, bāngmáng yīqǐ qīnglǐ ba.
turns.text_en: Wow, last night's storm was intense! Look at all the branches in the courtyard. Come, help clean up.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Join the clean-up.

options.text_zh: 我来了！大家一起动手，很快就能弄干净。我先把那边的大树枝搬走。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ lái le! Dàjiā yīqǐ dòngshǒu, hěn kuài jiù néng nòng gānjìng. Wǒ xiān bǎ nàbiān de dà shùzhī bān zǒu.
options.text_en: I'm here! With everyone working together, it'll be clean in no time. I'll move those big branches first.
options.feedback: Takes initiative and shows community spirit.

options.text_zh: 好的。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo de.
options.text_en: Okay.
options.feedback: Agrees but no energy.

options.text_zh: 物业不管吗？
options.text_pinyin: Wùyè bù guǎn ma?
options.text_en: Isn't this the property management's job?
options.feedback: Deflects community responsibility.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你真积极！我们每次大雨以后都会出来一起清理。看，阳光出来了，很快就干了。暴风雨过后的空气特别新鲜，你闻到了吗？
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ zhēn jījí! Wǒmen měi cì dà yǔ yǐhòu dōu huì chūlái yīqǐ qīnglǐ. Kàn, yángguāng chūlái le, hěn kuài jiù gān le. Bàofēngyǔ yǐhòu de kōngqì tèbié xīnxiān, nǐ wén dào le ma?
turns.text_en: You're so proactive! We always come out to clean after big rains. Look — the sun is out, it'll dry up quickly. The air after a storm is especially fresh — can you smell it?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the fresh air.

options.text_zh: 确实！空气好清新。暴风雨虽然麻烦，但之后的空气和阳光让人觉得一切都变新了。
options.text_pinyin: Quèshí! Kōngqì hǎo qīngxīn. Bàofēngyǔ suīrán máfan, dàn zhīhòu de kōngqì hé yángguāng ràng rén juéde yīqiè dōu biàn xīn le.
options.text_en: Definitely! The air is so fresh. Storms are a hassle, but the air and sunshine afterward make everything feel renewed.
options.feedback: Finds beauty after difficulty — positive perspective.

options.text_zh: 嗯，闻到了。
options.text_pinyin: En, wén dào le.
options.text_en: Yeah, I smell it.
options.feedback: Brief.

options.text_zh: 希望别再下暴雨了。
options.text_pinyin: Xīwàng bié zài xià bàoyǔ le.
options.text_en: Hope it doesn't storm again.
options.feedback: Negative when the mood is hopeful.

tree.cultural_note: Community clean-ups after storms bring neighbors together and strengthen social bonds. The observation that air smells freshest after rain connects to the Chinese poetic tradition of finding beauty in nature's rhythms. Working together for the common good (共同努力) is a valued community ethic.

tree.setup: It's the last warm day before autumn arrives. You and your friend Xiao Yun are sitting on the grass, eating watermelon and watching the sunset.
tree.setup_zh: 秋天来之前最后一个温暖的日子。你和朋友小云坐在草地上，吃着西瓜，看着日落。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 明天就秋天了。我觉得每个夏天结束的时候都有一点不舍得。你呢？你会想念夏天吗？
turns.text_pinyin: Míngtiān jiù qiūtiān le. Wǒ juéde měi ge xiàtiān jiéshù de shíhou dōu yǒu yīdiǎn bù shěde. Nǐ ne? Nǐ huì xiǎngniàn xiàtiān ma?
turns.text_en: Autumn starts tomorrow. I always feel a little reluctant when each summer ends. What about you? Will you miss summer?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Share your feelings about summer ending.

options.text_zh: 会的。夏天有西瓜、有长长的白天、有萤火虫。不过秋天也很美，每个季节都有它好的地方。
options.text_pinyin: Huì de. Xiàtiān yǒu xīguā, yǒu cháng cháng de báitiān, yǒu yínghuǒchóng. Búguò qiūtiān yě hěn měi, měi ge jìjié dōu yǒu tā hǎo de dìfang.
options.text_en: I will. Summer has watermelon, long days, and fireflies. But autumn is beautiful too — every season has its good parts.
options.feedback: Nostalgic but balanced — finds beauty in every season.

options.text_zh: 还好吧，夏天太热了。
options.text_pinyin: Hái hǎo ba, xiàtiān tài rè le.
options.text_en: Not really, summer was too hot.
options.feedback: Practical but misses the reflective moment.

options.text_zh: 没什么特别的。
options.text_pinyin: Méi shénme tèbié de.
options.text_en: Nothing special about it.
options.feedback: Misses the emotional goodbye.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 嗯，是啊。而且现在这个时刻就很好——西瓜、日落、好朋友。不管什么季节，有这些就够了。
turns.text_pinyin: Ǹg, shì a. Érqiě xiànzài zhège shíkè jiù hěn hǎo — xīguā, rìluò, hǎo péngyou. Bùguǎn shénme jìjié, yǒu zhèxiē jiù gòu le.
turns.text_en: Yeah, exactly. And this moment right now is perfect — watermelon, sunset, a good friend. No matter what season, having these is enough.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to this perfect moment.

options.text_zh: 对，最好的东西都很简单——好天气、好朋友、一块西瓜。明年还来。
options.text_pinyin: Duì, zuì hǎo de dōngxi dōu hěn jiǎndān — hǎo tiānqì, hǎo péngyou, yī kuài xīguā. Míngnián hái lái.
options.text_en: Yeah, the best things are simple — good weather, a good friend, a piece of watermelon. We'll come back next year.
options.feedback: Beautiful, gentle, and forward-looking — the perfect farewell to summer.

options.text_zh: 嗯，挺好的。
options.text_pinyin: En, tǐng hǎo de.
options.text_en: Yeah, it's nice.
options.feedback: Agrees but doesn't match the depth.

options.text_zh: 西瓜吃完了。
options.text_pinyin: Xīguā chī wán le.
options.text_en: The watermelon's all gone.
options.feedback: Misses the emotional moment entirely.

tree.cultural_note: Eating watermelon (吃西瓜) is the quintessential summer activity in China — a symbol of the season itself. The bittersweet feeling of the last warm day connects to the Chinese poetic concept of 「惜」 (cherishing what passes). Simple pleasures shared with friends are the deepest form of contentment.

tree.setup: You're standing under an awning near an old stone bridge in a small town. A retired teacher, Uncle Wang, is watching the rain with you. The streets are quiet.
tree.setup_zh: 你站在一座小镇老石桥旁的雨棚下。一位退休老师王叔叔正和你一起看雨。街上很安静。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 这种雨，小时候我们叫它「牛毛雨」。细细的，不急。现在的年轻人都打伞跑，没人停下来看了。
turns.text_pinyin: Zhè zhǒng yǔ, xiǎo shíhou wǒmen jiào tā 'niúmáo yǔ'. Xì xì de, bù jí. Xiànzài de niánqīng rén dōu dǎ sǎn pǎo, méi rén tíng xiàlái kàn le.
turns.text_en: This kind of rain, when I was little we called it 'ox-hair rain.' Fine and gentle. Nowadays young people all run with umbrellas, nobody stops to watch anymore.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to Uncle Wang about the rain.

options.text_zh: 牛毛雨，这个名字真好听。我也觉得这种雨不用躲，站在这里听一听，心里很安静。
options.text_pinyin: Niúmáo yǔ, zhège míngzì zhēn hǎotīng. Wǒ yě juéde zhè zhǒng yǔ bú yòng duǒ, zhàn zài zhèlǐ tīng yī tīng, xīn lǐ hěn ānjìng.
options.text_en: 'Ox-hair rain,' what a beautiful name. I also feel you don't need to hide from this kind of rain. Just standing here listening makes the heart quiet.
options.feedback: Gentle and attentive — appreciates the name and matches the reflective mood.

options.text_zh: 明天天气怎么样？我想出去买东西。
options.text_pinyin: Míngtiān tiānqì zěnmeyàng? Wǒ xiǎng chūqù mǎi dōngxi.
options.text_en: What's the weather like tomorrow? I want to go shopping.
options.feedback: Pivots to logistics instead of savoring the moment.

options.text_zh: 你退休以后每天做什么运动？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ tuìxiū yǐhòu měi tiān zuò shénme yùndòng?
options.text_en: What exercise do you do every day since retiring?
options.feedback: Ignores the poetic observation about rain.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 是啊。以前放学的时候，我们故意不打伞，在雨里慢慢走回家。鞋子湿了没关系，开心就好。
turns.text_pinyin: Shì a. Yǐqián fàngxué de shíhou, wǒmen gùyì bù dǎ sǎn, zài yǔ lǐ mànman zǒu huí jiā. Xiézi shī le méi guānxi, kāixīn jiù hǎo.
turns.text_en: Yeah. After school back then, we'd deliberately not use umbrellas and walk home slowly in the rain. Wet shoes didn't matter, as long as we were happy.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Share a similar memory or feeling.

options.text_zh: 我小时候也喜欢在雨里玩。现在长大了，好像忘了那种感觉。也许我们不是怕淋雨，是怕浪费时间。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ xiǎo shíhou yě xǐhuān zài yǔ lǐ wán. Xiànzài zhǎng dà le, hǎoxiàng wàng le nà zhǒng gǎnjué. Yěxǔ wǒmen bú shì pà lín yǔ, shì pà làngfèi shíjiān.
options.text_en: I liked playing in the rain when I was little too. Now that I've grown up, I seem to have forgotten that feeling. Maybe we're not afraid of getting wet — we're afraid of wasting time.
options.feedback: Reflective and honest — connects childhood joy to adult anxieties about productivity.

options.text_zh: 你家离这里远不远？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ jiā lí zhèlǐ yuǎn bù yuǎn?
options.text_en: Is your home far from here?
options.feedback: Mundane question that breaks the reflective atmosphere.

options.text_zh: 下雨天路很滑，你要小心。
options.text_pinyin: Xià yǔ tiān lù hěn huá, nǐ yào xiǎoxīn.
options.text_en: The road is slippery on rainy days, you should be careful.
options.feedback: Practical advice that misses the emotional thread.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 怕浪费时间……你说得对。什么时候开始，淋雨变成了浪费时间呢？
turns.text_pinyin: Pà làngfèi shíjiān…… nǐ shuō de duì. Shénme shíhou kāishǐ, lín yǔ biàn chéng le làngfèi shíjiān ne?
turns.text_en: Afraid of wasting time... you're right. When did getting rained on become a waste of time?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to his question.

options.text_zh: 大概是从我们开始用「有没有用」来衡量每件事的时候吧。淋雨没有用，所以我们不淋了。但有些事情的意义不在于有没有用。
options.text_pinyin: Dàgài shì cóng wǒmen kāishǐ yòng 'yǒu méiyǒu yòng' lái héngliáng měi jiàn shì de shíhou ba. Lín yǔ méiyǒu yòng, suǒyǐ wǒmen bù lín le. Dàn yǒuxiē shìqíng de yìyì bú zàiyú yǒu méiyǒu yòng.
options.text_en: Probably from the moment we started measuring everything by 'is it useful or not.' Getting rained on isn't useful, so we stopped. But the meaning of some things isn't about usefulness.
options.feedback: Observation about how utilitarian thinking erodes simple pleasures.

options.text_zh: 我觉得是因为大家都太忙了，没时间休息。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ juéde shì yīnwèi dàjiā dōu tài máng le, méi shíjiān xiūxi.
options.text_en: I think it's because everyone is too busy, no time to rest.
options.feedback: Surface-level answer that doesn't engage with the deeper question.

options.text_zh: 你知道这附近有没有好吃的面馆？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ zhīdào zhè fùjìn yǒu méiyǒu hǎochī de miànguǎn?
options.text_en: Do you know if there's a good noodle shop nearby?
options.feedback: Food question during a philosophical moment.

tree.cultural_note: The term 牛毛雨 (niúmáo yǔ, ox-hair rain) is a traditional Chinese expression for very fine, misty rain. In Chinese culture, rain is often associated with nostalgia and reflection. The idea that modern life has made people too busy to appreciate small natural pleasures reflects a common sentiment among older generations.

tree.setup: You're sitting on a bench in your apartment complex's courtyard. A neighbor, Auntie Li, is feeding a stray cat. The evening light is warm and golden.
tree.setup_zh: 你坐在小区院子里的长椅上。邻居李阿姨正在喂一只流浪猫。傍晚的阳光温暖金黄。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 这只猫已经来了三年了。刚来的时候特别怕人，躲在垃圾桶后面不敢出来。现在它认识我了，每天傍晚等我。
turns.text_pinyin: Zhè zhī māo yǐjīng lái le sān nián le. Gāng lái de shíhou tèbié pà rén, duǒ zài lājī tǒng hòumiàn bù gǎn chūlái. Xiànzài tā rènshi wǒ le, měi tiān bàngwǎn děng wǒ.
turns.text_en: This cat has been coming for three years now. When it first arrived it was terrified of people, hiding behind the trash cans. Now it knows me and waits for me every evening.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond about the cat.

options.text_zh: 三年了，那你们已经是老朋友了。信任需要时间，猫和人都一样。
options.text_pinyin: Sān nián le, nà nǐmen yǐjīng shì lǎo péngyǒu le. Xìnrèn xūyào shíjiān, māo hé rén dōu yīyàng.
options.text_en: Three years — you're old friends by now. Trust takes time, for cats and people alike.
options.feedback: Draws a gentle parallel between animal and human trust.

options.text_zh: 你为什么不把它带回家养？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ wèishénme bù bǎ tā dài huí jiā yǎng?
options.text_en: Why don't you bring it home to raise?
options.feedback: Jumps to problem-solving instead of appreciating the relationship as it is.

options.text_zh: 流浪猫会不会有病？你要小心。
options.text_pinyin: Liúlàng māo huì bú huì yǒu bìng? Nǐ yào xiǎoxīn.
options.text_en: Don't stray cats carry diseases? You should be careful.
options.feedback: Clinical concern that misses the tenderness of the moment.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 老朋友，对。我老伴去年走了以后，每天最期待的就是这个时候。你说奇不奇怪，一只猫能让一个人不觉得那么孤单。
turns.text_pinyin: Lǎo péngyǒu, duì. Wǒ lǎobàn qùnián zǒu le yǐhòu, měi tiān zuì qīdài de jiù shì zhège shíhou. Nǐ shuō qí bù qíguài, yī zhī māo néng ràng yīge rén bù juéde nàme gūdān.
turns.text_en: Old friends, yes. After my husband passed away last year, this is the moment I look forward to most every day. Isn't it strange — a cat can make a person feel less lonely.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond with warmth.

options.text_zh: 一点也不奇怪。陪伴不一定要说话，有时候安安静静地在一起就够了。这只猫也需要您，你们互相陪伴。
options.text_pinyin: Yīdiǎn yě bù qíguài. Péibàn bù yīdìng yào shuōhuà, yǒu shíhou ān'ānjìngjìng de zài yīqǐ jiù gòu le. Zhè zhī māo yě xūyào nín, nǐmen hùxiāng péibàn.
options.text_en: Not strange at all. Companionship doesn't require words — sometimes being quietly together is enough. This cat needs you too. You keep each other company.
options.feedback: Compassionate and true — validates her experience without minimizing it.

options.text_zh: 您可以参加小区的活动，认识新朋友。
options.text_pinyin: Nín kěyǐ cānjiā xiǎoqū de huódòng, rènshi xīn péngyǒu.
options.text_en: You could join community activities and meet new friends.
options.feedback: Well-meaning advice but dismisses her current source of comfort.

options.text_zh: 这只猫是什么颜色的？
options.text_pinyin: Zhè zhī māo shì shénme yánsè de?
options.text_en: What color is this cat?
options.feedback: Trivial question after she shared something deeply personal.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 互相陪伴……你说得真好。你知道吗，下雨天它也来，就在那个屋檐下面等我。我给它做了一个小窝，放在楼下。
turns.text_pinyin: Hùxiāng péibàn…… nǐ shuō de zhēn hǎo. Nǐ zhīdào ma, xià yǔ tiān tā yě lái, jiù zài nàge wūyán xiàmiàn děng wǒ. Wǒ gěi tā zuò le yīge xiǎo wō, fàng zài lóu xià.
turns.text_en: Keeping each other company... that's beautifully put. You know, it comes even on rainy days, waiting under that eave. I made it a little shelter and put it downstairs.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her dedication.

options.text_zh: 下雨天也来，这说明它是真的信任您了。有些关系不需要语言，不需要解释，只要每天都在就好。
options.text_pinyin: Xià yǔ tiān yě lái, zhè shuōmíng tā shì zhēn de xìnrèn nín le. Yǒuxiē guānxì bù xūyào yǔyán, bù xūyào jiěshì, zhǐyào měi tiān dōu zài jiù hǎo.
options.text_en: Coming even in the rain — that shows it truly trusts you. Some relationships don't need language or explanation, just showing up every day.
options.feedback: Affirming and poetic — elevates a simple bond into something meaningful.

options.text_zh: 冬天会不会太冷？你应该给它买个暖的窝。
options.text_pinyin: Dōngtiān huì bú huì tài lěng? Nǐ yīnggāi gěi tā mǎi ge nuǎn de wō.
options.text_en: Won't it be too cold in winter? You should buy it a warm shelter.
options.feedback: Practical advice that misses the emotional resonance.

options.text_zh: 我家附近也有很多流浪猫。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ jiā fùjìn yě yǒu hěn duō liúlàng māo.
options.text_en: There are lots of stray cats near my home too.
options.feedback: Redirects to yourself instead of staying with her story.

tree.cultural_note: In Chinese residential communities (小区), feeding stray cats is a common practice, especially among older residents. These quiet daily rituals often become important sources of companionship, particularly for those living alone after losing a spouse. The relationship between feeder and stray cat represents a form of mutual care that transcends the need for words.

tree.setup: You're waiting at a bus stop late at night. A young office worker, Xiao Zhang, is also waiting. The city is unusually quiet.
tree.setup_zh: 你深夜在公交车站等车。一个年轻的上班族小张也在等车。城市异常安静。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你也在等末班车？还有十分钟。我每天都坐这趟车，已经习惯了。晚上十一点的城市，感觉不太一样。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ yě zài děng mòbān chē? Hái yǒu shí fēnzhōng. Wǒ měi tiān dōu zuò zhè tàng chē, yǐjīng xíguàn le. Wǎnshang shíyī diǎn de chéngshì, gǎnjué bú tài yīyàng.
turns.text_en: You're also waiting for the last bus? Ten more minutes. I take this bus every day, I'm used to it. The city at eleven p.m. feels different somehow.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond about the late-night city.

options.text_zh: 是啊，白天太吵了，到了晚上反而能听到一些平时听不到的声音。风的声音，远处的车。安静也是一种声音。
options.text_pinyin: Shì a, báitiān tài chǎo le, dào le wǎnshang fǎn'ér néng tīng dào yīxiē píngshí tīng bú dào de shēngyīn. Fēng de shēngyīn, yuǎnchù de chē. Ānjìng yě shì yī zhǒng shēngyīn.
options.text_en: Yeah, daytime is too noisy. At night you can actually hear sounds you normally can't — the wind, distant cars. Quiet is a kind of sound too.
options.feedback: Observant and poetic — notices the beauty in nighttime stillness.

options.text_zh: 你每天加班到这么晚吗？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ měi tiān jiābān dào zhème wǎn ma?
options.text_en: Do you work overtime this late every day?
options.feedback: Jumps to work instead of sharing the moment.

options.text_zh: 末班车几点出发？
options.text_pinyin: Mòbān chē jǐ diǎn chūfā?
options.text_en: What time does the last bus leave?
options.feedback: He just said ten minutes; this is redundant and unengaging.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 安静也是一种声音……我没这么想过。白天在办公室，到处都是人说话、打电话。到了晚上，反而觉得这个城市才是我的。
turns.text_pinyin: Ānjìng yě shì yī zhǒng shēngyīn…… wǒ méi zhème xiǎng guò. Báitiān zài bàngōngshì, dàochù dōu shì rén shuōhuà, dǎ diànhuà. Dào le wǎnshang, fǎn'ér juéde zhège chéngshì cái shì wǒ de.
turns.text_en: Quiet is a kind of sound... I never thought of it that way. During the day in the office, everyone's talking, making calls. At night, the city finally feels like it's mine.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Talk about the feeling of owning the city at night.

options.text_zh: 是啊，晚上反而能听到白天听不到的声音。风声，远处的车。安静也是一种声音。
options.text_pinyin: Shì a, wǎnshang fǎn'ér néng tīng dào báitiān tīng bú dào de shēngyīn. Fēng shēng, yuǎnchù de chē. Ānjìng yě shì yī zhǒng shēngyīn.
options.text_en: Yeah, at night you hear things you can't during the day. The wind, distant cars. Quiet is a kind of sound too.
options.feedback: Reversal — reframes late nights as a choice to preserve solitude.

options.text_zh: 你住在哪个小区？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ zhù zài nǎge xiǎoqū?
options.text_en: Which apartment complex do you live in?
options.feedback: Personal question that breaks the reflective mood.

options.text_zh: 你用什么手机看时间？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ yòng shénme shǒujī kàn shíjiān?
options.text_en: What phone do you use to check the time?
options.feedback: Irrelevant tech question.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 舍不得这段安静的时间……说得太对了。我每天回到家就坐在窗户旁边，不开灯，看外面的路灯。那个时候才觉得，今天终于是自己的了。
turns.text_pinyin: Shěbùdé zhè duàn ānjìng de shíjiān…… shuō de tài duì le. Wǒ měi tiān huí dào jiā jiù zuò zài chuānghù pángbiān, bù kāi dēng, kàn wàimiàn de lùdēng. Nàge shíhou cái juéde, jīntiān zhōngyú shì zìjǐ de le.
turns.text_en: Can't bear to give up the quiet time... that's exactly it. Every day when I get home I sit by the window, don't turn on the light, and watch the streetlamps outside. That's when I finally feel the day is my own.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to this image of solitude.

options.text_zh: 不开灯看路灯，这个画面很美。有时候最好的休息不是做什么特别的事，而是什么都不做，就让自己安静地存在一会儿。
options.text_pinyin: Bù kāi dēng kàn lùdēng, zhège huàmiàn hěn měi. Yǒu shíhou zuì hǎo de xiūxi bú shì zuò shénme tèbié de shì, ér shì shénme dōu bú zuò, jiù ràng zìjǐ ānjìng de cúnzài yīhuìr.
options.text_en: Not turning on the light and watching streetlamps — that's a beautiful image. Sometimes the best rest isn't doing something special, but doing nothing at all, just quietly existing for a while.
options.feedback: Affirms solitude as valuable — validates the practice of stillness.

options.text_zh: 你应该早点睡觉，对身体好。
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ yīnggāi zǎo diǎn shuìjiào, duì shēntǐ hǎo.
options.text_en: You should sleep earlier, it's better for your health.
options.feedback: Health advice that dismisses the emotional value of his nightly ritual.

options.text_zh: 你觉得坐公交车好还是坐地铁好？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ juéde zuò gōngjiāo chē hǎo háishì zuò dìtiě hǎo?
options.text_en: Do you think taking the bus or the subway is better?
options.feedback: Transport comparison during a moment of genuine connection.

tree.cultural_note: The concept of 末班车 (last bus) carries symbolic weight in Chinese urban life. For many office workers, the late-night commute represents a liminal space between work and personal life. The practice of sitting alone in the dark (不开灯) is a quiet form of self-care common among overworked young professionals in Chinese cities.

tree.setup: You discover a small secondhand bookshop tucked away in an old building. The owner, Lao Zhao, is reading behind the counter. Few customers come here.
tree.setup_zh: 你在一栋老楼里发现了一家小小的二手书店。老板老赵正在柜台后面看书。很少有客人来这里。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 随便看，不用急。这里的书都是别人不要的，但每本都有故事。有些书里还夹着以前主人留下的东西——车票、照片、写了字的纸条。
turns.text_pinyin: Suíbiàn kàn, bú yòng jí. Zhèlǐ de shū dōu shì biérén bú yào de, dàn měi běn dōu yǒu gùshì. Yǒuxiē shū lǐ hái jiā zhe yǐqián zhǔrén liú xià de dōngxi — chēpiào, zhàopiàn, xiě le zì de zhǐtiáo.
turns.text_en: Browse at your leisure, no rush. The books here are all ones other people didn't want, but each one has a story. Some still have things left by their previous owners — tickets, photos, handwritten notes.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond about the secondhand books.

options.text_zh: 夹在书里的东西有时候比书本身更有意思。那些车票和纸条就像一个人生活的痕迹，虽然你不认识他，但能感觉到他曾经在这里。
