options.text_en: How many dialects are disappearing in China right now?
options.feedback: Professor Meng glances at you. 'Hundreds,' she says, and waits to see if you want to go somewhere with that, or if you're just collecting facts.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 「看世界的眼睛」——你说得比我好。方明贵老人有一个词，普通话里没有对应的。他用一个词来形容「黄昏时候河水变成金色、同时你闻到对岸有人在煮饭」——整个场景、视觉、嗅觉、时间感，都在一个词里。我试过翻译，但无论怎么翻，都只剩下意思，没有了那种「完整」。翻译不是传递，是降维。
turns.text_pinyin: 'Kàn shìjiè de yǎnjing' — nǐ shuō de bǐ wǒ hǎo. Fāng Míngguì lǎorén yǒu yī ge cí, pǔtōnghuà lǐ méiyǒu duìyìng de. Tā yòng yī ge cí lái xíngróng 'huánghūn shíhou hé shuǐ biàn chéng jīnsè, tóngshí nǐ wén dào duì'àn yǒu rén zài zhǔ fàn' — zhěnggè chǎngjǐng, shìjué, xiùjué, shíjiān gǎn, dōu zài yī ge cí lǐ. Wǒ shì guò fānyì, dàn wúlùn zěnme fān, dōu zhǐ shèng xià yìsi, méiyǒu le nà zhǒng 'wánzhěng'. Fānyì bú shì chuándì, shì jiàng wéi.
turns.text_en: 'Eyes for seeing the world' — you said it better than I could. Elder Fang had a word with no Mandarin equivalent: one word for 'the river turning gold at dusk while you smell cooking on the opposite bank' — sight, smell, time, all in one word. I tried to translate it, but only meaning remained, not 'wholeness.' Translation isn't transmission — it's dimensional reduction.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the untranslatable word and what it means that translation is 'dimensional reduction.'

options.text_zh: 那个词不是在「描述」那个场景——它就是那个场景，压缩成了一个声音。一旦你把它拆成视觉、嗅觉、时间，完整性就碎了。失去的不是一个词，是一种整体感知的方式。
options.text_pinyin: Nàge cí bú shì zài 'miáoshù' nàge chǎngjǐng — tā jiù shì nàge chǎngjǐng, yāsuō chéng le yī ge shēngyīn. Yīdàn nǐ bǎ tā chāi chéng shìjué, xiùjué, shíjiān, wánzhěngxìng jiù suì le. Shīqù de bú shì yī ge cí, shì yī zhǒng zhěngtǐ gǎnzhī de fāngshì.
options.text_en: That word isn't 'describing' the scene — it is the scene, compressed into a single sound. The moment you break it into sight, smell, and time, the wholeness shatters.
options.feedback: Professor Meng opens her notebook and writes something down. She doesn't explain why — she just does it, which means you said something worth keeping.

options.text_zh: 也许人工智能可以帮助保存这些语言？
options.text_pinyin: Yěxǔ réngōng zhìnéng kěyǐ bāngzhù bǎocún zhèxiē yǔyán?
options.text_en: Maybe artificial intelligence could help preserve these languages?
options.feedback: Professor Meng's expression doesn't change. 'Possibly,' she says, evenly. You can tell she's heard this before and found it beside the point.

options.text_zh: 苗族有自己的文字系统吗？
options.text_pinyin: Miáozú yǒu zìjǐ de wénzì xìtǒng ma?
options.text_en: Does the Miao language have its own writing system?
options.feedback: Professor Meng nods and begins explaining — competently, patiently. But something in her settles, like she's shifted back into lecture mode when you were almost somewhere else.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你比大多数人都理解得深。但我最矛盾的是——我记录下来的东西有用吗？我有他几百小时的录音，我有语法分析，我有词典草稿。但是没有社区了，没有人用这种语言吵架、开玩笑、哄孩子睡觉了。一种语言如果只存在于录音带里，它是活的还是死的？博物馆里的蝴蝶标本是蝴蝶吗？
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ bǐ dàduōshù rén dōu lǐjiě de shēn. Dàn wǒ zuì máodùn de shì — wǒ jìlù xiàlái de dōngxi yǒu yòng ma? Wǒ yǒu tā jǐ bǎi xiǎoshí de lùyīn, wǒ yǒu yǔfǎ fēnxī, wǒ yǒu cídiǎn cǎogǎo. Dànshì méiyǒu shèqū le, méiyǒu rén yòng zhè zhǒng yǔyán chǎojià, kāi wánxiào, hǒng háizi shuìjiào le. Yī zhǒng yǔyán rúguǒ zhǐ cúnzài yú lùyīndài lǐ, tā shì huó de háishi sǐ de? Bówùguǎn lǐ de húdié biāoběn shì húdié ma?
turns.text_en: You understand more deeply than most. But my biggest contradiction is — are my recordings useful? I have hundreds of hours of his audio, grammar analyses, dictionary drafts. But there's no community anymore, no one arguing, joking, or lulling children to sleep in this language. If a language only exists on tape, is it alive or dead? Is a butterfly specimen in a museum still a butterfly?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the question of whether a recorded language is alive or dead.

options.text_zh: 标本不是蝴蝶——但它是蝴蝶存在过的证明。也许五十年后，有人听到那段录音，突然理解了一种他从来没想过的看世界的方式，他的世界就变大了一点。那一刻，那种土语在他心里活了。
options.text_pinyin: Biāoběn bú shì húdié — dàn tā shì húdié cúnzài guò de zhèngmíng. Yěxǔ wǔshí nián hòu, yǒu rén tīng dào nà duàn lùyīn, tūrán lǐjiě le yī zhǒng tā cónglái méi xiǎng guò de kàn shìjiè de fāngshì, tā de shìjiè jiù biàn dà le yīdiǎn. Nà yī kè, nà zhǒng tǔyǔ zài tā xīnlǐ huó le.
options.text_en: A specimen isn't a butterfly — but it's proof butterflies existed. Maybe fifty years from now, someone hears that recording and understands a way of seeing they'd never imagined. In that moment, that dialect is alive in them.
options.feedback: Professor Meng sets her teacup down. She doesn't look out the window this time — she looks at you directly. 'I needed to hear that,' she says. 'Thank you.'

options.text_zh: 也许可以教给新一代的苗族人？
options.text_pinyin: Yěxǔ kěyǐ jiāo gěi xīn yī dài de Miáozú rén?
options.text_en: Maybe you could teach it to a new generation of Miao people?
options.feedback: Professor Meng folds her hands on the table. 'The communities dispersed years ago,' she says, quietly. Not unkind — but it's clear you haven't fully followed where she's been leading.

options.text_zh: 您后悔花了一辈子做这件事吗？
options.text_pinyin: Nín hòuhuǐ huā le yībèizi zuò zhè jiàn shì ma?
options.text_en: Do you regret spending your whole life on this?
options.feedback: Professor Meng looks slightly taken aback. 'No,' she says — immediately, firmly. But the abruptness of the question seems to have put distance between you.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 在某个人心里重新变成蝴蝶……谢谢你。我需要听到这句话。有时候我觉得自己像是一个人在黑暗里搬运东西，不知道搬到哪里去，不知道有没有人会打开那些箱子。但你说得对——可能性比确定性更值得守护。只要那些录音在，门就没有完全关上。
turns.text_pinyin: Zài mǒu ge rén xīnlǐ chóngxīn biàn chéng húdié…… xièxie nǐ. Wǒ xūyào tīng dào zhè jù huà. Yǒu shíhou wǒ juéde zìjǐ xiàng shì yī ge rén zài hēi'àn lǐ bānyùn dōngxi, bù zhīdào bān dào nǎlǐ qù, bù zhīdào yǒu méiyǒu rén huì dǎkāi nàxiē xiāngzi. Dàn nǐ shuō de duì — kěnéngxìng bǐ quèdìngxìng gèng zhíde shǒuhù. Zhǐyào nàxiē lùyīn zài, mén jiù méiyǒu wánquán guān shàng.
turns.text_en: Becomes a butterfly again in someone's mind… thank you. I needed to hear that. Sometimes I feel like I'm carrying things alone in the dark, not knowing where to take them, not knowing if anyone will ever open those boxes. But you're right — possibility is more worth guarding than certainty. As long as those recordings exist, the door hasn't fully closed.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her image of carrying things in the dark.

options.text_zh: 方老人把声音留给了您，您把声音留给了录音，录音把声音留给了未来。这条链条只要不断，那种看世界的眼睛就有可能再次睁开。您不是在黑暗里搬运——是在黑暗里种灯。
options.text_pinyin: Fāng lǎorén bǎ shēngyīn liú gěi le nín, nín bǎ shēngyīn liú gěi le lùyīn, lùyīn bǎ shēngyīn liú gěi le wèilái. Zhè tiáo liàntiáo zhǐyào bú duàn, nà zhǒng kàn shìjiè de yǎnjing jiù yǒu kěnéng zàicì zhēng kāi. Nín bú shì zài hēi'àn lǐ bānyùn — shì zài hēi'àn lǐ zhǒng dēng.
options.text_en: Elder Fang gave his sounds to you. You gave them to recordings. The recordings give them to the future. As long as that chain holds, those eyes might open again.
options.feedback: Professor Meng is quiet for a long moment. Then she picks up her pen and writes something on the inside cover of the notebook — not a transcription this time. Something for herself.

options.text_zh: 您的录音有没有上传到数字存档平台？
options.text_pinyin: Nín de lùyīn yǒu méiyǒu shàngchuán dào shùzì cúndàng píngtái?
options.text_en: Have you uploaded your recordings to a digital archive platform?
options.feedback: Professor Meng blinks — slightly startled by the gear shift. 'Part of them,' she says. 'It's a slow process.' She sounds like she's talking to a different kind of person now.

options.text_zh: 中国政府对方言保护有什么具体政策吗？
options.text_pinyin: Zhōngguó zhèngfǔ duì fāngyán bǎohù yǒu shénme jùtǐ zhèngcè ma?
options.text_en: Does the Chinese government have any concrete policies for dialect preservation?
options.feedback: Professor Meng gives a careful, practiced answer. You can tell she's been asked this at conferences. The intimacy of the last few minutes quietly dissolves.

tree.cultural_note: China is home to hundreds of endangered languages and dialects beyond Mandarin. The Miao (苗族) language family alone contains dozens of mutually unintelligible varieties, many undocumented. When the last speaker of a variety dies, an entire cognitive architecture — ways of categorizing nature, expressing relationships, perceiving time — disappears irreversibly. Field linguists working in China's minority regions often race against time with minimal funding, documenting what they can before silence falls.

tree.setup: You're visiting a friend who teaches philosophy at a small university. He takes you to an empty classroom after hours. Chalk dust still lingers in the air. He seems contemplative.
tree.setup_zh: 你去看一个在小大学教哲学的朋友。下课后他带你去了一间空教室。空气中还飘着粉笔灰。他看起来若有所思。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你闻到了吗？粉笔灰的味道。每次走进空教室我都会闻到。这个味道让我想起一个问题：一堂课结束以后，它去了哪里？板书被擦了，笔记被合上了，学生走了。课的「内容」也许还在某个人的脑子里——但课本身呢？那个由特定的人、特定的时间、特定的光线构成的「此刻」，消失了。教学是所有艺术中最短暂的——连一张照片都留不下。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ wén dào le ma? Fěnbǐ huī de wèidào. Měi cì zǒu jìn kōng jiàoshì wǒ dōu huì wén dào. Zhège wèidào ràng wǒ xiǎng qǐ yī ge wèntí: yī táng kè jiéshù yǐhòu, tā qù le nǎlǐ? Bǎnshū bèi cā le, bǐjì bèi hé shàng le, xuéshēng zǒu le. Kè de 'nèiróng' yěxǔ hái zài mǒu ge rén de nǎozi lǐ — dàn kè běnshēn ne? Nàge yóu tèdìng de rén, tèdìng de shíjiān, tèdìng de guāngxiàn gòuchéng de 'cǐ kè', xiāoshī le. Jiàoxué shì suǒyǒu yìshù zhōng zuì duǎnzàn de — lián yī zhāng zhàopiàn dōu liú bú xià.
turns.text_en: Do you smell it? Chalk dust. I smell it every time I enter an empty classroom. That smell makes me think: after a class ends, where does it go? The board is erased, notebooks closed, students gone. The 'content' might still be in someone's head — but the class itself? That 'moment' composed of specific people, specific time, specific light — it vanishes. Teaching is the most ephemeral of all arts — you can't even keep a photograph.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to his idea that teaching is the most ephemeral art.

options.text_zh: 最短暂的艺术——但也许正因为短暂，才最纯粹。画家留下画，作家留下书，老师什么都不留——除了对一个人思维方式的改变。改变是看不见的，也不署名。教学的产物是一个人内在的微小位移——可能十年后才被感知到。
options.text_pinyin: Zuì duǎnzàn de yìshù — dàn yěxǔ zhèng yīnwèi duǎnzàn, cái zuì chúncuì. Huàjiā liú xià huà, zuòjiā liú xià shū, lǎoshī shénme dōu bù liú — chúle duì yī ge rén sīwéi fāngshì de gǎibiàn. Gǎibiàn shì kàn bú jiàn de, yě bù shǔmíng. Jiàoxué de chǎnwù shì yī ge rén nèizài de wēixiǎo wèiyí — kěnéng shí nián hòu cái bèi gǎnzhī dào.
options.text_en: The most ephemeral art — but maybe because it's ephemeral, the purest. Teachers leave nothing except a change in how someone thinks. That change is invisible, unsigned. A tiny inner displacement — maybe only felt ten years later.
options.feedback: He turns toward you slowly, like he wasn't expecting that. "微小位移。" He repeats it quietly, testing the phrase. "对。就是这个。"

options.text_zh: 可以录像啊，现在很多课都有回放。
options.text_pinyin: Kěyǐ lùxiàng a, xiànzài hěn duō kè dōu yǒu huífàng.
options.text_en: You could record it — many classes have replays now.
options.feedback: He nods politely but his gaze drifts back to the empty chairs. "录像录的是我在说话。录不到那个——" He trails off, not quite explaining it.

options.text_zh: 那你为什么还要教？
options.text_pinyin: Nà nǐ wèishéme hái yào jiāo?
options.text_en: So why do you keep teaching?
options.feedback: He gives you a sideways look — a little amused, a little caught off guard. "你问的这个……我刚才其实是想往另一个方向说的。" He pauses. "但这也是个好问题。"

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 微小位移——这个词用得精准。今天下午我在讲庄子的「无用之用」，有个女生突然停下了笔，抬起头看了我几秒钟。就那几秒钟，我知道某个东西在她脑子里移动了。但我不知道移动了什么，她自己可能也不知道。那几秒钟就是教学最有价值的瞬间——但它不可记录、不可重复、不可考核。整个教育体系都在追求可量化的结果，但真正改变一个人的那个瞬间，恰恰是不可量化的。
turns.text_pinyin: Wēixiǎo wèiyí — zhège cí yòng de jīngzhǔn. Jīntiān xiàwǔ wǒ zài jiǎng Zhuāngzǐ de 'wúyòng zhī yòng', yǒu ge nǚshēng tūrán tíng xià le bǐ, tái qǐ tóu kàn le wǒ jǐ miǎozhōng. Jiù nà jǐ miǎozhōng, wǒ zhīdào mǒu ge dōngxi zài tā nǎozi lǐ yídòng le. Dàn wǒ bù zhīdào yídòng le shénme, tā zìjǐ kěnéng yě bù zhīdào. Nà jǐ miǎozhōng jiù shì jiàoxué zuì yǒu jiàzhí de shùnjiān — dàn tā bùkě jìlù, bùkě chóngfù, bùkě kǎohé. Zhěnggè jiàoyù tǐxì dōu zài zhuīqiú kě liànghuà de jiéguǒ, dàn zhēnzhèng gǎibiàn yī ge rén de nàge shùnjiān, qiàqiǎ shì bùkě liànghuà de.
turns.text_en: Tiny displacement — precisely put. This afternoon teaching Zhuangzi's 'usefulness of the useless,' a girl stopped writing, looked up at me for a few seconds. Something moved in her mind. But it's unrecordable, unrepeatable, unexaminable. The entire education system pursues quantifiable outcomes, but the moment that truly changes a person is what can't be quantified.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to that moment — the girl stopping her pen, something moving.

options.text_zh: 你在讲「无用之用」的时候，恰恰发生了一个「无用之用」的瞬间。那几秒钟不会出现在考试卷上，不会被评估系统捕获——但可能是她这学期最重要的几秒钟。真正的教育和教育评估之间，有一个结构性的错位。
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ zài jiǎng 'wúyòng zhī yòng' de shíhou, qiàqiǎ fāshēng le yī ge 'wúyòng zhī yòng' de shùnjiān. Nà jǐ miǎozhōng bú huì chūxiàn zài kǎoshì juǎn shàng, bú huì bèi pínggū xìtǒng bǔhuò — dàn kěnéng shì tā zhè xuéqī zuì zhòngyào de jǐ miǎozhōng. Zhēnzhèng de jiàoyù hé jiàoyù pínggū zhī jiān, yǒu yī ge jiégòuxìng de cuòwèi.
options.text_en: While teaching 'the usefulness of the useless,' a moment of 'useless usefulness' occurred. Those seconds won't appear on any exam — but may be the most important of her semester. Between real education and its evaluation, there's a structural misalignment.
options.feedback: He laughs once — short, a little surprised. "结构性的错位。" He leans back against the desk. "我跟学院说了三年了，说不清楚——你刚才三句话说清楚了。"

options.text_zh: 她后来问你问题了吗？
options.text_pinyin: Tā hòulái wèn nǐ wèntí le ma?
options.text_en: Did she ask you a question afterward?
options.feedback: He thinks for a second. "没有。下课就走了。" He says it like that's exactly the point. "就是这样——什么都没发生，又什么都发生了。"

options.text_zh: 现在的学生对哲学感兴趣吗？
options.text_pinyin: Xiànzài de xuéshēng duì zhéxué gǎn xìngqù ma?
options.text_en: Are students interested in philosophy these days?
options.feedback: He tilts his head — it's not quite the question he was expecting. "有的感兴趣，有的是被调剂来的。" A small shrug. "跟以前差不多吧。"

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 结构性错位——准确。整个系统用论文数量、考试分数、就业率来衡量教育，但教育最核心的东西——一个人的觉醒——恰恰不在这些指标里。你知道最讽刺的是什么吗？如果那个女生期末考试考了满分，系统会说「教学有效」。如果她考得很差，但十年后因为那几秒钟的停顿重新审视了自己的人生——这种效果，系统看不到。我们建了一个只能看到短期结果的教育体制，然后用它来评判一个本质上是长期甚至终生才能显现的过程。
turns.text_pinyin: Jiégòuxìng cuòwèi — zhǔnquè. Zhěnggè xìtǒng yòng lùnwén shùliàng, kǎoshì fēnshù, jiùyè lǜ lái héngliáng jiàoyù, dàn jiàoyù zuì héxīn de dōngxi — yī ge rén de juéxǐng — qiàqiǎ bú zài zhèxiē zhǐbiāo lǐ. Nǐ zhīdào zuì fěngcì de shì shénme ma? Rúguǒ nàge nǚshēng qīmò kǎoshì kǎo le mǎnfēn, xìtǒng huì shuō 'jiàoxué yǒuxiào'. Rúguǒ tā kǎo de hěn chà, dàn shí nián hòu yīnwèi nà jǐ miǎozhōng de tíngdùn chóngxīn shěnshì le zìjǐ de rénshēng — zhè zhǒng xiàoguǒ, xìtǒng kàn bú dào. Wǒmen jiàn le yī ge zhǐ néng kàn dào duǎnqī jiéguǒ de jiàoyù tǐzhì, ránhòu yòng tā lái pínpàn yī ge běnzhì shàng shì chángqī shènzhì zhōngshēng cáinéng xiǎnxiàn de guòchéng.
turns.text_en: Structural misalignment — precise. The system measures education with paper counts, scores, employment rates, but education's essence — a person's awakening — isn't in those metrics. If that girl aces the final, the system says 'effective.' If she scores poorly but ten years later, because of that pause, re-examines her life — the system can't see that. We've built an evaluation for short-term results judging a lifelong process.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the gap between teaching's timescale and evaluation's timescale.

options.text_zh: 也许真正的教学评估应该在二十年后——但那时没人能把某个改变追溯到某堂课了。教学的悲剧和美好在于同一件事：你永远无法证明你做过的事有意义。但你知道粉笔灰的味道为什么让你留在这里。这间空教室不是空的。
options.text_pinyin: Yěxǔ zhēnzhèng de jiàoxué pínggū yīnggāi zài èrshí nián hòu — dàn nà shí méi rén néng bǎ mǒu ge gǎibiàn zhuīsù dào mǒu táng kè le. Jiàoxué de bēijù hé měihǎo zàiyú tóng yī jiàn shì: nǐ yǒngyuǎn wúfǎ zhèngmíng nǐ zuò guò de shì yǒu yìyì. Dàn nǐ zhīdào fěnbǐ huī de wèidào wèishéme ràng nǐ liú zài zhèlǐ. Zhè jiān kōng jiàoshì bú shì kōng de.
options.text_en: Maybe true teaching evaluation should happen twenty years later — but by then, no one can trace a change to a specific class. Teaching's tragedy and beauty are the same thing: you can never prove what you did mattered. But you know why chalk dust keeps you here. This empty classroom isn't empty.
options.feedback: He's quiet for a moment. He looks around the room — the rows of empty chairs, the dusty board — as if seeing it slightly differently. "这间空教室不是空的。" He repeats your phrase back, slowly. Then he just nods.

options.text_zh: 你有没有想过离开学术界？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ yǒu méiyǒu xiǎng guò líkāi xuéshùjiè?
options.text_en: Have you thought about leaving academia?
options.feedback: He tilts his head, slightly caught off guard by the shift. "想过。" A pause. "但每次走进来闻到这个味道——" He gestures vaguely at the room. "就又不想了。"

options.text_zh: 也许应该改革教育评估体系。
options.text_pinyin: Yěxǔ yīnggāi gǎigé jiàoyù pínggū tǐxì.
options.text_en: Maybe the education evaluation system should be reformed.
options.feedback: He nods, but his expression is tired. "当然应该。" He looks at the empty chairs again. "但我今晚不想谈这个。今晚就想在这里站一会儿。"

tree.cultural_note: The tension between quantifiable outcomes and genuine education is acute in China's exam-driven system. Zhuangzi's concept of 无用之用 (the usefulness of the useless) has never been more relevant — philosophy departments at Chinese universities are often under pressure to justify their 'practical value,' yet their most valuable contributions are precisely what can't be measured. The smell of chalk dust (粉笔灰) is itself becoming nostalgic as digital whiteboards replace blackboards.

tree.setup: You meet a guqin player in a temple courtyard at dusk. She hasn't performed publicly in years. The instrument sits on a stone table, untouched. She stares at it while speaking to you.
tree.setup_zh: 黄昏时分，你在一座寺院的庭院里遇到一位古琴演奏者。她已经很多年没有公开演出了。古琴放在石桌上，没有人碰。她一边看着琴一边和你说话。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 我已经三年没有弹给别人听了。不是因为弹不好——恰恰相反，是因为弹得越来越好了。你可能觉得这很矛盾。但当你的琴技到了某个程度，你会发现观众成了一种干扰。他们的期待、他们的鼓掌、他们的评价——这些都在你和音乐之间加了一层东西。没有观众的时候，我和琴之间什么都没有，只有声音。
turns.text_pinyin: Wǒ yǐjīng sān nián méiyǒu tán gěi biéren tīng le. Bú shì yīnwèi tán bù hǎo — qiàqiǎ xiāngfǎn, shì yīnwèi tán de yuè lái yuè hǎo le. Nǐ kěnéng juéde zhè hěn máodùn. Dàn dāng nǐ de qín jì dào le mǒu ge chéngdù, nǐ huì fāxiàn guānzhòng chéng le yī zhǒng gānrǎo. Tāmen de qīdài, tāmen de gǔzhǎng, tāmen de píngjià — zhèxiē dōu zài nǐ hé yīnyuè zhī jiān jiā le yī céng dōngxi. Méiyǒu guānzhòng de shíhou, wǒ hé qín zhī jiān shénme dōu méiyǒu, zhǐyǒu shēngyīn.
turns.text_en: I haven't played for anyone in three years. Not because I can't play well — quite the opposite, because I play better and better. You might find that contradictory. But when your skill reaches a certain level, you discover that the audience becomes interference. Their expectations, their applause, their judgments — all add a layer between you and the music. Without an audience, there's nothing between me and the instrument — only sound.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her withdrawal from performing.

options.text_zh: 观众成了干扰——这不是傲慢，是一种对纯粹的追求。当你不再为别人弹，而是为声音本身弹的时候，弹琴的目的就从「被听到」变成了「去听」。你不是在演奏，你是在倾听琴要对你说什么。这是一个根本性的翻转。
options.text_pinyin: Guānzhòng chéng le gānrǎo — zhè bú shì àomàn, shì yī zhǒng duì chúncuì de zhuīqiú. Dāng nǐ bú zài wèi biéren tán, ér shì wèi shēngyīn běnshēn tán de shíhou, tán qín de mùdì jiù cóng 'bèi tīng dào' biàn chéng le 'qù tīng'. Nǐ bú shì zài yǎnzòu, nǐ shì zài qīngtīng qín yào duì nǐ shuō shénme. Zhè shì yī ge gēnběnxìng de fānzhuǎn.
options.text_en: The audience as interference — not arrogance, but a pursuit of purity.
options.feedback: From performing to listening — the musician as servant of the instrument.

options.text_zh: 但是音乐不是应该分享的吗？
options.text_pinyin: Dànshì yīnyuè bú shì yīnggāi fēnxiǎng de ma?
options.text_en: But isn't music meant to be shared?
options.feedback: Challenges her with a common assumption she's already moved beyond.

options.text_zh: 你以前在哪里演出？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ yǐqián zài nǎlǐ yǎnchū?
options.text_en: Where did you used to perform?
options.feedback: Asks about her past career during a philosophical disclosure.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 根本性的翻转——对，就是这个。我年轻的时候参加比赛、开音乐会，所有的练习都是为了「被评判」。每一个音符都在问：「我弹对了吗？他们觉得好吗？」但现在，每一个音符只在问一件事：「这个声音在此刻是真实的吗？」当你不需要任何人的认可时，你会发现你其实不需要弹得「好」——你只需要弹得「真」。
turns.text_pinyin: Gēnběnxìng de fānzhuǎn — duì, jiù shì zhège. Wǒ niánqīng de shíhou cānjiā bǐsài, kāi yīnyuè huì, suǒyǒu de liànxí dōu shì wèile 'bèi pínpàn'. Měi yī ge yīnfú dōu zài wèn: 'wǒ tán duì le ma? Tāmen juéde hǎo ma?' Dàn xiànzài, měi yī ge yīnfú zhǐ zài wèn yī jiàn shì: 'zhège shēngyīn zài cǐ kè shì zhēnshí de ma?' Dāng nǐ bù xūyào rènhé rén de rènkě shí, nǐ huì fāxiàn nǐ qíshí bù xūyào tán de 'hǎo' — nǐ zhǐ xūyào tán de 'zhēn'.
turns.text_en: Fundamental inversion — yes, exactly. When I was young I competed, gave concerts, all practice was for 'being judged.' Every note asked: 'Did I play correctly? Do they think it's good?' But now, every note asks only one thing: 'Is this sound true in this moment?' When you don't need anyone's approval, you discover you don't need to play 'well' — you only need to play 'truly.'

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the distinction between playing well and playing truly.

options.text_zh: 「好」和「真」的区别——也许是所有艺术的核心问题。「好」是外部标准，需要参照他人；「真」是内部标准，只需参照此刻。技术让你弹得「好」，但只有放弃对「好」的执念才能到达「真」。你这三年的沉默不是退出——是终于找到了弹琴的真正原因。
options.text_pinyin: 'Hǎo' hé 'zhēn' de qūbié — yěxǔ shì suǒyǒu yìshù de héxīn wèntí. 'Hǎo' shì wàibù biāozhǔn, xūyào cānzhào tārén; 'zhēn' shì nèibù biāozhǔn, zhǐ xū cānzhào cǐ kè. Jìshù ràng nǐ tán de 'hǎo', dàn zhǐyǒu fàngqì duì 'hǎo' de zhíniàn cáinéng dàodá 'zhēn'. Nǐ zhè sān nián de chénmò bú shì tuìchū — shì zhōngyú zhǎo dào le tán qín de zhēnzhèng yuányīn.
options.text_en: The difference between 'well' and 'truly' — maybe the core question of all art. 'Well' is external, needing others for reference; 'truly' is internal, needing only this moment. Technique lets you play 'well,' but only by releasing that obsession can you reach 'truly.' Your three years of silence isn't withdrawal — it's finally finding the real reason to play.
options.feedback: Reframes silence as arrival, not departure — the real reason to play was always internal.

options.text_zh: 古琴很难学吗？
options.text_pinyin: Gǔqín hěn nán xué ma?
options.text_en: Is guqin hard to learn?
options.feedback: A beginner question to a master in philosophical depth.

options.text_zh: 你会不会有一天重新演出？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ huì bú huì yǒu yī tiān chóngxīn yǎnchū?
options.text_en: Will you ever perform again?
options.feedback: Looks to the future when the present realization is the point.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 找到了弹琴的真正原因……你知道吗，古人有一个说法叫「对牛弹琴」，大家都觉得是在讽刺听不懂的人。但我现在不这样想了。也许那个弹琴的人从一开始就不需要懂的听众——他只需要一个在场者。牛在场了。风在场了。那就够了。音乐不是一种交流——它是一种存在。它发出声音，不是为了被理解，是为了在这个宇宙里留下一个振动。理解是人的需要，不是声音的需要。
turns.text_pinyin: Zhǎo dào le tán qín de zhēnzhèng yuányīn…… nǐ zhīdào ma, gǔrén yǒu yī ge shuōfǎ jiào 'duì niú tán qín', dàjiā dōu juéde shì zài fěngcì tīng bù dǒng de rén. Dàn wǒ xiànzài bù zhèyàng xiǎng le. Yěxǔ nàge tán qín de rén cóng yī kāishǐ jiù bù xūyào dǒng de tīngzhòng — tā zhǐ xūyào yī ge zàichǎng zhě. Niú zàichǎng le. Fēng zàichǎng le. Nà jiù gòu le. Yīnyuè bú shì yī zhǒng jiāoliú — tā shì yī zhǒng cúnzài. Tā fāchū shēngyīn, bú shì wèile bèi lǐjiě, shì wèile zài zhège yǔzhòu lǐ liú xià yī ge zhèndòng. Lǐjiě shì rén de xūyào, bú shì shēngyīn de xūyào.
turns.text_en: Found the real reason to play... the ancients said 'playing the lute to a cow' — everyone thinks it mocks uncomprehending listeners. But maybe the player never needed a comprehending audience — only a present one. The cow is present. The wind is present. That's enough. Music isn't communication — it's existence. It makes sound not to be understood, but to leave a vibration in this universe.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her reinterpretation of 'playing the lute to a cow.'

options.text_zh: 理解是人的需要，不是声音的需要——也许艺术的目的只是「发生」。一个声音在空气中出现，不需要被接收，只需要存在。那头牛不需要懂琴，但它的在场让声音有了着陆点。最深的聆听不是理解，只是「在那里」。
options.text_pinyin: Lǐjiě shì rén de xūyào, bú shì shēngyīn de xūyào — yěxǔ yìshù de mùdì zhǐ shì 'fāshēng'. Yī ge shēngyīn zài kōngqì zhōng chūxiàn, bù xūyào bèi jiēshōu, zhǐ xūyào cúnzài. Nà tóu niú bù xūyào dǒng qín, dàn tā de zàichǎng ràng shēngyīn yǒu le zhuólù diǎn. Zuì shēn de língtīng bú shì lǐjiě, zhǐ shì 'zài nàlǐ'.
options.text_en: Understanding is a human need, not sound's need — maybe art's purpose is simply to 'happen.' A sound appearing in the air, needing no reception, only existence. The cow doesn't need to understand the lute, but its presence gives the sound a landing point. The deepest listening isn't understanding — just being there.
options.feedback: Art needs no comprehension, only presence — the cow as the most honest audience.

options.text_zh: 那你现在会弹一首给我听吗？
options.text_pinyin: Nà nǐ xiànzài huì tán yī shǒu gěi wǒ tīng ma?
options.text_en: Would you play something for me now?
options.feedback: Requests a performance from someone who just explained why she doesn't perform.

options.text_zh: 你觉得伯牙和钟子期的故事是什么意思？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ juéde Bóyá hé Zhōng Zǐqī de gùshi shì shénme yìsi?
options.text_en: What do you think the story of Boya and Zhong Ziqi means?
options.feedback: Brings up another story when she's already reframing the tradition.

tree.cultural_note: The guqin (古琴) is one of the oldest Chinese instruments and has always been associated with solo contemplation rather than public performance. The idiom 对牛弹琴 has traditionally been a mockery of incomprehension, but this musician's reinterpretation — that the cow's presence is enough — aligns with a deeper strand of Chinese aesthetic philosophy: art as self-cultivation rather than communication. The ancient saying 独乐乐 (joy in solitude) captures the same idea.

tree.setup: You're sitting on rubble that was once a courtyard garden in an old Beijing hutong. A retired architect, Mr. Wu, who designed the garden decades ago, has come to see it one last time before complete demolition.
tree.setup_zh: 你坐在废墟上——这里曾经是北京一条老胡同里的庭院花园。退休建筑师吴先生几十年前设计了这个花园，他来最后看一眼，然后就要彻底拆除了。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 这块地方以前有一棵石榴树，那边有一个小水池。每年秋天石榴红了，从二楼窗户看下去，整个院子像一幅画。我1987年设计的这个花园，用了一个原则——「借景」。院子虽然小，但我把远处那棵老槐树借进来了，站在这个角度看，它好像长在院子里。现在老槐树也要砍了。借不到了。
turns.text_pinyin: Zhè kuài dìfang yǐqián yǒu yī kē shíliú shù, nàbiān yǒu yī ge xiǎo shuǐchí. Měi nián qiūtiān shíliú hóng le, cóng èr lóu chuānghu kàn xiàqù, zhěnggè yuànzi xiàng yī fú huà. Wǒ yī jiǔ bā qī nián shèjì de zhège huāyuán, yòng le yī ge yuánzé — 'jiè jǐng'. Yuànzi suīrán xiǎo, dàn wǒ bǎ yuǎnchù nà kē lǎo huáishù jiè jìnlái le, zhàn zài zhège jiǎodù kàn, tā hǎoxiàng zhǎng zài yuànzi lǐ. Xiànzài lǎo huáishù yě yào kǎn le. Jiè bú dào le.
turns.text_en: There used to be a pomegranate tree here, a pond over there. Every autumn the pomegranates turned red — from the second floor, the whole courtyard was like a painting. I designed this garden in 1987 using one principle — 'borrowed scenery.' The courtyard was small, but I borrowed that old scholar tree — from this angle, it seemed to grow in the courtyard. Now that tree is being cut too. Nothing left to borrow.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the loss of the borrowed scenery.

options.text_zh: 「借景」的前提是景还在——远处的树被砍、天际线被高楼取代，「借」的对象消失了，花园的空间感就崩塌了。您设计的不只是花园，是花园和世界之间的关系。关系的一端拆了，另一端也失去了意义。
options.text_pinyin: 'Jiè jǐng' de qiántí shì jǐng hái zài — yuǎnchù de shù bèi kǎn, tiānjìxiàn bèi gāolóu qǔdài, 'jiè' de duìxiàng xiāoshī le, huāyuán de kōngjiān gǎn jiù bēngtā le. Nín shèjì de bù zhǐ shì huāyuán, shì huāyuán hé shìjiè zhī jiān de guānxi. Guānxi de yī duān chāi le, lìng yī duān yě shīqù le yìyì.
options.text_en: 'Borrowed scenery' requires the scenery to exist. When the distant tree is cut, the skyline replaced by towers, the 'borrowing' vanishes and the garden's spatial sense collapses. You designed not just a garden, but a relationship between garden and world. Sever one end, the other loses meaning.
options.feedback: Borrowed scenery as relational design — when the world changes, the garden dies twice.

options.text_zh: 能不能移植那棵槐树？
options.text_pinyin: Néng bù néng yízhí nà kē huáishù?
options.text_en: Could the scholar tree be transplanted?
options.feedback: A logistical solution to an irreversible spatial loss.

options.text_zh: 新建筑会有花园吗？
options.text_pinyin: Xīn jiànzhù huì yǒu huāyuán ma?
options.text_en: Will the new building have a garden?
options.feedback: Asks about replacement during a moment of irreversible loss.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 关系——你说到了最痛的地方。中国传统园林从来不是孤立的——它和山、水、天空是一个整体。苏州的拙政园为什么美？因为设计师知道墙外有什么，知道什么时候月亮会出现在那个窗户的位置。园林的一半在墙内，一半在墙外。现在的开发商造花园，就是在小区中间放几棵树、一个喷泉。那不是花园，那是装饰。花园需要和外面的世界呼吸——但现在外面的世界不允许你呼吸了。
turns.text_pinyin: Guānxi — nǐ shuō dào le zuì tòng de dìfang. Zhōngguó chuántǒng yuánlín cónglái bú shì gūlì de — tā hé shān, shuǐ, tiānkōng shì yī ge zhěngtǐ. Sūzhōu de Zhuōzhèng Yuán wèishéme měi? Yīnwèi shèjìshī zhīdào qiáng wài yǒu shénme, zhīdào shénme shíhou yuèliang huì chūxiàn zài nàge chuānghu de wèizhì. Yuánlín de yībàn zài qiáng nèi, yībàn zài qiáng wài. Xiànzài de kāifāshāng zào huāyuán, jiù shì zài xiǎoqū zhōngjiān fàng jǐ kē shù, yī ge pēnquán. Nà bú shì huāyuán, nà shì zhuāngshì. Huāyuán xūyào hé wàimiàn de shìjiè hūxī — dàn xiànzài wàimiàn de shìjiè bù yǔnxǔ nǐ hūxī le.
turns.text_en: Relationship — you've hit the sorest point. Chinese gardens were never isolated — they were one whole with mountains, water, sky. Why is Suzhou's Humble Administrator's Garden beautiful? The designer knew what was beyond the wall, when the moon would appear in that window. Half a garden is inside the wall, half outside. Today's developers place trees and a fountain in a compound. That's not a garden, it's decoration.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the distinction between garden and decoration.

options.text_zh: 花园的一半在墙外——当墙外变成停车场和玻璃幕墙，「借」的可能性就被切断了。不是花园死了——是花园能呼吸的那个世界死了。一旦对话切断，即使原样重建，它也只是复制品，不再是活的空间。
options.text_pinyin: Huāyuán de yībàn zài qiáng wài — dāng qiáng wài biàn chéng tíngchēchǎng hé bōli mùqiáng, 'jiè' de kěnéngxìng jiù bèi qiēduàn le. Bú shì huāyuán sǐ le — shì huāyuán néng hūxī de nàge shìjiè sǐ le. Yīdàn duìhuà qiēduàn, jíshǐ yuányàng chóngjiàn, tā yě zhǐ shì fùzhìpǐn, bú zài shì huó de kōngjiān.
options.text_en: Half the garden is outside the wall — when outside becomes parking lots and glass curtain walls, 'borrowing' is severed. It's not that the garden died — the world it breathed with died. Once severed, even an exact rebuild is just a replica, no longer a living space.
options.feedback: The world the garden breathed with is what died — rebuilding without context is taxidermy.

options.text_zh: 苏州的园林保护得怎么样？
options.text_pinyin: Sūzhōu de yuánlín bǎohù de zěnmeyàng?
options.text_en: How well are Suzhou's gardens preserved?
options.feedback: Asks about other gardens while standing in the ruins of this one.

options.text_zh: 您有没有这个花园的照片？
options.text_pinyin: Nín yǒu méiyǒu zhège huāyuán de zhàopiàn?
options.text_en: Do you have photos of this garden?
options.feedback: Documentation request during a meditation on what photos can't capture.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 活的空间……对。一个花园是活的，它随着光线变化、随着季节呼吸、随着周围的环境调整自己。你可以拍一千张照片，但照片拍不到风穿过石榴树的感觉，拍不到雨后石头上的湿润，拍不到黄昏时老槐树的影子慢慢移过水面。这些不是花园的「特征」——这些就是花园。我现在站在这里，脚下是碎砖头，但我还能闻到石榴树的味道。也许味道是最后消失的东西。
turns.text_pinyin: Huó de kōngjiān…… duì. Yī ge huāyuán shì huó de, tā suízhe guāngxiàn biànhuà, suízhe jìjié hūxī, suízhe zhōuwéi de huánjìng tiáozhěng zìjǐ. Nǐ kěyǐ pāi yīqiān zhāng zhàopiàn, dàn zhàopiàn pāi bú dào fēng chuānguò shíliú shù de gǎnjué, pāi bú dào yǔ hòu shítou shàng de shīrùn, pāi bú dào huánghūn shí lǎo huáishù de yǐngzi mànman yí guò shuǐmiàn. Zhèxiē bú shì huāyuán de 'tèzhēng' — zhèxiē jiù shì huāyuán. Wǒ xiànzài zhàn zài zhèlǐ, jiǎo xià shì suì zhuāntou, dàn wǒ hái néng wén dào shíliú shù de wèidào. Yěxǔ wèidào shì zuìhòu xiāoshī de dōngxi.
turns.text_en: A garden is alive — it shifts with light, breathes with seasons, adjusts with surroundings. A thousand photos can't capture wind through a pomegranate tree, moisture on stones after rain, the scholar tree's shadow crossing the water at dusk. These aren't the garden's 'features' — they are the garden. Standing here now, broken bricks underfoot, I can still smell the pomegranate tree. Maybe scent is the last thing to disappear.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to scent as the last trace of the garden.

options.text_zh: 味道是最后消失的——因为味道不需要形状、不需要结构，它可以在废墟上继续存在。也许多年以后，有人走过这里，突然闻到一种说不清的香味——那是埋在土里的石榴树根最后一次呼吸。那个瞬间，花园通过气味短暂地复活了。
options.text_pinyin: Wèidào shì zuìhòu xiāoshī de — yīnwèi wèidào bù xūyào xíngzhuàng, bù xūyào jiégòu, tā kěyǐ zài fèixū shàng jìxù cúnzài. Yěxǔ duō nián yǐhòu, yǒu rén zǒu guò zhèlǐ, tūrán wén dào yī zhǒng shuō bù qīng de xiāngwèi — nà shì mái zài tǔ lǐ de shíliú shù gēn zuìhòu yī cì hūxī. Nàge shùnjiān, huāyuán tōngguò qìwèi duǎnzàn de fùhuó le.
options.text_en: Scent is the last to disappear — it needs no shape, no structure, it can persist atop ruins. Years from now, someone passing here will catch an inexplicable fragrance — the buried pomegranate roots breathing one last time. In that instant, the garden briefly revives through scent.
options.feedback: Beauty returns as scent from buried roots — the garden's afterlife in a stranger's passing awareness.

options.text_zh: 这块地会建什么？
options.text_pinyin: Zhè kuài dì huì jiàn shénme?
options.text_en: What will be built on this land?
options.feedback: Asks about construction plans while standing in a moment of mourning.

options.text_zh: 您设计过其他的花园吗？
options.text_pinyin: Nín shèjì guò qítā de huāyuán ma?
options.text_en: Have you designed other gardens?
options.feedback: A portfolio question during a funeral for this one.

tree.cultural_note: 借景 (jiè jǐng, borrowed scenery) is one of the most sophisticated principles of Chinese garden design, integrating elements beyond the garden's walls — distant mountains, neighboring trees, the sky — into the garden's visual composition. The destruction of Beijing's hutong gardens is one of the city's most lamented cultural losses. The concept that 'half the garden is outside the wall' encapsulates a worldview where boundaries are porous and beauty is relational, not contained.

tree.setup: In a centuries-old soy sauce workshop in Fujian, you meet Master Lin, who tends fermentation vats that have been active for over a hundred years. The air is thick with umami. He moves slowly among the vats, listening.
tree.setup_zh: 在福建一间有几百年历史的酱油作坊里，你遇到了林师傅。他照料着活跃了一百多年的发酵缸。空气中弥漫着浓郁的鲜味。他在缸之间慢慢走着，侧耳倾听。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你知道吗，这些发酵缸里的菌群比我的年纪大得多——有些已经传了四五代了。每一缸里的微生物生态系统都是独一无二的，是几百年来这个特定环境里自然选择的结果。温度、湿度、木头的年龄、甚至空气中飘过的花粉——都在影响发酵。我不是在「做」酱油。微生物在做。我只是照顾它们。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ zhīdào ma, zhèxiē fājiào gāng lǐ de jūnqún bǐ wǒ de niánjì dà de duō — yǒuxiē yǐjīng chuán le sì wǔ dài le. Měi yī gāng lǐ de wēishēngwù shēngtài xìtǒng dōu shì dúyīwú'èr de, shì jǐ bǎi nián lái zhège tèdìng huánjìng lǐ zìrán xuǎnzé de jiéguǒ. Wēndù, shīdù, mùtou de niánlíng, shènzhì kōngqì zhōng piāo guò de huāfěn — dōu zài yǐngxiǎng fājiào. Wǒ bú shì zài 'zuò' jiàngyóu. Wēishēngwù zài zuò. Wǒ zhǐ shì zhàogù tāmen.
turns.text_en: You know, the microbial colonies in these fermentation vats are much older than me — some have been passed down four or five generations. Each vat's microbial ecosystem is unique, the result of natural selection in this specific environment over centuries. Temperature, humidity, the age of the wood, even pollen drifting through the air — all affect fermentation. I'm not 'making' soy sauce. The microbes are making it. I'm just taking care of them.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to his relationship with the microbes.

options.text_zh: 您不是制造者，是照顾者——这个区别很关键。现代食品工业把发酵当「过程」来控制，您把它当「生命」来照料。这些菌群经历了几百年自然演化，复杂性不可能在实验室复制。您照顾的不是一缸酱油，是一百年的生命记忆。
options.text_pinyin: Nín bú shì zhìzào zhě, shì zhàogù zhě — zhège qūbié hěn guānjiàn. Xiàndài shípǐn gōngyè bǎ fājiào dāng 'guòchéng' lái kòngzhì, nín bǎ tā dāng 'shēngmìng' lái zhàoliào. Zhèxiē jūnqún jīnglì le jǐ bǎi nián zìrán yǎnhuà, fùzáxìng bùkěnéng zài shíyànshì fùzhì. Nín zhàogù de bú shì yī gāng jiàngyóu, shì yī bǎi nián de shēngmìng jìyì.
options.text_en: You're not a maker, you're a caretaker — that distinction is crucial. Modern food industry treats fermentation as a 'process' to control; you treat it as a 'life' to tend. These colonies evolved over centuries with a complexity that can't be replicated in a lab. What you care for isn't a vat of soy sauce — it's a hundred years of living memory.
options.feedback: Maker vs. caretaker — the vats as living evolutionary archives.

options.text_zh: 现代工厂的酱油和您做的有什么区别？
options.text_pinyin: Xiàndài gōngchǎng de jiàngyóu hé nín zuò de yǒu shénme qūbié?
options.text_en: What's the difference between factory soy sauce and yours?
options.feedback: A consumer comparison during a philosophical revelation.

options.text_zh: 发酵需要多长时间？
options.text_pinyin: Fājiào xūyào duō cháng shíjiān?
options.text_en: How long does fermentation take?
options.feedback: A production timeline question during a meditation on living systems.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 一百年的生命记忆——对，就是这个。但最让我焦虑的是继承的问题。这些菌群不是一个配方——你不能写在纸上交给下一个人。它们是活的，需要每天照顾。温度变了怎么办、湿度不对怎么调——这些都是身体记忆，不是知识。我的手知道什么时候搅拌，我的鼻子知道哪一缸需要关注。但我不知道怎么把这些教给别人。我能教的只是「在旁边看三十年」。
turns.text_pinyin: Yī bǎi nián de shēngmìng jìyì — duì, jiù shì zhège. Dàn zuì ràng wǒ jiāolǜ de shì jìchéng de wèntí. Zhèxiē jūnqún bú shì yī ge pèifāng — nǐ bù néng xiě zài zhǐ shàng jiāo gěi xià yī ge rén. Tāmen shì huó de, xūyào měi tiān zhàogù. Wēndù biàn le zěnme bàn, shīdù bú duì zěnme tiáo — zhèxiē dōu shì shēntǐ jìyì, bú shì zhīshi. Wǒ de shǒu zhīdào shénme shíhou jiǎobàn, wǒ de bízi zhīdào nǎ yī gāng xūyào guānzhù. Dàn wǒ bù zhīdào zěnme bǎ zhèxiē jiāo gěi biéren. Wǒ néng jiāo de zhǐ shì 'zài pángbiān kàn sānshí nián'.
turns.text_en: A hundred years of living memory — yes. But what worries me most is succession. These colonies aren't a recipe — you can't write them on paper. They're alive, needing daily care. What to do when temperature shifts, how to adjust humidity — body memories, not knowledge. My hands know when to stir, my nose knows which vat needs attention. All I can teach is 'stand beside me and watch for thirty years.'

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the problem of transmitting body knowledge.

options.text_zh: 「在旁边看三十年」——这是隐性知识传承的核心矛盾。它不存在于语言里，存在于身体和环境的长期互动中。这种知识只能通过共处、模仿、长时间的浸泡来传递。但现在的世界没有耐心等三十年了——智慧不是信息，是时间的沉淀。
options.text_pinyin: 'Zài pángbiān kàn sānshí nián' — zhè shì yǐnxìng zhīshi chuánchéng de héxīn máodùn. Tā bù cúnzài yú yǔyán lǐ, cúnzài yú shēntǐ hé huánjìng de chángqī hùdòng zhōng. Zhè zhǒng zhīshi zhǐ néng tōngguò gòngchǔ, mófǎng, cháng shíjiān de jìnpào lái chuándì. Dàn xiànzài de shìjiè méiyǒu nàixīn děng sānshí nián le — zhìhuì bú shì xìnxī, shì shíjiān de chéndiàn.
options.text_en: 'Watch for thirty years' — the core contradiction of tacit knowledge. It doesn't exist in language, but in long-term interaction between body and environment. This knowledge can only be passed through coexistence, imitation, prolonged immersion. But today's world has no patience for thirty years — wisdom isn't information, it's time's sediment.
options.feedback: Wisdom as time's sediment — irreducible to data, requiring decades of presence.

options.text_zh: 不能用传感器来监测吗？
options.text_pinyin: Bù néng yòng chuángǎnqì lái jiāncè ma?
options.text_en: Couldn't you use sensors to monitor?
options.feedback: A tech solution for what is fundamentally embodied knowledge.

options.text_zh: 您有徒弟吗？
options.text_pinyin: Nín yǒu túdì ma?
options.text_en: Do you have apprentices?
options.feedback: A personnel question during a meditation on the nature of knowledge itself.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 时间的沉淀……没有人比做发酵的人更理解这个词了。你知道最让我伤心的是什么吗？如果有一天这些缸停了——不是被打破，只是没有人继续照顾——菌群就会死。它们不会等你。它们每天都在活着，每天都需要有人在。这不像一件古董可以锁在柜子里保存。这是一种只有在持续照顾中才能存在的遗产。一旦照顾中断，即使只是一个月，几百年的积累就会永远消失。
turns.text_pinyin: Shíjiān de chéndiàn…… méiyǒu rén bǐ zuò fājiào de rén gèng lǐjiě zhège cí le. Nǐ zhīdào zuì ràng wǒ shāngxīn de shì shénme ma? Rúguǒ yǒu yī tiān zhèxiē gāng tíng le — bú shì bèi dǎ pò, zhǐ shì méiyǒu rén jìxù zhàogù — jūnqún jiù huì sǐ. Tāmen bú huì děng nǐ. Tāmen měi tiān dōu zài huó zhe, měi tiān dōu xūyào yǒu rén zài. Zhè bù xiàng yī jiàn gǔdǒng kěyǐ suǒ zài guìzi lǐ bǎocún. Zhè shì yī zhǒng zhǐyǒu zài chíxù zhàogù zhōng cáinéng cúnzài de yíchǎn. Yīdàn zhàogù zhōngduàn, jíshǐ zhǐ shì yī ge yuè, jǐ bǎi nián de jīlěi jiù huì yǒngyuǎn xiāoshī.
turns.text_en: Time's sediment... no one understands that better than a fermentation worker. What saddens me most? If these vats stop — not broken, just untended — the colonies die. They won't wait. They're alive every day, needing someone present every day. This isn't an antique you lock in a cabinet. This heritage only exists through continuous care. If care is interrupted even a month, centuries of accumulation vanish forever.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to heritage that requires continuous care to exist.

options.text_zh: 只有在持续照顾中才能存在的遗产——最脆弱，也最真实。我们理解的「遗产」是静态的——建筑、文物、文献。但您说的是「活的遗产」，存在条件是每天有人在。这跟爱一样——一旦停下来，就慢慢消散。您每天走进作坊，就是在用在场维持几百年的生命。
options.text_pinyin: Zhǐyǒu zài chíxù zhàogù zhōng cáinéng cúnzài de yíchǎn — zuì cuìruò, yě zuì zhēnshí. Wǒmen lǐjiě de 'yíchǎn' shì jìngtài de — jiànzhù, wénwù, wénxiàn. Dàn nín shuō de shì 'huó de yíchǎn', cúnzài tiáojiàn shì měi tiān yǒu rén zài. Zhè gēn ài yīyàng — yīdàn tíng xiàlái, jiù mànman xiāosàn. Nín měi tiān zǒu jìn zuōfáng, jiù shì zài yòng zàichǎng wéichí jǐ bǎi nián de shēngmìng.
options.text_en: Heritage that only exists through continuous care — the most fragile and most authentic. We understand 'heritage' as static — buildings, artifacts, documents. But what you describe is 'living heritage,' whose condition is someone being there every day. It's like love — once you stop, it dissipates. Your walking into this workshop every day is using presence to sustain centuries of life.
options.feedback: Living heritage as daily devotion — presence as the only preservation.

options.text_zh: 政府有没有给你们非遗保护的资金？
options.text_pinyin: Zhèngfǔ yǒu méiyǒu gěi nǐmen fēiyí bǎohù de zījīn?
options.text_en: Does the government give you intangible heritage protection funding?
options.feedback: A policy question at the emotional peak.

options.text_zh: 科学家能不能分析菌群的基因然后保存？
options.text_pinyin: Kēxuéjiā néng bù néng fēnxī jūnqún de jīyīn ránhòu bǎocún?
options.text_en: Could scientists analyze and preserve the colony's genome?
options.feedback: A biotech proposal when the point is about irreducible embodied care.

tree.cultural_note: Traditional Chinese fermentation (酿造) represents one of the world's most sophisticated examples of living heritage. Soy sauce, vinegar, and baijiu workshops maintain microbial ecosystems that have evolved over centuries in specific microclimates. These cannot be replicated — the microbes are adapted to particular wooden vats, building materials, and local air. When a workshop closes, an irreplaceable biological and cultural heritage dies. China's intangible heritage protection system (非遗) attempts to address this, but living fermentation cultures resist the static nature of preservation.

tree.setup: You meet a retired cartographer in a Yunnan tea house. She spent decades mapping rural villages by hand before satellite mapping made her work obsolete. She has a stack of her hand-drawn maps on the table.
tree.setup_zh: 你在云南的一间茶馆里遇到一位退休的制图员。在卫星制图让她的工作变得过时之前，她花了几十年用手绘制农村地图。桌上放着一叠她手绘的地图。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你看这些地图——每一张我都走过那片土地。画一张村庄的地图要在那里住至少一个月。卫星可以在一秒钟内拍下整个区域，但它拍到的和我画的不是同一个东西。卫星看到的是坐标、海拔、建筑面积。我看到的是：这条路雨天会变成泥、这棵树是村里最老的人种的、这片田到了秋天会变金色。这些信息不在卫星图上。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ kàn zhèxiē dìtú — měi yī zhāng wǒ dōu zǒu guò nà piàn tǔdì. Huà yī zhāng cūnzhuāng de dìtú yào zài nàlǐ zhù zhìshǎo yī ge yuè. Wèixīng kěyǐ zài yī miǎozhōng nèi pāi xià zhěnggè qūyù, dàn tā pāi dào de hé wǒ huà de bú shì tóng yī ge dōngxi. Wèixīng kàn dào de shì zuòbiāo, hǎibá, jiànzhù miànjī. Wǒ kàn dào de shì: zhè tiáo lù yǔ tiān huì biàn chéng ní, zhè kē shù shì cūn lǐ zuì lǎo de rén zhǒng de, zhè piàn tián dào le qiūtiān huì biàn jīnsè. Zhèxiē xìnxī bú zài wèixīng tú shàng.
turns.text_en: Look at these maps — every one, I walked that land. Drawing a village map meant living there at least a month. A satellite captures a region in one second, but what it captures and what I drew aren't the same. The satellite sees coordinates, elevation, building area. I saw: this road turns to mud in rain, this tree was planted by the village's oldest resident, this field turns gold in autumn. None of that is on a satellite map.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the difference between her maps and satellite imagery.

options.text_zh: 卫星图是「俯瞰」，您的地图是「亲历」——两种完全不同的认知方式。俯瞰给你精度，但剥离了感官经验和人文记忆。您的地图里有雨的触感、秋天的颜色、一棵树的故事——它们是让土地成为「地方」而不只是「位置」的东西。
options.text_pinyin: Wèixīng tú shì 'fǔkàn', nín de dìtú shì 'qīnlì' — liǎng zhǒng wánquán bùtóng de rènzhī fāngshì. Fǔkàn gěi nǐ jīngdù, dàn bōlí le gǎnguān jīngyàn hé rénwén jìyì. Nín de dìtú lǐ yǒu yǔ de chùgǎn, qiūtiān de yánsè, yī kē shù de gùshì — tāmen shì ràng tǔdì chéngwéi 'dìfang' ér bù zhǐ shì 'wèizhì' de dōngxi.
options.text_en: Satellite maps are 'overview,' yours are 'lived experience' — two completely different ways of knowing. Overview gives precision but strips sensory experience and human memory. Your maps contain rain's touch, autumn's colors, a tree's story — what makes land a 'place' rather than a 'location.'
options.feedback: Place vs. location — her maps contain what satellites structurally cannot see.

options.text_zh: 但是卫星地图更准确吧？
options.text_pinyin: Dànshì wèixīng dìtú gèng zhǔnquè ba?
options.text_en: But satellite maps are more accurate, right?
options.feedback: Argues for the technology that displaced her.

options.text_zh: 您画地图用什么工具？
options.text_pinyin: Nín huà dìtú yòng shénme gōngjù?
options.text_en: What tools did you use to draw maps?
options.feedback: A technical question during a philosophical contrast.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 「地方」和「位置」的区别——你说到了关键。我画过一个苗族村庄的地图，村长带我走了每条路。他指着一块空地说「这里以前是打谷场，我爷爷在这里教我唱歌」。我在地图上标了一个符号，写了一行小字。卫星看到的是一块空地，面积0.3亩。但对那个村长来说，那不是空地——那是一个声音还在回响的地方。地图应该记录这些声音，但现在的地图只记录形状。
turns.text_pinyin: 'Dìfang' hé 'wèizhì' de qūbié — nǐ shuō dào le guānjiàn. Wǒ huà guò yī ge Miáozú cūnzhuāng de dìtú, cūnzhǎng dài wǒ zǒu le měi tiáo lù. Tā zhǐ zhe yī kuài kōngdì shuō 'zhèlǐ yǐqián shì dǎ gǔ chǎng, wǒ yéye zài zhèlǐ jiāo wǒ chànggē'. Wǒ zài dìtú shàng biāo le yī ge fúhào, xiě le yī háng xiǎo zì. Wèixīng kàn dào de shì yī kuài kōngdì, miànjī líng diǎn sān mǔ. Dàn duì nàge cūnzhǎng lái shuō, nà bú shì kōngdì — nà shì yī ge shēngyīn hái zài huíxiǎng de dìfang. Dìtú yīnggāi jìlù zhèxiē shēngyīn, dàn xiànzài de dìtú zhǐ jìlù xíngzhuàng.
turns.text_en: 'Place' and 'location' — you've hit the key. I once mapped a Miao village; the chief walked every path with me. He pointed to an empty lot: 'This used to be the threshing ground — my grandfather taught me to sing here.' I marked a symbol and wrote a note. The satellite sees an empty lot, 0.3 mu. For that chief, it's not empty — sounds still echo there. Maps should record these sounds, but modern maps only record shapes.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to maps recording sounds vs. shapes.

options.text_zh: 声音还在回响的地方——也许是对「地方」最诗意的定义。「位置」只有坐标，「地方」有回声。您的地图记录的不是地理，是记忆的地理。当村庄消失、村长们离去，您的地图成了唯一知道那块空地上有歌声的证据。
options.text_pinyin: Shēngyīn hái zài huíxiǎng de dìfang — yěxǔ shì duì 'dìfang' zuì shīyì de dìngyì. 'Wèizhì' zhǐyǒu zuòbiāo, 'dìfang' yǒu huíshēng. Nín de dìtú jìlù de bú shì dìlǐ, shì jìyì de dìlǐ. Dāng cūnzhuāng xiāoshī, cūnzhǎngmen líqù, nín de dìtú chéng le wéiyī zhīdào nà kuài kōngdì shàng yǒu gēshēng de zhèngjù.
options.text_en: A place where sounds still echo — perhaps the most poetic definition of 'place.' A 'location' has coordinates; a 'place' has echoes. Your maps record not geography but the geography of memory. When villages vanish and chiefs pass on, your maps become the only evidence that there was song on that empty lot.
options.feedback: Memory geography — the 'imprecise' map as the most precise record of human life.

options.text_zh: 您的地图有没有被档案馆收藏？
options.text_pinyin: Nín de dìtú yǒu méiyǒu bèi dàng'ànguǎn shōucáng?
options.text_en: Have your maps been collected by an archive?
options.feedback: An archival question during a moment about the irreplaceable nature of lived mapping.

options.text_zh: 谷歌地图有没有类似的功能？
options.text_pinyin: Gǔgē dìtú yǒu méiyǒu lèisì de gōngnéng?
options.text_en: Does Google Maps have a similar feature?
options.feedback: Compares her life's work to a commercial app.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 记忆的地理……你知道吗，我现在最遗憾的不是我的工作被卫星取代了——技术进步是必然的。我最遗憾的是，我只画了这么多张。中国有几十万个村庄，每一个都有自己的歌声、自己的树、自己的泥路。它们正在以我无法跟上的速度消失。每消失一个村庄，就消失了一整个「声音的地图」——一套只有住在那里的人才知道的，关于这片土地的隐藏知识。我画了三百张地图，但有三十万个村庄在我没到之前就已经沉默了。
turns.text_pinyin: Jìyì de dìlǐ…… nǐ zhīdào ma, wǒ xiànzài zuì yíhàn de bú shì wǒ de gōngzuò bèi wèixīng qǔdài le — jìshù jìnbù shì bìrán de. Wǒ zuì yíhàn de shì, wǒ zhǐ huà le zhème duō zhāng. Zhōngguó yǒu jǐ shí wàn ge cūnzhuāng, měi yī ge dōu yǒu zìjǐ de gēshēng, zìjǐ de shù, zìjǐ de ní lù. Tāmen zhèngzài yǐ wǒ wúfǎ gēn shàng de sùdù xiāoshī. Měi xiāoshī yī ge cūnzhuāng, jiù xiāoshī le yī zhěnggè 'shēngyīn de dìtú' — yī tào zhǐyǒu zhù zài nàlǐ de rén cái zhīdào de, guānyú zhè piàn tǔdì de yǐncáng zhīshi. Wǒ huà le sānbǎi zhāng dìtú, dàn yǒu sānshí wàn ge cūnzhuāng zài wǒ méi dào zhīqián jiù yǐjīng chénmò le.
turns.text_en: Geography of memory... my greatest regret isn't that satellites replaced me — progress is inevitable. My regret is that I only drew this many. China has hundreds of thousands of villages, each with its own songs, trees, mud roads. They're disappearing faster than I could ever keep up. Each vanished village is a lost 'map of sounds.' I drew three hundred maps, but three hundred thousand villages fell silent before I could reach them.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the scale of what's been lost unrecorded.

options.text_zh: 三百张和三十万个——这个落差本身就是无声的悲剧。但您画下的三百张，每一张都是从沉默中抢救出来的声音。这三百张证明了一件事：有人用脚走过这片土地，用耳朵听过歌声，用手把声音变成了线条。
options.text_pinyin: Sānbǎi zhāng hé sānshí wàn ge — zhège luòchā běnshēn jiù shì wúshēng de bēijù. Dàn nín huà xià de sānbǎi zhāng, měi yī zhāng dōu shì cóng chénmò zhōng qiǎngjiù chūlái de shēngyīn. Zhè sānbǎi zhāng zhèngmíng le yī jiàn shì: yǒu rén yòng jiǎo zǒu guò zhè piàn tǔdì, yòng ěrduo tīng guò gēshēng, yòng shǒu bǎ shēngyīn biàn chéng le xiàntiáo.
options.text_en: Three hundred versus three hundred thousand — that gap itself is a silent tragedy. But each of your three hundred maps is a sound rescued from silence. Those three hundred prove one thing: someone walked this land, listened to its songs, and turned those sounds into lines.
options.feedback: The measure is not quantity but irreplaceability — each map is a rescued voice.

options.text_zh: 也许可以培训更多的人来画这种地图？
options.text_pinyin: Yěxǔ kěyǐ péixùn gèng duō de rén lái huà zhè zhǒng dìtú?
options.text_en: Maybe more people could be trained to draw these kinds of maps?
options.feedback: A scalability suggestion that ignores the inherent limitation she's grieving.

options.text_zh: 数字地图能不能加上这些文化标注？
options.text_pinyin: Shùzì dìtú néng bù néng jiā shàng zhèxiē wénhuà biāozhù?
options.text_en: Could digital maps add these cultural annotations?
options.feedback: A feature request during a moment about irreplaceable human presence.

tree.cultural_note: China's rapid urbanization has resulted in the disappearance of an estimated 900,000 natural villages since 2000. Each village carried unique local knowledge — about weather patterns, soil conditions, water sources, and cultural practices — that existed nowhere else. Hand-drawn cartography (手绘地图) represented a deeply embodied way of knowing territory, requiring prolonged physical presence. The shift to satellite mapping gained immense precision but lost the human dimension of place-knowledge.

tree.setup: You visit a porcelain restoration workshop in Jingdezhen. The restorer, Ms. Ye, is reassembling a Song dynasty celadon bowl from seventeen fragments. Her desk lamp illuminates each tiny shard.
tree.setup_zh: 你在景德镇参观一个瓷器修复工作室。修复师叶女士正在用十七片碎片重新拼合一只宋代青瓷碗。台灯照亮了每一片小碎片。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 这只碗碎成了十七片。拼起来大概需要三个月。很多人问我「为什么不去修一个完整的碗？修碎片有什么意义？」但你看——每一道裂纹都是这只碗经历过的时间。如果我修好了，所有的碎片重新在一起，裂纹还在，但碗又完整了。它会比一只从未破过的碗更美。不是因为破了更美，而是因为「破了又完整」这个过程本身就是一种美。
turns.text_pinyin: Zhè zhī wǎn suì chéng le shíqī piàn. Pīn qǐlái dàgài xūyào sān ge yuè. Hěn duō rén wèn wǒ 'wèishéme bú qù xiū yī ge wánzhěng de wǎn? Xiū suìpiàn yǒu shénme yìyì?' Dàn nǐ kàn — měi yī dào lièwén dōu shì zhè zhī wǎn jīnglì guò de shíjiān. Rúguǒ wǒ xiū hǎo le, suǒyǒu de suìpiàn chóngxīn zài yīqǐ, lièwén hái zài, dàn wǎn yòu wánzhěng le. Tā huì bǐ yī zhī cóng wèi pò guò de wǎn gèng měi. Bú shì yīnwèi pò le gèng měi, ér shì yīnwèi 'pò le yòu wánzhěng' zhège guòchéng běnshēn jiù shì yī zhǒng měi.
turns.text_en: This bowl broke into seventeen pieces. Reassembly takes about three months. Many ask: 'Why not work on an intact bowl?' But every crack is time this bowl lived through. When I finish, cracks still visible, but whole again. More beautiful than a bowl that never broke. Not because breaking is beautiful, but because 'broken and made whole' — that process is a kind of beauty.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the beauty of 'broken and made whole again.'

options.text_zh: 「破了又完整」——这不只是修复技术，是一种对时间的态度。从未破过的碗只有一个故事：被制造。这只碗有三个故事：被制造、被打碎、被修复。修复不是抹去裂纹——是承认裂纹，然后选择继续完整。
options.text_pinyin: 'Pò le yòu wánzhěng' — zhè bù zhǐ shì xiūfù jìshù, shì yī zhǒng duì shíjiān de tàidù. Cóng wèi pò guò de wǎn zhǐyǒu yī ge gùshì: bèi zhìzào. Zhè zhī wǎn yǒu sān ge gùshì: bèi zhìzào, bèi dǎ suì, bèi xiūfù. Xiūfù bú shì mǒ qù lièwén — shì chéngrèn lièwén, ránhòu xuǎnzé jìxù wánzhěng.
options.text_en: 'Broken and made whole' — not just a technique, but an attitude toward time. A bowl that never broke has one story: being made. This bowl has three: made, broken, restored. Restoration isn't erasing cracks — it's acknowledging them, then choosing to be whole again.
options.feedback: Three stories instead of one — restored wholeness surpasses original wholeness.

options.text_zh: 这跟日本的金缮是一样的道理吗？
options.text_pinyin: Zhè gēn Rìběn de jīnshàn shì yīyàng de dàolǐ ma?
options.text_en: Is this the same principle as Japanese kintsugi?
options.feedback: Compares to another tradition instead of engaging with her own philosophy.

options.text_zh: 这跟日本的金缮是一样的道理吧？用金粉填裂缝，也是强调修复的美。
options.text_pinyin: Zhè gēn Rìběn de jīnshàn shì yīyàng de dàolǐ ba? Yòng jīnfěn tián lièfèng, yě shì qiángdiào xiūfù de měi.
options.text_en: This is the same idea as Japanese kintsugi, right? Using gold powder to fill cracks, also emphasizing the beauty of repair.
options.feedback: Ms. Ye sets down her tool. 'She just articulated her own philosophy — that the process of being broken and made whole is itself beautiful — and you immediately filed it under someone else's tradition.'

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 三个故事——说得好。但我要告诉你最难的部分：拼的时候，有些碎片之间会有缝隙——因为碎裂的时候有些粉末丢失了。那些缝隙是永远填不满的。我能做到的不是「恢复原状」——是「在缺失中重建完整」。接受有些东西永远回不来了，但依然选择把剩下的拼在一起——这才是修复的真正含义。
turns.text_pinyin: Sān ge gùshì — shuō de hǎo. Dàn wǒ yào gàosu nǐ zuì nán de bùfen: pīn de shíhou, yǒuxiē suìpiàn zhī jiān huì yǒu fèngxì — yīnwèi suìliè de shíhou yǒuxiē fěnmò diūshī le. Nàxiē fèngxì shì yǒngyuǎn tián bù mǎn de. Wǒ néng zuò dào de bú shì 'huīfù yuánzhuàng' — shì 'zài quēshī zhōng chóngjiàn wánzhěng'. Jiēshòu yǒuxiē dōngxi yǒngyuǎn huí bù lái le, dàn yīrán xuǎnzé bǎ shèng xià de pīn zài yīqǐ — zhè cái shì xiūfù de zhēnzhèng hányì.
turns.text_en: Three stories — well said. But let me tell you the hardest part: when assembling, there are gaps between some fragments — because some dust was lost during the breaking. Those gaps can never be filled. What I can achieve isn't 'restoring to original' — it's 'rebuilding wholeness within loss.' Accepting that some things will never come back, yet still choosing to piece together what remains — that's the true meaning of restoration.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to rebuilding wholeness within loss.

options.text_zh: 在缺失中重建完整——这不只是在说瓷碗了。真正的修复从来不是回到从前。它是站在碎片之间说：「有些东西没了，但我选择用剩下的重新组成整体。」那个整体不完美，但比「完美」更诚实——因为它承认了失去，同时拒绝了放弃。
options.text_pinyin: Zài quēshī zhōng chóngjiàn wánzhěng — zhè bù zhǐ shì zài shuō cí wǎn le. Zhēnzhèng de xiūfù cónglái bú shì huí dào cóngqián. Tā shì zhàn zài suìpiàn zhī jiān shuō: 'yǒuxiē dōngxi méi le, dàn wǒ xuǎnzé yòng shèng xià de chóngxīn zǔchéng zhěngtǐ.' Nàge zhěngtǐ bù wánměi, dàn bǐ 'wánměi' gèng chéngshí — yīnwèi tā chéngrèn le shīqù, tóngshí jùjué le fàngqì.
options.text_en: Rebuilding wholeness within loss — this isn't about a bowl anymore. True restoration never means going back. It's standing among fragments saying: 'some things are gone, but I choose to reassemble what remains into a whole.' That whole isn't perfect, but more honest than 'perfect' — it acknowledges loss while refusing surrender.
options.feedback: Restoration as the space between acknowledging loss and refusing surrender.

options.text_zh: 用什么胶水来粘？
options.text_pinyin: Yòng shénme jiāoshuǐ lái zhān?
options.text_en: What glue do you use?
options.feedback: An adhesive question during a profound philosophical exchange.

options.text_zh: 如果碎片太小了，拼不起来怎么办？
options.text_pinyin: Rúguǒ suìpiàn tài xiǎo le, pīn bù qǐlái zěnme bàn?
options.text_en: What if the fragments are too small to reassemble?
options.feedback: Asks about failure cases during a meditation on choosing to repair.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 承认失去，拒绝放弃——你把我三十年做的事浓缩成了一句话。但我还想补充一点：有时候修复完成以后，我会坐在那里看着修好的碗，觉得它比原来更让我感动。不是因为我的工作好——是因为它经历了碎裂还在这里。它的存在本身就是一种勇气。每一只修复过的碗都在安静地说：「我碎过，但我还在。」
turns.text_pinyin: Chéngrèn shīqù, jùjué fàngqì — nǐ bǎ wǒ sānshí nián zuò de shì nóngsuō chéng le yī jù huà. Dàn wǒ hái xiǎng bǔchōng yīdiǎn: yǒu shíhou xiūfù wánchéng yǐhòu, wǒ huì zuò zài nàlǐ kàn zhe xiū hǎo de wǎn, juéde tā bǐ yuánlái gèng ràng wǒ gǎndòng. Bú shì yīnwèi wǒ de gōngzuò hǎo — shì yīnwèi tā jīnglì le suìliè hái zài zhèlǐ. Tā de cúnzài běnshēn jiù shì yī zhǒng yǒngqì. Měi yī zhī xiūfù guò de wǎn dōu zài ānjìng de shuō: 'Wǒ suì guò, dàn wǒ hái zài.'
turns.text_en: Acknowledging loss, refusing surrender — you've compressed thirty years of my work into one sentence. But I want to add: sometimes after a restoration is complete, I sit and look at the repaired bowl, and feel more moved by it than the original. Not because my work is good — because it endured shattering and is still here. Its very existence is a form of courage. Every restored bowl quietly says: 'I was broken, but I'm still here.'

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the bowl's quiet courage.

options.text_zh: 「我碎过，但我还在」——这七个字可以写在每个经历过破碎还选择继续的人心里。从未破过的碗是幸运的，碎了又修复的碗是勇敢的。幸运不需要勇气，但从碎片中站起来需要。每修好一只碗，就在告诉世界：碎裂不是终点。
options.text_pinyin: 'Wǒ suì guò, dàn wǒ hái zài' — zhè qī ge zì kěyǐ xiě zài měi ge jīnglì guò pòsuì hái xuǎnzé jìxù de rén xīnlǐ. Cóng wèi pò guò de wǎn shì xìngyùn de, suì le yòu xiūfù de wǎn shì yǒnggǎn de. Xìngyùn bù xūyào yǒngqì, dàn cóng suìpiàn zhōng zhàn qǐlái xūyào. Měi xiū hǎo yī zhī wǎn, jiù zài gàosu shìjiè: suìliè bú shì zhōngdiǎn.
options.text_en: 'I was broken, but I'm still here' — those seven characters belong in the heart of everyone who shattered and chose to continue. A bowl that never broke is lucky; one broken and restored is brave. Luck doesn't require courage, but rising from fragments does. Each restored bowl tells the world: shattering is not the end.
options.feedback: The restored bowl as a declaration of courage — shattering is not the end.

options.text_zh: 您修过最难的碗是哪一只？
options.text_pinyin: Nín xiū guò zuì nán de wǎn shì nǎ yī zhī?
options.text_en: What's the hardest bowl you've ever restored?
options.feedback: Asks for a highlight reel at the emotional peak.

options.text_zh: 您有没有收徒弟？
options.text_pinyin: Nín yǒu méiyǒu shōu túdì?
options.text_en: Have you taken apprentices?
options.feedback: A succession question during a meditation on courage.

tree.cultural_note: Jingdezhen (景德镇) has been China's porcelain capital for over a millennium. The Chinese tradition of porcelain restoration predates Japanese kintsugi and uses different techniques — including lacquer, staples, and ceramic paste. The philosophy that a restored piece surpasses an unbroken one connects to the Chinese concept of 涅槃 (nièpán, nirvana through destruction) and the broader cultural value placed on resilience through adversity (凤凰涅槃, the phoenix rising).

tree.setup: On a rocky island off the coast of Zhejiang, you visit one of the last manned lighthouses in China. The keeper, Old Zhou, has been here alone for eighteen years. The lighthouse is scheduled to be automated next month.
tree.setup_zh: 在浙江海岸外的一座礁石岛上，你参观了中国最后几座有人值守的灯塔之一。守灯人老周已经在这里独自守了十八年。下个月灯塔就要自动化了。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 十八年了。每天晚上检查灯，擦玻璃，观察海面。自动化以后，一个传感器加一台电脑就够了。比我准确，比我不知疲倦。但你知道吗——有些东西传感器感觉不到。暴风雨来之前，空气有一种味道，海浪的节奏会变。这些我的身体知道，但没有任何传感器可以量化「空气的味道变了」。
turns.text_pinyin: Shíbā nián le. Měi tiān wǎnshang jiǎnchá dēng, cā bōli, guānchá hǎimiàn. Zìdònghuà yǐhòu, yī ge chuángǎnqì jiā yī tái diànnǎo jiù gòu le. Bǐ wǒ zhǔnquè, bǐ wǒ bù zhī píjuàn. Dàn nǐ zhīdào ma — yǒuxiē dōngxi chuángǎnqì gǎnjué bú dào. Bàofēngyǔ lái zhīqián, kōngqì yǒu yī zhǒng wèidào, hǎilàng de jiézòu huì biàn. Zhèxiē wǒ de shēntǐ zhīdào, dàn méiyǒu rènhé chuángǎnqì kěyǐ liànghuà 'kōngqì de wèidào biàn le'.
turns.text_en: Eighteen years. Every night checking the light, wiping the glass, watching the sea. After automation, a sensor and a computer will be enough. More accurate than me, more tireless. But you know — some things sensors can't feel. Before a storm, the air has a smell, the wave rhythm changes. My body knows these things, but no sensor can quantify 'the air smells different.'

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the body knowledge that sensors can't replicate.

options.text_zh: 传感器测湿度、气压、风速——但它闻不到风暴来临前的味道。那种「味道」是温度、盐分、气压、水汽和十八年经验共同构成的综合感知。您的身体不生产数据，生产判断。自动化取代您，获得的是精度，失去的是判断力。
options.text_pinyin: Chuángǎnqì cè shīdù, qìyā, fēngsù — dàn tā wén bú dào fēngbào láilín qián de wèidào. Nà zhǒng 'wèidào' shì wēndù, yánfèn, qìyā, shuǐqì hé shíbā nián jīngyàn gòngtóng gòuchéng de zōnghé gǎnzhī. Nín de shēntǐ bù shēngchǎn shùjù, shēngchǎn pànduàn. Zìdònghuà qǔdài nín, huòdé de shì jīngdù, shīqù de shì pànduànlì.
options.text_en: Sensors measure humidity, pressure, wind speed — but they can't smell the scent before a storm. That 'scent' is temperature, salinity, pressure, moisture, and eighteen years of experience forming a composite perception. Your body doesn't produce data, it produces judgment. When automation replaces you, what's gained is precision; what's lost is judgment.
options.feedback: Data vs. judgment — the body as the most sophisticated instrument.

options.text_zh: 自动化以后您打算做什么？
options.text_pinyin: Zìdònghuà yǐhòu nín dǎsuàn zuò shénme?
options.text_en: What will you do after automation?
options.feedback: Asks about retirement plans during a deeper reflection.

options.text_zh: 一个人在这里不寂寞吗？
options.text_pinyin: Yī ge rén zài zhèlǐ bú jìmò ma?
options.text_en: Don't you get lonely here alone?
options.feedback: Asks about loneliness instead of engaging his observation about embodied knowledge.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 判断力比精度更能救命——说到了根本。但我想说的不只是技术层面的事。十八年来，每天晚上我点亮这盏灯，我知道海上有人在看着它。那些渔船、那些货轮——它们看到的不只是一束光，是一个信号：「有人在这里守着你。」自动化的灯和人守的灯，亮度一样，位置一样，但含义不同。一个是「系统在运行」，一个是「有人在看着你」。你觉得在暴风雨中的船员，更需要哪一种？
turns.text_pinyin: Pànduànlì bǐ jīngdù gèng néng jiù mìng — shuō dào le gēnběn. Dàn wǒ xiǎng shuō de bù zhǐ shì jìshù céngmiàn de shì. Shíbā nián lái, měi tiān wǎnshang wǒ diǎn liàng zhè zhǎn dēng, wǒ zhīdào hǎi shàng yǒu rén zài kàn zhe tā. Nàxiē yúchuán, nàxiē huòlún — tāmen kàn dào de bù zhǐ shì yī shù guāng, shì yī ge xìnhào: 'yǒu rén zài zhèlǐ shǒu zhe nǐ.' Zìdònghuà de dēng hé rén shǒu de dēng, liàngdù yīyàng, wèizhì yīyàng, dàn hányì bùtóng. Yī ge shì 'xìtǒng zài yùnxíng', yī ge shì 'yǒu rén zài kàn zhe nǐ'. Nǐ juéde zài bàofēngyǔ zhōng de chuányuán, gèng xūyào nǎ yī zhǒng?
turns.text_en: Emotional autobiography — yes. But something special: when she painted happy flowers, the strokes were fast, colors vivid. When she was sad, she chose cold-toned flowers, strokes cautious and slow. She couldn't write down her feelings, but she could paint them. The flowers became her diary, a diary only she could read — until I learned to read it too.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the difference between a system running and someone watching over you.

options.text_zh: 「系统在运行」和「有人在看着你」——同一束光，照亮的不是同一个东西。自动化的灯照亮海面，您的灯照亮信念——「我不是一个人在海上」。灯塔的真正功能从来不只是导航——是人类对彼此说「你不是孤独的」最古老的方式。
options.text_pinyin: 'Xìtǒng zài yùnxíng' hé 'yǒu rén zài kàn zhe nǐ' — tóng yī shù guāng, zhào liàng de bú shì tóng yī ge dōngxi. Zìdònghuà de dēng zhào liàng hǎimiàn, nín de dēng zhào liàng xìnniàn — 'wǒ bú shì yī ge rén zài hǎi shàng'. Dēngtǎ de zhēnzhèng gōngnéng cónglái bù zhǐ shì dǎoháng — shì rénlèi duì bǐcǐ shuō 'nǐ bú shì gūdú de' zuì gǔlǎo de fāngshì.
options.text_en: 'A system is running' and 'someone is watching over you' — the same beam of light, but illuminating different things. The automated light illuminates the sea; your light illuminates belief — 'I'm not alone out here.' The lighthouse's true function was never just navigation — it's humanity's oldest way of saying 'you're not alone.'
options.feedback: The lighthouse illuminates faith, not just water — human presence as the oldest comfort.

options.text_zh: 船员知道灯塔是有人守的吗？
options.text_pinyin: Chuányuán zhīdào dēngtǎ shì yǒu rén shǒu de ma?
options.text_en: Do the crews know the lighthouse is manned?
options.feedback: A factual question that misses the philosophical point.

options.text_zh: 自动化系统会不会出故障？
options.text_pinyin: Zìdònghuà xìtǒng huì bú huì chū gùzhàng?
options.text_en: Could the automated system malfunction?
options.feedback: A reliability question during a meditation on human presence.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 「你不是孤独的」——十八年来，这就是我每晚点灯时心里想的。不是在想灯有多亮、角度对不对——是在想海上的人。也许他们从来不知道有人在这里想着他们。但这不重要。就像你刚才说的——给予不需要被知道。下个月我走以后，灯还会亮。但那个灯里会少一些东西。外表看不出来，亮度不变。只是……不一样了。
turns.text_pinyin: 'Nǐ bú shì gūdú de' — shíbā nián lái, zhè jiù shì wǒ měi wǎn diǎn dēng shí xīnlǐ xiǎng de. Bú shì zài xiǎng dēng yǒu duō liàng, jiǎodù duì bú duì — shì zài xiǎng hǎi shàng de rén. Yěxǔ tāmen cónglái bù zhīdào yǒu rén zài zhèlǐ xiǎng zhe tāmen. Dàn zhè bù zhòngyào. Jiù xiàng nǐ gāngcái shuō de — gěiyǔ bù xūyào bèi zhīdào. Xià ge yuè wǒ zǒu yǐhòu, dēng hái huì liàng. Dàn nàge dēng lǐ huì shǎo yīxiē dōngxi. Wàibiǎo kàn bù chūlái, liàngdù bú biàn. Zhǐ shì…… bù yīyàng le.
turns.text_en: Love made visible... you know the hardest part? She stopped painting three years before she passed — her hands shook too much. Those last three years, I'd bring her flowers. Real ones. She'd look at them and I knew she was painting them in her mind. The painting never stopped — only the hand did. Even now, when I see certain flowers, I paint them for her. I've become her hands.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the invisible loss within the unchanged light.

options.text_zh: 外表一样，但不一样了——也许是我们这个时代最隐秘的损失。我们用效率替换了关怀，用系统替换了个人，所有指标都没变。但有一种东西消失了：一个人每晚在风中为陌生人点灯的那颗心。您的十八年留在了这里的风里、盐里、石头里。
options.text_pinyin: Wàibiǎo yīyàng, dàn bù yīyàng le — yěxǔ shì wǒmen zhège shídài zuì yǐnmì de sǔnshī. Wǒmen yòng xiàolǜ tìhuàn le guānhuái, yòng xìtǒng tìhuàn le gèrén, suǒyǒu zhǐbiāo dōu méi biàn. Dàn yǒu yī zhǒng dōngxi xiāoshī le: yī ge rén měi wǎn zài fēng zhōng wèi mòshēngrén diǎn dēng de nà kē xīn. Nín de shíbā nián liú zài le zhèlǐ de fēng lǐ, yán lǐ, shítou lǐ.
options.text_en: Same on the outside, but different — maybe the most hidden loss of our era. We replaced care with efficiency, individuals with systems, and all the metrics stayed the same. But something vanished: the heart of a person lighting a lamp in the wind for strangers each night. Your eighteen years remain in the wind, the salt, the stone.
options.feedback: The most hidden loss of our era — efficiency replaces care, metrics stay perfect, but the soul knows something is gone.

options.text_zh: 您会想念这个地方吗？
options.text_pinyin: Nín huì xiǎngniàn zhège dìfang ma?
options.text_en: Will you miss this place?
options.feedback: The obvious question; the entire conversation has been about how deeply he's embedded here.

options.text_zh: 灯塔可以改成民宿。
options.text_pinyin: Dēngtǎ kěyǐ gǎi chéng mínsù.
options.text_en: The lighthouse could be turned into a guesthouse.
options.feedback: A commercial suggestion during a farewell to a life's calling.

tree.cultural_note: China's manned lighthouses are steadily being automated, with the last keepers retiring without replacement. These keepers often served in extreme isolation for decades, developing an embodied knowledge of local weather patterns that no instrument can replicate. The philosophical question of whether a human-tended light and an automated light carry the same meaning connects to broader Chinese discussions about 人情味 (rénqíng wèi, the flavor of human feeling) — the intangible quality that distinguishes human care from mechanical function.

tree.setup: You're in a mountain temple in Sichuan during the first snowfall. The abbot, Master Huai, sits with you watching snow accumulate on bamboo branches outside. He hasn't spoken to anyone in three days — this is his first conversation.
tree.setup_zh: 初雪时节，你在四川的一座山寺里。住持怀师父和你一起坐着，看雪慢慢积在窗外的竹枝上。他已经三天没跟任何人说话了——这是他的第一次对话。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你来得正好。看竹子——雪一点一点地积，竹子一点一点地弯。它不会折断。到了某个时刻，雪会自己滑下来，竹子弹回去。但如果雪积得太快、太重，来不及滑落——竹子就断了。这不是竹子不够强，是雪太急。大多数人的崩溃也是这样——不是因为不够坚强，是因为压力来得太密集，还没来得及释放一次，下一层就压上来了。问题从来不是重量——是间隔。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ lái de zhènghǎo. Kàn zhúzi — xuě yīdiǎn yīdiǎn de jī, zhúzi yīdiǎn yīdiǎn de wān. Tā bú huì zhéduàn. Dào le mǒu ge shíkè, xuě huì zìjǐ huá xiàlái, zhúzi tán huíqù. Dàn rúguǒ xuě jī de tài kuài, tài zhòng, lái bù jí huáluò — zhúzi jiù duàn le. Zhè bú shì zhúzi bú gòu qiáng, shì xuě tài jí. Dàduōshù rén de bēngkuì yě shì zhèyàng — bú shì yīnwèi bú gòu jiānqiáng, shì yīnwèi yālì lái de tài mìjí, hái méi lái de jí shìfàng yī cì, xià yī céng jiù yā shànglái le. Wèntí cónglái bú shì zhòngliàng — shì jiāngé.
turns.text_en: You've come at the right time. Watch the bamboo — snow accumulates bit by bit, bamboo bends bit by bit. It won't break. At a certain moment, the snow slides off on its own, the bamboo springs back. But if snow piles too fast, too heavy, before it can slide off — the bamboo breaks. Not because the bamboo isn't strong enough, but because the snow is too relentless.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the distinction between weight and intervals.

options.text_zh: 问题不是重量，是间隔——这颠覆了对承受力的理解。真正的问题不是「你能扛多少」，是「你有没有时间在两次重压之间恢复」。竹子的智慧不在于它有多硬，是它允许自己弯，然后在间隔里弹回来。
options.text_pinyin: Wèntí bú shì zhòngliàng, shì jiāngé — zhè diānfù le duì chéngshòulì de lǐjiě. Zhēnzhèng de wèntí bú shì 'nǐ néng káng duōshǎo', shì 'nǐ yǒu méiyǒu shíjiān zài liǎng cì zhòngyā zhī jiān huīfù'. Zhúzi de zhìhuì bú zài yú tā yǒu duō yìng, shì tā yǔnxǔ zìjǐ wān, ránhòu zài jiāngé lǐ tán huílái.
options.text_en: The problem isn't weight, it's intervals — that overturns how I think about endurance.
options.feedback: Master Huai nods very slightly, eyes still on the bamboo. After a moment he says, 'You can see it.'

options.text_zh: 这跟佛教的修行有什么关系？
options.text_pinyin: Zhè gēn Fójiào de xiūxíng yǒu shénme guānxi?
options.text_en: How does this connect to Buddhist practice?
options.feedback: Master Huai glances at you briefly. 'Everything connects to everything,' he says, mildly. He turns back to the window. He was hoping you'd stay with the bamboo a little longer.

options.text_zh: 那受到很大压力的时候，应该怎么做？
options.text_pinyin: Nà shòu dào hěn dà yālì de shíhou, yīnggāi zěnme zuò?
options.text_en: So when you're under great pressure, what should you do?
options.feedback: Master Huai is quiet for a moment. Then he gestures at the bamboo outside. 'Keep watching,' he says.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 节奏——你抓到了。但我要更进一步：竹子不思考「我什么时候该弯」。它只是弯了。雪落下来，它弯。雪滑走了，它弹回去。没有计划、没有判断、没有「我应该坚强」的念头。人和竹子最大的区别不是身体——是头脑。人在弯曲的时候会想「我不应该弯」，在需要释放的时候会想「释放是软弱的」。于是压力积累了，但释放被堵住了。竹子不知道什么是面子、什么是坚强。所以它永远不会被压力压到来不及释放的地步——除非外力太快。而人呢？人的外力有一半是自己加上去的。
turns.text_pinyin: Jiézòu — nǐ zhuā dào le. Dàn wǒ yào gèng jìn yī bù: zhúzi bù sīkǎo 'wǒ shénme shíhou gāi wān'. Tā zhǐ shì wān le. Xuě luò xiàlái, tā wān. Xuě huá zǒu le, tā tán huíqù. Méiyǒu jìhuà, méiyǒu pànduàn, méiyǒu 'wǒ yīnggāi jiānqiáng' de niàntou. Rén hé zhúzi zuì dà de qūbié bú shì shēntǐ — shì tóunǎo. Rén zài wānqū de shíhou huì xiǎng 'wǒ bù yīnggāi wān', zài xūyào shìfàng de shíhou huì xiǎng 'shìfàng shì ruǎnruò de'. Yúshì yālì jīlěi le, dàn shìfàng bèi dǔ zhù le. Zhúzi bù zhīdào shénme shì miànzi, shénme shì jiānqiáng. Suǒyǐ tā yǒngyuǎn bú huì bèi yālì yā dào lái bù jí shìfàng de dìbù — chúfēi wàilì tài kuài. Ér rén ne? Rén de wàilì yǒu yībàn shì zìjǐ jiā shàngqù de.
turns.text_en: Rhythm — you've caught it. But let me go further: bamboo doesn't think 'when should I bend.' It bends. Snow falls, it bends. Snow slides off, it springs back. No planning, no judgment, no thought of 'I should be strong.' The greatest difference between humans and bamboo isn't the body — it's the mind.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the self-imposed pressure that blocks natural release.

options.text_zh: 人在承受压力的同时，还要承受「我不应该觉得有压力」的压力。痛苦之上叠加了对痛苦的否认——那才是真正压垮人的东西。不是原始的重量，是对重量的抗拒。头脑把弯曲本身变成了一种新的重量。
options.text_pinyin: Rén zài chéngshòu yālì de tóngshí, hái yào chéngshòu 'wǒ bù yīnggāi juéde yǒu yālì' de yālì. Tòngkǔ zhī shàng diéjiā le duì tòngkǔ de fǒurèn — nà cái shì zhēnzhèng yā kuǎ rén de dōngxi. Bú shì yuánshǐ de zhòngliàng, shì duì zhòngliàng de dǐkàng. Tóunǎo bǎ wānqū běnshēn biàn chéng le yī zhǒng xīn de zhòngliàng.
options.text_en: While bearing pressure, people also bear the pressure of 'I shouldn't feel pressured.' Denial of suffering layered on top of suffering — that's what truly breaks people.
options.feedback: Master Huai turns from the window and looks at you directly for the first time. He says nothing, but his expression has changed — the way a teacher's does when a student stops repeating and starts thinking.

options.text_zh: 这是不是就是「放下」的意思？
options.text_pinyin: Zhè shì bú shì jiù shì 'fàng xià' de yìsi?
options.text_en: Is this basically what 'letting go' means?
options.feedback: Master Huai looks at you calmly. 'Maybe,' he says. 'But naming it doesn't do the thing.' He turns back to the bamboo.

options.text_zh: 您三天不说话，是不是也是为了让自己有间隔？
options.text_pinyin: Nín sān tiān bù shuōhuà, shì bú shì yě shì wèile ràng zìjǐ yǒu jiāngé?
options.text_en: Were your three days of silence also a kind of interval — giving yourself space to recover?
options.feedback: Master Huai tilts his head slightly. 'That's one way to put it,' he says, without quite committing. He seems mildly amused that you turned the teaching back on him.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 弯曲变成了新的重量——这就是我想说的核心。你观察得很准。但还有一层——你看，雪停了。竹子现在正在弹回来。但它弹回来的样子和之前不完全一样。仔细看——弯曲过的地方有一个轻微的弧度留下了。竹子记住了那场雪。它没有假装雪没有来过。它弹回来了，但它允许自己被那场雪改变了一点点。这才是真正的恢复——不是变回原来的样子，是带着经历过的痕迹继续站着。
turns.text_pinyin: Wānqū biàn chéng le xīn de zhòngliàng — zhè jiù shì wǒ xiǎng shuō de héxīn. Nǐ guānchá de hěn zhǔn. Dàn hái yǒu yī céng — nǐ kàn, xuě tíng le. Zhúzi xiànzài zhèngzài tán huílái. Dàn tā tán huílái de yàngzi hé zhīqián bù wánquán yīyàng. Zǐxì kàn — wānqū guò de dìfang yǒu yī ge qīngwēi de húdù liú xià le. Zhúzi jì zhù le nà chǎng xuě. Tā méiyǒu jiǎzhuāng xuě méiyǒu lái guò. Tā tán huílái le, dàn tā yǔnxǔ zìjǐ bèi nà chǎng xuě gǎibiàn le yīdiǎndiǎn. Zhè cái shì zhēnzhèng de huīfù — bú shì biàn huí yuánlái de yàngzi, shì dài zhe jīnglì guò de hénjì jìxù zhàn zhe.
turns.text_en: Bending became new weight — that's the core of what I wanted to say. You observe precisely. But there's another layer — look, the snow stopped. The bamboo is springing back now. But it doesn't look exactly the same as before. Look closely — where it bent, a slight curve remains. The bamboo remembered that snow. It didn't pretend the snow never came.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to true recovery as standing with traces, not returning to original form.

options.text_zh: 我们总把恢复等同于「变回原来的样子」——好像痛苦是一个可以删除的文件。但竹子不删除。那个轻微的弧度不是损伤——是经历。一个人身上的「弯曲」，是他活过来的证据，不是需要被治愈的伤疤。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒmen zǒng bǎ huīfù děngtóng yú 'biàn huí yuánlái de yàngzi' — hǎoxiàng tòngkǔ shì yī ge kěyǐ shānchú de wénjiàn. Dàn zhúzi bù shānchú. Nàge qīngwēi de húdù bú shì sǔnshāng — shì jīnglì. Yī ge rén shēnshàng de 'wānqū', shì tā huó guòlái de zhèngjù, bú shì xūyào bèi zhìyù de shāngbā.
options.text_en: We always equate recovery with 'returning to what you were' — as if suffering were a file that can be deleted. But bamboo doesn't delete. That slight curve isn't damage — it's experience.
options.feedback: Master Huai lets out a slow breath — something between agreement and relief. He looks at the bamboo once more. 'Yes,' he says. Just that.

options.text_zh: 禅宗怎么看待这个问题？
options.text_pinyin: Chánzōng zěnme kàndài zhège wèntí?
options.text_en: What does Zen Buddhism say about this?
options.feedback: Master Huai is quiet for a moment. 'You're looking at it,' he says finally, nodding toward the bamboo. He seems slightly disappointed you reached for a text when the thing itself was right there.

options.text_zh: 您经历过什么让您有这样的理解？
options.text_pinyin: Nín jīnglì guò shénme ràng nín yǒu zhèyàng de lǐjiě?
options.text_en: What did you go through that brought you to this understanding?
options.feedback: Master Huai smiles faintly. 'Many winters,' he says. He turns the question away gently but completely — this isn't his story to share right now.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 继续生长……对。你看那棵竹子——它明年还会遇到雪。它知道这一点吗？不知道。它在意吗？不在意。它只是继续长。这才是竹子教给我们的最后一课：不是关于承受，不是关于恢复——是关于「不管发生了什么，继续生长」。生长不需要理由，不需要条件完美，不需要确定未来不会有更大的雪。它只需要一件事：还活着。只要还活着，就继续长。这是世界上最简单的哲学——但也是最难做到的。
turns.text_pinyin: Jìxù shēngzhǎng…… duì. Nǐ kàn nà kē zhúzi — tā míngnián hái huì yù dào xuě. Tā zhīdào zhè yīdiǎn ma? Bù zhīdào. Tā zàiyì ma? Bú zàiyì. Tā zhǐ shì jìxù zhǎng. Zhè cái shì zhúzi jiāo gěi wǒmen de zuìhòu yī kè: bú shì guānyú chéngshòu, bú shì guānyú huīfù — shì guānyú 'bùguǎn fāshēng le shénme, jìxù shēngzhǎng'. Shēngzhǎng bù xūyào lǐyóu, bù xūyào tiáojiàn wánměi, bù xūyào quèdìng wèilái bú huì yǒu gèng dà de xuě. Tā zhǐ xūyào yī jiàn shì: hái huó zhe. Zhǐyào hái huó zhe, jiù jìxù zhǎng. Zhè shì shìjiè shàng zuì jiǎndān de zhéxué — dàn yě shì zuì nán zuò dào de.
turns.text_en: Keep growing… yes. Look at that bamboo — next year it will meet snow again. Does it know this? No. Does it care? No. It keeps growing. This is bamboo's final lesson: not about endurance, not about recovery — about 'no matter what happened, keep growing.' Growth doesn't need a reason, doesn't need perfect conditions, doesn't need certainty that next year's snow won't be heavier.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the final teaching: keep growing.

options.text_zh: 竹子不问「值不值得长」——它长，是因为它活着。「活着」和「生长」是同一个动词。我们人类把它们拆开了，于是可以活着却不生长，存在却不展开。也许今天坐在这里，就是我的一次间隔——在两场雪之间，让自己弹回来的时间。谢谢您。
options.text_pinyin: Zhúzi bù wèn 'zhí bù zhíde zhǎng' — tā zhǎng, shì yīnwèi tā huó zhe. 'Huó zhe' hé 'shēngzhǎng' shì tóng yī ge dòngcí. Wǒmen rénlèi bǎ tāmen chāi kāi le, yúshì kěyǐ huó zhe què bù shēngzhǎng, cúnzài què bù zhǎnkāi. Yěxǔ jīntiān zuò zài zhèlǐ, jiù shì wǒ de yī cì jiāngé — zài liǎng chǎng xuě zhī jiān, ràng zìjǐ tán huílái de shíjiān. Xièxie nín.
options.text_en: Bamboo doesn't ask 'is it worth growing' — it grows because it's alive. 'Being alive' and 'growing' are the same verb.
options.feedback: Master Huai looks at you for a moment, then back at the bamboo. He doesn't say anything more. That silence is the response.

options.text_zh: 您每年冬天都在这里看竹子吗？
